title: The Construction of Reality in an AI: A Review
title_zh: 人工智能中现实的构建：回顾
abstract: AI constructivism as inspired by Jean Piaget, described and surveyed by Frank Guerin, and representatively implemented by Gary Drescher seeks to create algorithms and knowledge structures that enable agents to acquire, maintain, and apply a deep understanding of the environment through sensorimotor interactions. This paper aims to increase awareness of constructivist AI implementations to encourage greater progress toward enabling lifelong learning by machines. It builds on Guerin's 2008 "Learning Like a Baby: A Survey of AI approaches." After briefly recapitulating that survey, it summarizes subsequent progress by the Guerin referents, numerous works not covered by Guerin (or found in other surveys), and relevant efforts in related areas. The focus is on knowledge representations and learning algorithms that have been used in practice viewed through lenses of Piaget's schemas, adaptation processes, and staged development. The paper concludes with a preview of a simple framework for constructive AI being developed by the author that parses concepts from sensory input and stores them in a semantic memory network linked to episodic data. Extensive references are provided.
summary: AI constructivism as inspired by Jean Piaget, described and surveyed by Frank Guerin, and representatively implemented by Gary Drescher seeks to create algorithms and knowledge structures that enable agents to acquire, maintain, and apply a deep understanding of the environment through sensorimotor interactions. This paper aims to increase awareness of constructivist AI implementations to encourage greater progress toward enabling lifelong learning by machines. It builds on Guerin's 2008 "Learning Like a Baby: A Survey of AI approaches." After briefly recapitulating that survey, it summarizes subsequent progress by the Guerin referents, numerous works not covered by Guerin (or found in other surveys), and relevant efforts in related areas. The focus is on knowledge representations and learning algorithms that have been used in practice viewed through lenses of Piaget's schemas, adaptation processes, and staged development. The paper concludes with a preview of a simple framework for constructive AI being developed by the author that parses concepts from sensory input and stores them in a semantic memory network linked to episodic data. Extensive references are provided.
abstract_zh: 受让·皮亚杰 (Jean Piaget) 启发、弗兰克·盖林 (Frank Guerin) 描述和调查、加里·德雷舍 (Gary Drescher) 代表性实施的人工智能建构主义寻求创建算法和知识结构，使智能体能够通过感觉运动交互获取、维持和应用对环境的深刻理解。本文旨在提高人们对建构主义人工智能实施的认识，以鼓励机器在实现终身学习方面取得更大进展。它以 Guerin 2008 年的《像婴儿一样学习：人工智能方法调查》为基础。在简要概述该调查之后，它总结了 Guerin 参考对象的后续进展、Guerin 未涵盖的大量作品（或在其他调查中发现）以及相关领域的相关努力。重点是通过皮亚杰图式、适应过程和分阶段开发的视角观察实践中使用的知识表示和学习算法。论文最后预览了作者正在开发的一个简单的建设性人工智能框架，该框架解析来自感官输入的概念，并将它们存储在与情景数据链接的语义记忆网络中。提供了广泛的参考资料。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了受皮亚杰理论启发的建构主义AI方法，旨在通过传感器运动交互提升机器对环境的深度理解，推动机器终身学习的发展。
AI.motivation: 现有AI缺乏对环境的动态理解和持续学习能力，需借鉴人类认知发展机制（如皮亚杰的图式理论）以实现更接近人类的学习模式。
AI.method: 系统回顾Guerin 2008年综述及后续研究，分析知识表示与学习算法，结合皮亚杰的认知发展阶段理论，提出新的建构主义AI框架。
AI.result: 总结了建构主义AI在知识表征和学习算法方面的进展，识别研究空白，并初步提出基于语义记忆网络的感知概念解析框架。
AI.conclusion: 建构主义AI为实现机器终身学习提供理论基础，未来需进一步开发可解析感官输入并构建语义记忆的框架以推动该领域发展。

authors_text: Ruben Bauer,Quynh Quang Ngo,Guido Reina,Steffen Frey,Bernd Flemisch,Helwig Hauser,Thomas Ertl,Michael Sedlmair
title: Visual Ensemble Analysis of Fluid Flow in Porous Media across Simulation Codes and Experiment
title_zh: 跨模拟代码和实验的多孔介质中流体流动的视觉集成分析
comment: This is a non-peer-reviewed pre-print version of the manuscript submitted to Transport in Porous Media. Please refer to the peer-reviewed and accepted version at https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11242-023-02019-y when referencing this article
comments: This is a non-peer-reviewed pre-print version of the manuscript submitted to Transport in Porous Media. Please refer to the peer-reviewed and accepted version at https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11242-023-02019-y when referencing this article
abstract: We study the question of how visual analysis can support the comparison of spatio-temporal ensemble data of liquid and gas flow in porous media. To this end, we focus on a case study, in which nine different research groups concurrently simulated the process of injecting CO2 into the subsurface. We explore different data aggregation and interactive visualization approaches to compare and analyze these nine simulations. In terms of data aggregation, one key component is the choice of similarity metrics that define the relation between the different simulations. We test different metrics and find that a fine-tuned machine-learning based metric provides the best visualization results. Based on that, we propose different visualization methods. For overviewing the data, we use dimensionality reduction methods that allow us to plot and compare the different simulations in a scatterplot. To show details about the spatio-temporal data of each individual simulation, we employ a space-time cube volume rendering. We use the resulting interactive, multi-view visual analysis tool to explore the nine simulations and also to compare them to data from experimental setups. Our main findings include new insights into ranking of simulation results with respect to experimental data, and the development of gravity fingers in simulations.

In terms of data aggregation, one key component is the choice of similarity metrics that define the relation between the different simulations. We test different metrics and find that a fine-tuned machine-learning based metric provides the best visualization results. Based on that, we propose different visualization methods. For overviewing the data, we use dimensionality reduction methods that allow us to plot and compare the different simulations in a scatterplot. To show details about the spatio-temporal data of each individual simulation, we employ a space-time cube volume rendering. We use the resulting interactive, multi-view visual analysis tool to explore the nine simulations and also to compare them to data from experimental setups. Our main findings include new insights into ranking of simulation results with respect to experimental data, and the development of gravity fingers in simulations.
abstract_zh: 我们研究视觉分析如何支持多孔介质中液体和气体流动的时空系综数据的比较的问题。为此，我们重点关注一个案例研究，其中九个不同的研究小组同时模拟了将二氧化碳注入地下的过程。我们探索不同的数据聚合和交互式可视化方法来比较和分析这九个模拟。在数据聚合方面，一个关键组成部分是选择定义不同模拟之间关系的相似性度量。我们测试了不同的指标，发现基于机器学习的微调指标可提供最佳的可视化结果。在此基础上，我们提出了不同的可视化方法。为了概述数据，我们使用降维方法，使我们能够在散点图中绘制和比较不同的模拟。为了显示每个单独模拟的时空数据的详细信息，我们采用时空立方体渲染。我们使用由此产生的交互式多视图视觉分析工具来探索九个模拟，并将它们与实验设置的数据进行比较。我们的主要发现包括对实验数据的模拟结果排名的新见解，以及模拟中重力手指的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过可视化分析工具，比较不同模拟代码和实验数据在多孔介质中流体流动的时空集合数据。
AI.motivation: 多孔介质中流体流动的模拟结果存在差异，需通过可视化方法有效比较不同模拟与实验数据，以提升碳封存等应用的准确性。
AI.method: 采用机器学习优化相似性度量，结合降维散点图与时空立方体体积渲染技术，开发交互式多视图分析工具进行数据聚合与细节展示。
AI.result: 发现机器学习度量提升可视化效果，明确模拟结果与实验数据的排名关系，并揭示了模拟中重力指进现象的发展规律。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可视化方法有效支持多模拟与实验数据的对比分析，为理解流体流动行为及优化模拟模型提供新视角。

authors_text: David W. Zhang,Corrado Rainone,Markus Peschl,Roberto Bondesan
title: Robust Scheduling with GFlowNets
title_zh: 使用 GFlowNets 进行鲁棒调度
comment: Published at International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023; an earlier version appeared at the NeurIPS 2022 workshop ML4Systems
comments: Published at International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) 2023; an earlier version appeared at the NeurIPS 2022 workshop ML4Systems
abstract: Finding the best way to schedule operations in a computation graph is a classical NP-hard problem which is central to compiler optimization. However, evaluating the goodness of a schedule on the target hardware can be very time-consuming. Traditional approaches as well as previous machine learning ones typically optimize proxy metrics, which are fast to evaluate but can lead to bad schedules when tested on the target hardware. In this work, we propose a new approach to scheduling by sampling proportionally to the proxy metric using a novel GFlowNet method. We introduce a technique to control the trade-off between diversity and goodness of the proposed schedules at inference time and demonstrate empirically that the pure optimization baselines can lead to subpar performance with respect to our approach when tested on a target model. Furthermore, we show that conditioning the GFlowNet on the computation graph enables generalization to unseen scheduling problems for both synthetic and real-world compiler datasets.
summary: Finding the best way to schedule operations in a computation graph is a classical NP-hard problem which is central to compiler optimization. However, evaluating the goodness of a schedule on the target hardware can be very time-consuming. Traditional approaches as well as previous machine learning ones typically optimize proxy metrics, which are fast to evaluate but can lead to bad schedules when tested on the target hardware. In this work, we propose a new approach to scheduling by sampling proportionally to the proxy metric using a novel GFlowNet method. We introduce a technique to control the trade-off between diversity and goodness of the proposed schedules at inference time and demonstrate empirically that the pure optimization baselines can lead to subpar performance with respect to our approach when tested on a target model. Furthermore, we show that conditioning the GFlowNet on the computation graph enables generalization to unseen scheduling problems for both synthetic and real-world compiler datasets.
abstract_zh: 在计算图中找到调度操作的最佳方法是一个经典的 NP 难题，也是编译器优化的核心。然而，评估目标硬件上的调度的优劣性可能非常耗时。传统方法以及以前的机器学习方法通​​常会优化代理指标，这些指标可以快速评估，但在目标硬件上进行测试时可能会导致糟糕的计划。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的调度方法，通过使用新颖的 GFlowNet 方法按代理指标的比例进行采样。我们引入了一种技术来控制推理时所提出的计划的多样性和优良性之间的权衡，并凭经验证明，在目标模型上进行测试时，纯优化基线可能会导致我们的方法表现不佳。此外，我们还表明，在计算图上调节 GFlowNet 可以泛化到合成和真实编译器数据集的未见调度问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于GFlowNets的鲁棒调度方法，通过代理指标采样解决编译器优化中的NP难问题，提升目标硬件上的调度质量。
AI.motivation: 传统调度方法依赖快速评估的代理指标，但实际硬件表现不佳，需平衡调度多样性与质量以适应真实场景。
AI.method: 设计GFlowNet按比例采样代理指标，引入推理时多样性-质量权衡控制机制，并基于计算图条件建模实现跨问题泛化。

search_text: Robust Scheduling with GFlowNets 使用 GFlowNets 进行鲁棒调度 Finding the best way to schedule operations in a computation graph is a classical NP-hard problem which is central to compiler optimization. However, evaluating the goodness of a schedule on the target hardware can be very time-consuming. Traditional approaches as well as previous machine learning ones typically optimize proxy metrics, which are fast to evaluate but can lead to bad schedules when tested on the target hardware. In this work, we propose a new approach to scheduling by sampling proportionally to the proxy metric using a novel GFlowNet method. We introduce a technique to control the trade-off between diversity and goodness of the proposed schedules at inference time and demonstrate empirically that the pure optimization baselines can lead to subpar performance with respect to our approach when tested on a target model. Furthermore, we show that conditioning the GFlowNet on the computation graph enables generalization to unseen scheduling problems for both synthetic and real-world compiler datasets. 在计算图中找到调度操作的最佳方法是一个经典的 NP 难题，也是编译器优化的核心。然而，评估目标硬件上的调度的优劣性可能非常耗时。传统方法以及以前的机器学习方法通​​常会优化代理指标，这些指标可以快速评估，但在目标硬件上进行测试时可能会导致糟糕的计划。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的调度方法，通过使用新颖的 GFlowNet 方法按代理指标的比例进行采样。我们引入了一种技术来控制推理时所提出的计划的多样性和优良性之间的权衡，并凭经验证明，在目标模型上进行测试时，纯优化基线可能会导致我们的方法表现不佳。此外，我们还表明，在计算图上调节 GFlowNet 可以泛化到合成和真实编译器数据集的未见调度问题。 本文提出基于GFlowNets的鲁棒调度方法，通过代理指标采样解决编译器优化中的NP难问题，提升目标硬件上的调度质量。 David W. Zhang,Corrado Rainone,Markus Peschl,Roberto Bondesan cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.PL

authors_text: Mostafa Dehghani,Josip Djolonga,Basil Mustafa,Piotr Padlewski,Jonathan Heek,Justin Gilmer,Andreas Steiner,Mathilde Caron,Robert Geirhos,Ibrahim Alabdulmohsin,Rodolphe Jenatton,Lucas Beyer,Michael Tschannen,Anurag Arnab,Xiao Wang,Carlos Riquelme,Matthias Minderer,Joan Puigcerver,Utku Evci,Manoj Kumar,Sjoerd van Steenkiste,Gamaleldin F. Elsayed,Aravindh Mahendran,Fisher Yu,Avital Oliver, et al. (17 additional authors not shown)
title: Scaling Vision Transformers to 22 Billion Parameters
title_zh: 将 Vision Transformer 扩展到 220 亿个参数
abstract: The scaling of Transformers has driven breakthrough capabilities for language models. At present, the largest large language models (LLMs) contain upwards of 100B parameters. Vision Transformers (ViT) have introduced the same architecture to image and video modelling, but these have not yet been successfully scaled to nearly the same degree; the largest dense ViT contains 4B parameters (Chen et al., 2022). We present a recipe for highly efficient and stable training of a 22B-parameter ViT (ViT-22B) and perform a wide variety of experiments on the resulting model. When evaluated on downstream tasks (often with a lightweight linear model on frozen features), ViT-22B demonstrates increasing performance with scale. We further observe other interesting benefits of scale, including an improved tradeoff between fairness and performance, state-of-the-art alignment to human visual perception in terms of shape/texture bias, and improved robustness. ViT-22B demonstrates the potential for "LLM-like" scaling in vision, and provides key steps towards getting there.
summary: The scaling of Transformers has driven breakthrough capabilities for language models. At present, the largest large language models (LLMs) contain upwards of 100B parameters. Vision Transformers (ViT) have introduced the same architecture to image and video modelling, but these have not yet been successfully scaled to nearly the same degree; the largest dense ViT contains 4B parameters (Chen et al., 2022). We present a recipe for highly efficient and stable training of a 22B-parameter ViT (ViT-22B) and perform a wide variety of experiments on the resulting model. When evaluated on downstream tasks (often with a lightweight linear model on frozen features), ViT-22B demonstrates increasing performance with scale. We further observe other interesting benefits of scale, including an improved tradeoff between fairness and performance, state-of-the-art alignment to human visual perception in terms of shape/texture bias, and improved robustness. ViT-22B demonstrates the potential for "LLM-like" scaling in vision, and provides key steps towards getting there.
abstract_zh: Transformer 的扩展推动了语言模型的突破性功能。目前，最大的大型语言模型 (LLM) 包含多达 100B 个参数。 Vision Transformers (ViT) 已将相同的架构引入图像和视频建模，但尚未成功扩展到几乎相同的程度；最大的密集 ViT 包含 4B 个参数（Chen 等人，2022）。我们提出了一种高效稳定的 22B 参数 ViT (ViT-22B) 训练方法，并对所得模型进行了各种实验。当对下游任务进行评估时（通常使用冻结特征的轻量级线性模型），ViT-22B 表现出随着规模的扩大而提高的性能。我们进一步观察到规模的其他有趣的好处，包括公平性和性能之间改进的权衡、在形状/纹理偏差方面与人类视觉感知的最先进的对齐以及改进的鲁棒性。 ViT-22B 展示了视觉领域“类似法学硕士”扩展的潜力，并提供了实现这一目标的关键步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效稳定的训练方法，将视觉Transformer（ViT）扩展至220亿参数规模（ViT-22B），并在多个下游任务中验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管语言模型已成功扩展至数百亿参数，但视觉Transformer（ViT）的规模仍局限于40亿参数，缺乏类似语言模型的扩展性验证。
AI.method: 通过优化训练策略和分布式计算框架，设计高效稳定的训练方案，实现220亿参数ViT模型的训练，并在冻结特征基础上使用轻量线性模型进行下游任务评估。
AI.result: ViT-22B在下游任务中展现性能随规模提升的趋势，同时改善了公平性与性能的权衡，达到形状/纹理感知的最先进对齐效果，并增强了模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ViT-22B证明了视觉领域可实现类似语言模型的扩展性，为未来视觉模型的规模化发展提供了关键技术路径。

authors_text: Annie S. Chen,Yoonho Lee,Amrith Setlur,Sergey Levine,Chelsea Finn
title: Project and Probe: Sample-Efficient Domain Adaptation by Interpolating Orthogonal Features
title_zh: 项目和探索：通过插值正交特征实现样本有效的域适应
abstract: Transfer learning with a small amount of target data is an effective and common approach to adapting a pre-trained model to distribution shifts. In some situations, target data labels may be expensive to obtain, so we may only have access to a limited number of target data points. To make the most of a very small target dataset, we propose a lightweight, sample-efficient approach that learns a diverse set of features and adapts to a target distribution by interpolating these features. Our approach, Project and Probe (Pro$^2$), first learns a linear projection that maps a pre-trained embedding onto orthogonal directions while being predictive of labels in the source dataset. The goal of this step is to learn a variety of predictive features, so that at least some of them remain useful after distribution shift. Pro$^2$ then learns a linear classifier on top of these projected features using a small target dataset. Theoretically, we find that Pro$^2$ results in more sample-efficient generalization by inducing a favorable bias-variance tradeoff. Our experiments on four datasets, with multiple distribution shift settings for each, show that Pro$^2$ improves performance by 5-15% when given limited target data compared to prior methods such as standard linear probing.
summary: Transfer learning with a small amount of target data is an effective and common approach to adapting a pre-trained model to distribution shifts. In some situations, target data labels may be expensive to obtain, so we may only have access to a limited number of target data points. To make the most of a very small target dataset, we propose a lightweight, sample-efficient approach that learns a diverse set of features and adapts to a target distribution by interpolating these features. Our approach, Project and Probe (Pro$^2$), first learns a linear projection that maps a pre-trained embedding onto orthogonal directions while being predictive of labels in the source dataset. The goal of this step is to learn a variety of predictive features, so that at least some of them remain useful after distribution shift. Pro$^2$ then learns a linear classifier on top of these projected features using a small target dataset. Theoretically, we find that Pro$^2$ results in more sample-efficient generalization by inducing a favorable bias-variance tradeoff. Our experiments on four datasets, with multiple distribution shift settings for each, show that Pro$^2$ improves performance by 5-15% when given limited target data compared to prior methods such as standard linear probing.
abstract_zh: 使用少量目标数据进行迁移学习是使预训练模型适应分布变化的有效且常见的方法。在某些情况下，获取目标数据标签的成本可能很高，因此我们可能只能访问有限数量的目标数据点。为了充分利用非常小的目标数据集，我们提出了一种轻量级、样本高效的方法，该方法可以学习一组不同的特征，并通过插值这些特征来适应目标分布。我们的方法“投影和探测”(Pro$^2$) 首先学习线性投影，将预训练的嵌入映射到正交方向，同时预测源数据集中的标签。此步骤的目标是学习各种预测特征，以便至少其中一些特征在分布转移后仍然有用。然后，Pro$^2$ 使用小型目标数据集在这些投影特征之上学习线性分类器。理论上，我们发现 Pro$^2$ 通过引入有利的偏差-方差权衡，可以实现更有效的样本泛化。我们对四个数据集进行的实验（每个数据集都有多个分布偏移设置）表明，与标准线性探测等先前方法相比，在给定有限目标数据时，Pro$^2$ 的性能提高了 5-15%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Pro²的轻量级样本高效领域自适应方法，通过插值正交特征来提升预训练模型在目标分布上的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 在目标领域数据标签获取成本高昂的情况下，现有方法难以有效利用有限的目标数据进行领域自适应，亟需一种样本高效的解决方案。
AI.method: Pro²首先学习将预训练嵌入映射到正交方向的线性投影，确保特征多样性；随后基于少量目标数据训练线性分类器，通过特征插值实现领域适应。
AI.result: 在四个数据集的多领域偏移设置中，Pro²在目标数据有限时较传统线性探测方法性能提升5-15%。
AI.conclusion: Pro²通过正交特征投影与插值机制，在理论和实验上均验证了其样本高效性，为小样本领域自适应提供了有效方案。

motivation: 在目标领域数据标签获取成本高昂的情况下，现有方法难以有效利用有限的目标数据进行领域自适应，亟需一种样本高效的解决方案。
method: Pro²首先学习将预训练嵌入映射到正交方向的线性投影，确保特征多样性；随后基于少量目标数据训练线性分类器，通过特征插值实现领域适应。
result: 在四个数据集的多领域偏移设置中，Pro²在目标数据有限时较传统线性探测方法性能提升5-15%。
conclusion: Pro²通过正交特征投影与插值机制，在理论和实验上均验证了其样本高效性，为小样本领域自适应提供了有效方案。
search_text: Project and Probe: Sample-Efficient Domain Adaptation by Interpolating Orthogonal Features 项目和探索：通过插值正交特征实现样本有效的域适应 Transfer learning with a small amount of target data is an effective and common approach to adapting a pre-trained model to distribution shifts. In some situations, target data labels may be expensive to obtain, so we may only have access to a limited number of target data points. To make the most of a very small target dataset, we propose a lightweight, sample-efficient approach that learns a diverse set of features and adapts to a target distribution by interpolating these features. Our approach, Project and Probe (Pro$^2$), first learns a linear projection that maps a pre-trained embedding onto orthogonal directions while being predictive of labels in the source dataset. The goal of this step is to learn a variety of predictive features, so that at least some of them remain useful after distribution shift. Pro$^2$ then learns a linear classifier on top of these projected features using a small target dataset. Theoretically, we find that Pro$^2$ results in more sample-efficient generalization by inducing a favorable bias-variance tradeoff. Our experiments on four datasets, with multiple distribution shift settings for each, show that Pro$^2$ improves performance by 5-15% when given limited target data compared to prior methods such as standard linear probing. 使用少量目标数据进行迁移学习是使预训练模型适应分布变化的有效且常见的方法。在某些情况下，获取目标数据标签的成本可能很高，因此我们可能只能访问有限数量的目标数据点。为了充分利用非常小的目标数据集，我们提出了一种轻量级、样本高效的方法，该方法可以学习一组不同的特征，并通过插值这些特征来适应目标分布。我们的方法“投影和探测”(Pro$^2$) 首先学习线性投影，将预训练的嵌入映射到正交方向，同时预测源数据集中的标签。此步骤的目标是学习各种预测特征，以便至少其中一些特征在分布转移后仍然有用。然后，Pro$^2$ 使用小型目标数据集在这些投影特征之上学习线性分类器。理论上，我们发现 Pro$^2$ 通过引入有利的偏差-方差权衡，可以实现更有效的样本泛化。我们对四个数据集进行的实验（每个数据集都有多个分布偏移设置）表明，与标准线性探测等先前方法相比，在给定有限目标数据时，Pro$^2$ 的性能提高了 5-15%。 本文提出了一种名为Pro²的轻量级样本高效领域自适应方法，通过插值正交特征来提升预训练模型在目标分布上的适应能力。 Annie S. Chen,Yoonho Lee,Amrith Setlur,Sergey Levine,Chelsea Finn cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Luca De Luigi,Adriano Cardace,Riccardo Spezialetti,Pierluigi Zama Ramirez,Samuele Salti,Luigi Di Stefano
title: Deep Learning on Implicit Neural Representations of Shapes
title_zh: 形状隐式神经表示的深度学习
abstract: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged in the last few years as a powerful tool to encode continuously a variety of different signals like images, videos, audio and 3D shapes. When applied to 3D shapes, INRs allow to overcome the fragmentation and shortcomings of the popular discrete representations used so far. Yet, considering that INRs consist in neural networks, it is not clear whether and how it may be possible to feed them into deep learning pipelines aimed at solving a downstream task. In this paper, we put forward this research problem and propose inr2vec, a framework that can compute a compact latent representation for an input INR in a single inference pass. We verify that inr2vec can embed effectively the 3D shapes represented by the input INRs and show how the produced embeddings can be fed into deep learning pipelines to solve several tasks by processing exclusively INRs.
summary: Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) have emerged in the last few years as a powerful tool to encode continuously a variety of different signals like images, videos, audio and 3D shapes. When applied to 3D shapes, INRs allow to overcome the fragmentation and shortcomings of the popular discrete representations used so far. Yet, considering that INRs consist in neural networks, it is not clear whether and how it may be possible to feed them into deep learning pipelines aimed at solving a downstream task. In this paper, we put forward this research problem and propose inr2vec, a framework that can compute a compact latent representation for an input INR in a single inference pass. We verify that inr2vec can embed effectively the 3D shapes represented by the input INRs and show how the produced embeddings can be fed into deep learning pipelines to solve several tasks by processing exclusively INRs.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经表示 (INR) 在过去几年中出现，成为连续编码各种不同信号（如图像、视频、音频和 3D 形状）的强大工具。当应用于 3D 形状时，INR 可以克服迄今为止使用的流行离散表示的碎片和缺点。然而，考虑到 INR 存在于神经网络中，目前尚不清楚是否以及如何将它们输入到旨在解决下游任务的深度学习管道中。在本文中，我们提出了这个研究问题，并提出了 inr2vec，一个可以在单次推理过程中计算输入 INR 的紧凑潜在表示的框架。我们验证了 inr2vec 可以有效地嵌入由输入 INR 表示的 3D 形状，并展示了如何将生成的嵌入输入到深度学习管道中，以通过专门处理 INR 来解决多个任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为inr2vec的框架，用于将隐式神经表示（INRs）转换为紧凑的潜在表示，从而能够在深度学习流水线中处理3D形状。
AI.motivation: 传统离散表示3D形状存在碎片化问题，而INRs虽能连续编码形状但缺乏将其有效集成到深度学习任务中的方法。
AI.method: 设计inr2vec框架，通过单次推理过程从输入INR中提取紧凑的潜在表示，作为下游任务的输入。
AI.result: 实验验证了inr2vec能够有效嵌入3D形状，并成功应用于多个深度学习任务中。
AI.conclusion: inr2vec证明了将INRs作为深度学习输入的可行性，为基于隐式神经表示的3D形状处理提供了新思路。

title: A deep convolutional neural network for salt-and-pepper noise removal using selective convolutional blocks
title_zh: 使用选择性卷积块去除椒盐噪声的深度卷积神经网络
abstract: In recent years, there has been an unprecedented upsurge in applying deep learning approaches, specifically convolutional neural networks (CNNs), to solve image denoising problems, owing to their superior performance. However, CNNs mostly rely on Gaussian noise, and there is a conspicuous lack of exploiting CNNs for salt-and-pepper (SAP) noise reduction. In this paper, we proposed a deep CNN model, namely SeConvNet, to suppress SAP noise in gray-scale and color images. To meet this objective, we introduce a new selective convolutional (SeConv) block. SeConvNet is compared to state-of-the-art SAP denoising methods using extensive experiments on various common datasets. The results illustrate that the proposed SeConvNet model effectively restores images corrupted by SAP noise and surpasses all its counterparts at both quantitative criteria and visual effects, especially at high and very high noise densities.
summary: In recent years, there has been an unprecedented upsurge in applying deep learning approaches, specifically convolutional neural networks (CNNs), to solve image denoising problems, owing to their superior performance. However, CNNs mostly rely on Gaussian noise, and there is a conspicuous lack of exploiting CNNs for salt-and-pepper (SAP) noise reduction. In this paper, we proposed a deep CNN model, namely SeConvNet, to suppress SAP noise in gray-scale and color images. To meet this objective, we introduce a new selective convolutional (SeConv) block. SeConvNet is compared to state-of-the-art SAP denoising methods using extensive experiments on various common datasets. The results illustrate that the proposed SeConvNet model effectively restores images corrupted by SAP noise and surpasses all its counterparts at both quantitative criteria and visual effects, especially at high and very high noise densities.
abstract_zh: In recent years, there has been an unprecedented upsurge in applying deep learning approaches, specifically convolutional neural networks (CNNs), to solve image denoising problems, owing to their superior performance.然而，CNN 主要依赖于高斯噪声，并且利用 CNN 进行椒盐（SAP）降噪的研究明显不足。在本文中，我们提出了一种深度 CNN 模型，即 SeConvNet，用于抑制灰度和彩色图像中的 SAP 噪声。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了一种新的选择性卷积（SeConv）块。通过在各种常见数据集上进行大量实验，将 SeConvNet 与最先进的 SAP 去噪方法进行比较。 The results illustrate that the proposed SeConvNet model effectively restores images corrupted by SAP noise and surpasses all its counterparts at both quantitative criteria and visual effects, especially at high and very high noise densities.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于选择性卷积块的深度卷积神经网络（SeConvNet），用于去除灰度和彩色图像中的盐椒噪声。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在图像去噪中表现优异，但现有研究主要针对高斯噪声，而对盐椒噪声（SAP）的处理方法较少，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 设计新型选择性卷积块（SeConv），构建深度CNN模型SeConvNet，通过多数据集实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明SeConvNet在定量指标和视觉效果上均优于现有SAP去噪方法，尤其在高噪声密度场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: SeConvNet通过选择性卷积结构有效解决了盐椒噪声问题，在多种噪声密度下均优于现有方法。

authors_text: Ryan Gillard,Stephen Jonany,Yingjie Miao,Michael Munn,Connal de Souza,Jonathan Dungay,Chen Liang,David R. So,Quoc V. Le,Esteban Real
title: Unified Functional Hashing in Automatic Machine Learning
title_zh: 自动机器学习中的统一函数哈希
abstract: The field of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML) has recently attained impressive results, including the discovery of state-of-the-art machine learning solutions, such as neural image classifiers. This is often done by applying an evolutionary search method, which samples multiple candidate solutions from a large space and evaluates the quality of each candidate through a long training process. As a result, the search tends to be slow. In this paper, we show that large efficiency gains can be obtained by employing a fast unified functional hash, especially through the functional equivalence caching technique, which we also present. The central idea is to detect by hashing when the search method produces equivalent candidates, which occurs very frequently, and this way avoid their costly re-evaluation. Our hash is "functional" in that it identifies equivalent candidates even if they were represented or coded differently, and it is "unified" in that the same algorithm can hash arbitrary representations; e.g. compute graphs, imperative code, or lambda functions. As evidence, we show dramatic improvements on multiple AutoML domains, including neural architecture search and algorithm discovery. Finally, we consider the effect of hash collisions, evaluation noise, and search distribution through empirical analysis. Altogether, we hope this paper may serve as a guide to hashing techniques in AutoML.
summary: The field of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML) has recently attained impressive results, including the discovery of state-of-the-art machine learning solutions, such as neural image classifiers. This is often done by applying an evolutionary search method, which samples multiple candidate solutions from a large space and evaluates the quality of each candidate through a long training process. As a result, the search tends to be slow. In this paper, we show that large efficiency gains can be obtained by employing a fast unified functional hash, especially through the functional equivalence caching technique, which we also present. The central idea is to detect by hashing when the search method produces equivalent candidates, which occurs very frequently, and this way avoid their costly re-evaluation. Our hash is "functional" in that it identifies equivalent candidates even if they were represented or coded differently, and it is "unified" in that the same algorithm can hash arbitrary representations; e.g. compute graphs, imperative code, or lambda functions. As evidence, we show dramatic improvements on multiple AutoML domains, including neural architecture search and algorithm discovery. Finally, we consider the effect of hash collisions, evaluation noise, and search distribution through empirical analysis. Altogether, we hope this paper may serve as a guide to hashing techniques in AutoML.
abstract_zh: 自动机器学习 (AutoML) 领域最近取得了令人印象深刻的成果，包括发现最先进的机器学习解决方案，例如神经图像分类器。这通常是通过应用进化搜索方法来完成的，该方法从大空间中采样多个候选解决方案，并通过长时间的训练过程评估每个候选解决方案的质量。结果，搜索往往很慢。在本文中，我们表明，通过采用快速统一函数哈希，特别是通过我们也提出的函数等价缓存技术，可以获得巨大的效率增益。其中心思想是通过散列来检测搜索方法何时产生等效的候选者（这种情况非常频繁地发生），这样就避免了昂贵的重新评估。我们的散列是“功能性的”，因为它可以识别等效的候选者，即使它们的表示或编码不同，并且它是“统一的”，因为相同的算法可以对任意表示进行散列；例如计算图、命令式代码或 lambda 函数。作为证据，我们展示了多个 AutoML 领域的显着改进，包括神经架构搜索和算法发现。最后，我们通过实证分析考虑哈希冲突、评估噪声和搜索分布的影响。总而言之，我们希望本文可以作为 AutoML 中哈希技术的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的功能哈希方法，用于加速自动机器学习（AutoML）中的搜索过程。
AI.motivation: 当前AutoML方法通过进化搜索生成候选方案并进行训练评估，但此过程因重复评估等价候选方案而效率低下。
AI.method: 设计了一种统一功能哈希算法，通过功能等价缓存技术识别不同表示形式的等价候选方案，避免重复计算。
AI.result: 在神经架构搜索和算法发现等AutoML领域实现了显著效率提升，并通过实证分析验证了哈希冲突和噪声的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AutoML中的哈希技术提供了指导，通过功能哈希有效提升了搜索效率。

search_text: Unified Functional Hashing in Automatic Machine Learning 自动机器学习中的统一函数哈希 The field of Automatic Machine Learning (AutoML) has recently attained impressive results, including the discovery of state-of-the-art machine learning solutions, such as neural image classifiers. This is often done by applying an evolutionary search method, which samples multiple candidate solutions from a large space and evaluates the quality of each candidate through a long training process. As a result, the search tends to be slow. In this paper, we show that large efficiency gains can be obtained by employing a fast unified functional hash, especially through the functional equivalence caching technique, which we also present. The central idea is to detect by hashing when the search method produces equivalent candidates, which occurs very frequently, and this way avoid their costly re-evaluation. Our hash is "functional" in that it identifies equivalent candidates even if they were represented or coded differently, and it is "unified" in that the same algorithm can hash arbitrary representations; e.g. compute graphs, imperative code, or lambda functions. As evidence, we show dramatic improvements on multiple AutoML domains, including neural architecture search and algorithm discovery. Finally, we consider the effect of hash collisions, evaluation noise, and search distribution through empirical analysis. Altogether, we hope this paper may serve as a guide to hashing techniques in AutoML. 自动机器学习 (AutoML) 领域最近取得了令人印象深刻的成果，包括发现最先进的机器学习解决方案，例如神经图像分类器。这通常是通过应用进化搜索方法来完成的，该方法从大空间中采样多个候选解决方案，并通过长时间的训练过程评估每个候选解决方案的质量。结果，搜索往往很慢。在本文中，我们表明，通过采用快速统一函数哈希，特别是通过我们也提出的函数等价缓存技术，可以获得巨大的效率增益。其中心思想是通过散列来检测搜索方法何时产生等效的候选者（这种情况非常频繁地发生），这样就避免了昂贵的重新评估。我们的散列是“功能性的”，因为它可以识别等效的候选者，即使它们的表示或编码不同，并且它是“统一的”，因为相同的算法可以对任意表示进行散列；例如计算图、命令式代码或 lambda 函数。作为证据，我们展示了多个 AutoML 领域的显着改进，包括神经架构搜索和算法发现。最后，我们通过实证分析考虑哈希冲突、评估噪声和搜索分布的影响。总而言之，我们希望本文可以作为 AutoML 中哈希技术的指南。 本文提出了一种统一的功能哈希方法，用于加速自动机器学习（AutoML）中的搜索过程。 Ryan Gillard,Stephen Jonany,Yingjie Miao,Michael Munn,Connal de Souza,Jonathan Dungay,Chen Liang,David R. So,Quoc V. Le,Esteban Real cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Vatsal Raina,Nataliia Molchanova,Mara Graziani,Andrey Malinin,Henning Muller,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Mark Gales
title: Tackling Bias in the Dice Similarity Coefficient: Introducing nDSC for White Matter Lesion Segmentation
title_zh: 解决骰子相似系数中的偏差：引入 nDSC 进行白质病变分割
abstract: The development of automatic segmentation techniques for medical imaging tasks requires assessment metrics to fairly judge and rank such approaches on benchmarks. The Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) is a popular choice for comparing the agreement between the predicted segmentation against a ground-truth mask. However, the DSC metric has been shown to be biased to the occurrence rate of the positive class in the ground-truth, and hence should be considered in combination with other metrics. This work describes a detailed analysis of the recently proposed normalised Dice Similarity Coefficient (nDSC) for binary segmentation tasks as an adaptation of DSC which scales the precision at a fixed recall rate to tackle this bias. White matter lesion segmentation on magnetic resonance images of multiple sclerosis patients is selected as a case study task to empirically assess the suitability of nDSC. We validate the normalised DSC using two different models across 59 subject scans with a wide range of lesion loads. It is found that the nDSC is less biased than DSC with lesion load on standard white matter lesion segmentation benchmarks measured using standard rank correlation coefficients. An implementation of nDSC is made available at: https://github.com/NataliiaMolch/nDSC .
summary: The development of automatic segmentation techniques for medical imaging tasks requires assessment metrics to fairly judge and rank such approaches on benchmarks. The Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) is a popular choice for comparing the agreement between the predicted segmentation against a ground-truth mask. However, the DSC metric has been shown to be biased to the occurrence rate of the positive class in the ground-truth, and hence should be considered in combination with other metrics. This work describes a detailed analysis of the recently proposed normalised Dice Similarity Coefficient (nDSC) for binary segmentation tasks as an adaptation of DSC which scales the precision at a fixed recall rate to tackle this bias. White matter lesion segmentation on magnetic resonance images of multiple sclerosis patients is selected as a case study task to empirically assess the suitability of nDSC. We validate the normalised DSC using two different models across 59 subject scans with a wide range of lesion loads. It is found that the nDSC is less biased than DSC with lesion load on standard white matter lesion segmentation benchmarks measured using standard rank correlation coefficients. An implementation of nDSC is made available at: https://github.com/NataliiaMolch/nDSC .
abstract_zh: 用于医学成像任务的自动分割技术的发展需要评估指标来公平地判断和在基准上对这些方法进行排名。 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 是比较预测分割与真实掩模之间的一致性的常用选择。然而，DSC 指标已被证明偏向于真实情况中正类的出现率，因此应与其他指标结合考虑。这项工作描述了对最近提出的用于二元分割任务的归一化骰子相似系数（nDSC）的详细分析，作为 DSC 的适应，它以固定的召回率缩放精度来解决这种偏差。选择多发性硬化症患者磁共振图像上的白质病变分割作为案例研究任务，以实证评估 nDSC 的适用性。我们使用两种不同的模型在 59 次具有广泛病变负荷的受试者扫描中验证标准化 DSC。研究发现，在使用标准秩相关系数测量的标准白质病变分割基准上，nDSC 的偏差小于 DSC 的偏差。 nDSC 的实现位于：https://github.com/NataliiaMolch/nDSC。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决Dice相似性系数（DSC）在白质病变分割中的偏差问题，提出归一化Dice相似性系数（nDSC）以提高评估的公平性。
AI.motivation: 传统DSC指标在评估白质病变分割时易受病变负荷（正类出现率）影响，导致评估结果失真，需引入更公平的评估方法。
AI.method: 通过调整DSC的计算方式，使精确率在固定召回率下进行归一化（nDSC），并在多发性硬化患者MRI数据集上使用两种模型验证其有效性。
AI.result: nDSC在标准基准测试中比传统DSC更少受病变负荷影响，且通过秩相关系数验证了其评估稳定性。
AI.conclusion: nDSC有效缓解了DSC的偏差问题，为白质病变分割任务提供了更可靠且公平的评估指标。

authors_text: Erdi Kara,George Zhang,Joseph J. Williams,Gonzalo Ferrandez-Quinto,Leviticus J. Rhoden,Maximilian Kim,J. Nathan Kutz,Aminur Rahman
title: Deep Learning Based Object Tracking in Walking Droplet and Granular Intruder Experiments
title_zh: 行走水滴和颗粒入侵者实验中基于深度学习的对象跟踪
comment: ef:Journal of Real-Time Image Processing, Vol. 20, Art. No. 86, 2023
comments: ef:Journal of Real-Time Image Processing, Vol. 20, Art. No. 86, 2023
abstract: We present a deep-learning based tracking objects of interest in walking droplet and granular intruder experiments. In a typical walking droplet experiment, a liquid droplet, known as \textit{walker}, propels itself laterally on the free surface of a vibrating bath of the same liquid. This motion is the result of the interaction between the droplets and the surface waves generated by the droplet itself after each successive bounce. A walker can exhibit a highly irregular trajectory over the course of its motion, including rapid acceleration and complex interactions with the other walkers present in the same bath. In analogy with the hydrodynamic experiments, the granular matter experiments consist of a vibrating bath of very small solid particles and a larger solid \textit{intruder}. Like the fluid droplets, the intruder interacts with and travels the domain due to the waves of the bath but tends to move much slower and much less smoothly than the droplets. When multiple intruders are introduced, they also exhibit complex interactions with each other. We leverage the state-of-art object detection model YOLO and the Hungarian Algorithm to accurately extract the trajectory of a walker or intruder in real-time. Our proposed methodology is capable of tracking individual walker(s) or intruder(s) in digital images acquired from a broad spectrum of experimental settings and does not suffer from any identity-switch issues. Thus, the deep learning approach developed in this work could be used to automatize the efficient, fast and accurate extraction of observables of interests in walking droplet and granular flow experiments. Such extraction capabilities are critically enabling for downstream tasks such as building data-driven dynamical models for the coarse-grained dynamics and interactions of the objects of interest.
summary: We present a deep-learning based tracking objects of interest in walking droplet and granular intruder experiments. In a typical walking droplet experiment, a liquid droplet, known as \textit{walker}, propels itself laterally on the free surface of a vibrating bath of the same liquid. This motion is the result of the interaction between the droplets and the surface waves generated by the droplet itself after each successive bounce. A walker can exhibit a highly irregular trajectory over the course of its motion, including rapid acceleration and complex interactions with the other walkers present in the same bath. In analogy with the hydrodynamic experiments, the granular matter experiments consist of a vibrating bath of very small solid particles and a larger solid \textit{intruder}. Like the fluid droplets, the intruder interacts with and travels the domain due to the waves of the bath but tends to move much slower and much less smoothly than the droplets. When multiple intruders are introduced, they also exhibit complex interactions with each other. We leverage the state-of-art object detection model YOLO and the Hungarian Algorithm to accurately extract the trajectory of a walker or intruder in real-time. Our proposed methodology is capable of tracking individual walker(s) or intruder(s) in digital images acquired from a broad spectrum of experimental settings and does not suffer from any identity-switch issues. Thus, the deep learning approach developed in this work could be used to automatize the efficient, fast and accurate extraction of observables of interests in walking droplet and granular flow experiments. Such extraction capabilities are critically enabling for downstream tasks such as building data-driven dynamical models for the coarse-grained dynamics and interactions of the objects of interest.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的步行液滴和颗粒入侵者实验中感兴趣的跟踪对象。在典型的行走液滴实验中，称为 \textit{walker} 的液滴在相同液体的振动浴的自由表面上横向推动自身。这种运动是液滴与每次连续弹跳后液滴本身产生的表面波之间相互作用的结果。步行者在其运动过程中可以表现出高度不规则的轨迹，包括快速加速以及与同一浴中的其他步行者的复杂相互作用。与流体动力学实验类似，颗粒物质实验由非常小的固体颗粒的振动浴和较大的固体 \textit{intruder} 组成。与液滴一样，入侵者由于浴的波浪而与域相互作用并在域中行进，但往往比液滴移动得慢得多且不太顺利。当引入多个入侵者时，它们之间也会表现出复杂的相互作用。我们利用最先进的对象检测模型 YOLO 和匈牙利算法来准确地实时提取步行者或入侵者的轨迹。我们提出的方法能够在从广泛的实验设置中获取的数字图像中跟踪单个步行者或入侵者，并且不会遇到任何身份转换问题。因此，这项工作中开发的深度学习方法可用于自动高效、快速和准确地提取行走液滴和颗粒流实验中感兴趣的可观察量。这种提取功能对于下游任务至关重要，例如为感兴趣对象的粗粒度动态和交互构建数据驱动的动态模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的实时跟踪方法，用于行走液滴和颗粒侵入者实验中的目标轨迹提取。
AI.motivation: 行走液滴和颗粒侵入者实验中目标运动轨迹复杂且交互频繁，传统方法难以高效准确提取关键观测数据。
AI.method: 结合YOLO目标检测模型与匈牙利算法，实现多目标实时跟踪，避免身份切换问题。

search_text: Deep Learning Based Object Tracking in Walking Droplet and Granular Intruder Experiments 行走水滴和颗粒入侵者实验中基于深度学习的对象跟踪 We present a deep-learning based tracking objects of interest in walking droplet and granular intruder experiments. In a typical walking droplet experiment, a liquid droplet, known as \textit{walker}, propels itself laterally on the free surface of a vibrating bath of the same liquid. This motion is the result of the interaction between the droplets and the surface waves generated by the droplet itself after each successive bounce. A walker can exhibit a highly irregular trajectory over the course of its motion, including rapid acceleration and complex interactions with the other walkers present in the same bath. In analogy with the hydrodynamic experiments, the granular matter experiments consist of a vibrating bath of very small solid particles and a larger solid \textit{intruder}. Like the fluid droplets, the intruder interacts with and travels the domain due to the waves of the bath but tends to move much slower and much less smoothly than the droplets. When multiple intruders are introduced, they also exhibit complex interactions with each other. We leverage the state-of-art object detection model YOLO and the Hungarian Algorithm to accurately extract the trajectory of a walker or intruder in real-time. Our proposed methodology is capable of tracking individual walker(s) or intruder(s) in digital images acquired from a broad spectrum of experimental settings and does not suffer from any identity-switch issues. Thus, the deep learning approach developed in this work could be used to automatize the efficient, fast and accurate extraction of observables of interests in walking droplet and granular flow experiments. Such extraction capabilities are critically enabling for downstream tasks such as building data-driven dynamical models for the coarse-grained dynamics and interactions of the objects of interest. 我们提出了一种基于深度学习的步行液滴和颗粒入侵者实验中感兴趣的跟踪对象。在典型的行走液滴实验中，称为 \textit{walker} 的液滴在相同液体的振动浴的自由表面上横向推动自身。这种运动是液滴与每次连续弹跳后液滴本身产生的表面波之间相互作用的结果。步行者在其运动过程中可以表现出高度不规则的轨迹，包括快速加速以及与同一浴中的其他步行者的复杂相互作用。与流体动力学实验类似，颗粒物质实验由非常小的固体颗粒的振动浴和较大的固体 \textit{intruder} 组成。与液滴一样，入侵者由于浴的波浪而与域相互作用并在域中行进，但往往比液滴移动得慢得多且不太顺利。当引入多个入侵者时，它们之间也会表现出复杂的相互作用。我们利用最先进的对象检测模型 YOLO 和匈牙利算法来准确地实时提取步行者或入侵者的轨迹。我们提出的方法能够在从广泛的实验设置中获取的数字图像中跟踪单个步行者或入侵者，并且不会遇到任何身份转换问题。因此，这项工作中开发的深度学习方法可用于自动高效、快速和准确地提取行走液滴和颗粒流实验中感兴趣的可观察量。这种提取功能对于下游任务至关重要，例如为感兴趣对象的粗粒度动态和交互构建数据驱动的动态模型。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的实时跟踪方法，用于行走液滴和颗粒侵入者实验中的目标轨迹提取。 Erdi Kara,George Zhang,Joseph J. Williams,Gonzalo Ferrandez-Quinto,Leviticus J. Rhoden,Maximilian Kim,J. Nathan Kutz,Aminur Rahman cs.CV

title: ACE, a generic constraint solver
title_zh: ACE，通用约束求解器
abstract: Constraint Programming (CP) is a useful technology for modeling and solving combinatorial constrained problems. On the one hand, on can use a library like PyCSP3 for easily modeling problems arising in various application fields (e.g., scheduling, planning, data-mining, cryptography, bio-informatics, organic chemistry, etc.). Problem instances can then be directly generated from specific models and data. On the other hand, for solving instances (notably, represented in XCSP3 format), one can use a constraint solver like ACE, which is presented in this paper. ACE is an open-source constraint solver, developed in Java, which focuses on integer variables (including 0/1-Boolean variables), state-of-the-art table constraints, popular global constraints, search heuristics and (mono-criterion) optimization.
summary: Constraint Programming (CP) is a useful technology for modeling and solving combinatorial constrained problems. On the one hand, on can use a library like PyCSP3 for easily modeling problems arising in various application fields (e.g., scheduling, planning, data-mining, cryptography, bio-informatics, organic chemistry, etc.). Problem instances can then be directly generated from specific models and data. On the other hand, for solving instances (notably, represented in XCSP3 format), one can use a constraint solver like ACE, which is presented in this paper. ACE is an open-source constraint solver, developed in Java, which focuses on integer variables (including 0/1-Boolean variables), state-of-the-art table constraints, popular global constraints, search heuristics and (mono-criterion) optimization.
abstract_zh: 约束编程 (CP) 是一种用于建模和解决组合约束问题的有用技术。一方面，可以使用像 PyCSP3 这样的库来轻松建模各种应用领域（例如调度、规划、数据挖掘、密码学、生物信息学、有机化学等）中出现的问题。然后可以从特定模型和数据直接生成问题实例。另一方面，为了求解实例（特别是以 XCSP3 格式表示），可以使用约束求解器，如本文中介绍的 ACE。 ACE 是一个用 Java 开发的开源约束求解器，专注于整数变量（包括 0/1 布尔变量）、最先进的表约束、流行的全局约束、搜索启发式和（单一标准）优化。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为ACE的开源约束求解器，用于解决包含整数变量和多种约束类型的组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在如PyCSP3等建模工具，但缺乏高效的通用约束求解器来处理XCSP3格式的问题实例，需开发专门求解工具以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 基于Java开发ACE求解器，支持整数变量、表格约束、全局约束、搜索启发式算法及单目标优化技术。
AI.result: ACE作为通用约束求解器，能够有效处理多种应用场景下的组合约束问题，并支持XCSP3格式的标准化输入。
AI.conclusion: ACE为解决复杂约束问题提供了高效工具，其模块化设计和对主流约束类型的支持使其适用于广泛的应用领域。

authors_text: Pedro Sarmento,Adarsh Kumar,Yu-Hua Chen,CJ Carr,Zack Zukowski,Mathieu Barthet
title: GTR-CTRL: Instrument and Genre Conditioning for Guitar-Focused Music Generation with Transformers
title_zh: GTR-CTRL：使用 Transformers 调节以吉他为中心的音乐生成的乐器和流派调节
comment: This preprint is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). The Version of Record of this contribution is published in Proceedings of EvoMUSART: International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) 2023
comments: This preprint is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). The Version of Record of this contribution is published in Proceedings of EvoMUSART: International Conference on Computational Intelligence in Music, Sound, Art and Design (Part of EvoStar) 2023
abstract: Recently, symbolic music generation with deep learning techniques has witnessed steady improvements. Most works on this topic focus on MIDI representations, but less attention has been paid to symbolic music generation using guitar tablatures (tabs) which can be used to encode multiple instruments. Tabs include information on expressive techniques and fingerings for fretted string instruments in addition to rhythm and pitch. In this work, we use the DadaGP dataset for guitar tab music generation, a corpus of over 26k songs in GuitarPro and token formats. We introduce methods to condition a Transformer-XL deep learning model to generate guitar tabs (GTR-CTRL) based on desired instrumentation (inst-CTRL) and genre (genre-CTRL). Special control tokens are appended at the beginning of each song in the training corpus. We assess the performance of the model with and without conditioning. We propose instrument presence metrics to assess the inst-CTRL model's response to a given instrumentation prompt. We trained a BERT model for downstream genre classification and used it to assess the results obtained with the genre-CTRL model. Statistical analyses evidence significant differences between the conditioned and unconditioned models. Overall, results indicate that the GTR-CTRL methods provide more flexibility and control for guitar-focused symbolic music generation than an unconditioned model.
summary: Recently, symbolic music generation with deep learning techniques has witnessed steady improvements. Most works on this topic focus on MIDI representations, but less attention has been paid to symbolic music generation using guitar tablatures (tabs) which can be used to encode multiple instruments. Tabs include information on expressive techniques and fingerings for fretted string instruments in addition to rhythm and pitch. In this work, we use the DadaGP dataset for guitar tab music generation, a corpus of over 26k songs in GuitarPro and token formats. We introduce methods to condition a Transformer-XL deep learning model to generate guitar tabs (GTR-CTRL) based on desired instrumentation (inst-CTRL) and genre (genre-CTRL). Special control tokens are appended at the beginning of each song in the training corpus. We assess the performance of the model with and without conditioning. We propose instrument presence metrics to assess the inst-CTRL model's response to a given instrumentation prompt. We trained a BERT model for downstream genre classification and used it to assess the results obtained with the genre-CTRL model. Statistical analyses evidence significant differences between the conditioned and unconditioned models. Overall, results indicate that the GTR-CTRL methods provide more flexibility and control for guitar-focused symbolic music generation than an unconditioned model.
abstract_zh: Recently, symbolic music generation with deep learning techniques has witnessed steady improvements.关于这个主题的大多数作品都集中在 MIDI 表示上，但很少关注使用可用于对多种乐器进行编码的吉他指法谱（标签）的符号音乐生成。 Tabs include information on expressive techniques and fingerings for fretted string instruments in addition to rhythm and pitch. In this work, we use the DadaGP dataset for guitar tab music generation, a corpus of over 26k songs in GuitarPro and token formats.我们介绍了调节 Transformer-XL 深度学习模型的方法，以根据所需的乐器 (inst-CTRL) 和流派 (genre-CTRL) 生成吉他谱 (GTR-CTRL)。 Special control tokens are appended at the beginning of each song in the training corpus. We assess the performance of the model with and without conditioning. We propose instrument presence metrics to assess the inst-CTRL model's response to a given instrumentation prompt. We trained a BERT model for downstream genre classification and used it to assess the results obtained with the genre-CTRL model. Statistical analyses evidence significant differences between the conditioned and unconditioned models.总体而言，结果表明，与无条件模型相比，GTR-CTRL 方法为以吉他为中心的符号音乐生成提供了更大的灵活性和控制力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Transformer的GTR-CTRL模型，通过乐器和流派条件控制生成吉他谱符号音乐。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多聚焦MIDI音乐生成，而吉他谱（tabs）能编码多乐器信息与演奏技巧，但相关研究不足。
AI.method: 使用DadaGP数据集训练Transformer-XL模型，在输入中添加控制标记实现乐器（inst-CTRL）和流派（genre-CTRL）条件控制，并用BERT模型评估流派分类效果。
AI.result: 条件模型在乐器存在度和流派分类上显著优于无条件模型，证明GTR-CTRL能有效提升生成控制精度。
AI.conclusion: GTR-CTRL方法为吉他符号音乐生成提供了更灵活的多条件控制框架，验证了条件生成在音乐创作中的有效性。

We trained a BERT model for downstream genre classification and used it to assess the results obtained with the genre-CTRL model. Statistical analyses evidence significant differences between the conditioned and unconditioned models.总体而言，结果表明，与无条件模型相比，GTR-CTRL 方法为以吉他为中心的符号音乐生成提供了更大的灵活性和控制力。 本文提出基于Transformer的GTR-CTRL模型，通过乐器和流派条件控制生成吉他谱符号音乐。 Pedro Sarmento,Adarsh Kumar,Yu-Hua Chen,CJ Carr,Zack Zukowski,Mathieu Barthet cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.MM,eess.AS

title: A function space perspective on stochastic shape evolution
title_zh: 随机形状演化的函数空间视角
abstract: Modelling randomness in shape data, for example, the evolution of shapes of organisms in biology, requires stochastic models of shapes. This paper presents a new stochastic shape model based on a description of shapes as functions in a Sobolev space. Using an explicit orthonormal basis as a reference frame for the noise, the model is independent of the parameterisation of the mesh. We define the stochastic model, explore its properties, and illustrate examples of stochastic shape evolutions using the resulting numerical framework.
summary: Modelling randomness in shape data, for example, the evolution of shapes of organisms in biology, requires stochastic models of shapes. This paper presents a new stochastic shape model based on a description of shapes as functions in a Sobolev space. Using an explicit orthonormal basis as a reference frame for the noise, the model is independent of the parameterisation of the mesh. We define the stochastic model, explore its properties, and illustrate examples of stochastic shape evolutions using the resulting numerical framework.
abstract_zh: 对形状数据中的随机性进行建模，例如生物学中生物体形状的演化，需要形状的随机模型。本文提出了一种新的随机形状模型，该模型基于将形状描述为索博列夫空间中的函数。使用显式正交基作为噪声的参考系，该模型独立于网格的参数化。我们定义随机模型，探索其属性，并使用所得的数值框架说明随机形状演化的示例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Sobolev空间函数描述的随机形状模型，用于生物等领域的形状演化分析。
AI.motivation: 现有形状模型常依赖网格参数化，难以有效捕捉生物形状演化的随机性特征。
AI.method: 将形状表示为Sobolev空间中的函数，构建显式正交基作为噪声参考框架，实现参数化无关的随机形状建模。
AI.result: 定义了新模型并验证其性质，通过数值框架展示了生物形状演化的随机过程实例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为形状数据分析提供了新的函数空间视角，适用于生物学等领域的随机演化建模。

title: On the Interventional Kullback-Leibler Divergence
title_zh: 关于介入性 Kullback-Leibler 分歧
abstract: Modern machine learning approaches excel in static settings where a large amount of i.i.d. training data are available for a given task. In a dynamic environment, though, an intelligent agent needs to be able to transfer knowledge and re-use learned components across domains. It has been argued that this may be possible through causal models, aiming to mirror the modularity of the real world in terms of independent causal mechanisms. However, the true causal structure underlying a given set of data is generally not identifiable, so it is desirable to have means to quantify differences between models (e.g., between the ground truth and an estimate), on both the observational and interventional level. In the present work, we introduce the Interventional Kullback-Leibler (IKL) divergence to quantify both structural and distributional differences between models based on a finite set of multi-environment distributions generated by interventions from the ground truth. Since we generally cannot quantify all differences between causal models for every finite set of interventional distributions, we propose a sufficient condition on the intervention targets to identify subsets of observed variables on which the models provably agree or disagree.
summary: Modern machine learning approaches excel in static settings where a large amount of i.i.d. training data are available for a given task. In a dynamic environment, though, an intelligent agent needs to be able to transfer knowledge and re-use learned components across domains. It has been argued that this may be possible through causal models, aiming to mirror the modularity of the real world in terms of independent causal mechanisms. However, the true causal structure underlying a given set of data is generally not identifiable, so it is desirable to have means to quantify differences between models (e.g., between the ground truth and an estimate), on both the observational and interventional level. In the present work, we introduce the Interventional Kullback-Leibler (IKL) divergence to quantify both structural and distributional differences between models based on a finite set of multi-environment distributions generated by interventions from the ground truth. Since we generally cannot quantify all differences between causal models for every finite set of interventional distributions, we propose a sufficient condition on the intervention targets to identify subsets of observed variables on which the models provably agree or disagree.
abstract_zh: 现代机器学习方法在静态设置中表现出色，其中大量独立同分布。训练数据可用于给定任务。然而，在动态环境中，智能代理需要能够跨领域传输知识并重用学到的组件。有人认为，这可能通过因果模型来实现，旨在通过独立的因果机制来反映现实世界的模块化。然而，给定数据集背后的真实因果结构通常是不可识别的，因此需要有方法在观察和干预层面上量化模型之间的差异（例如，真实情况与估计之间的差异）。在目前的工作中，我们引入了干预性 Kullback-Leibler (IKL) 散度，以量化基于由地面实况干预生成的有限多环境分布集的模型之间的结构和分布差异。由于我们通常无法量化每个有限干预分布集的因果模型之间的所有差异，因此我们提出了干预目标的充分条件，以识别模型可证明同意或不同意的观察变量子集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的干预性Kullback-Leibler（IKL）散度，用于量化因果模型在观测和干预层面的结构与分布差异。
AI.motivation: 现代机器学习在静态i.i.d.数据下表现优异，但动态环境中需跨领域迁移知识，而因果模型的真因果结构通常不可识别，需量化模型差异。
AI.method: 基于有限多环境干预分布，引入IKL散度，并提出干预目标的充分条件以识别模型在观测变量子集上的分歧或一致。
AI.result: 通过干预分布生成IKL散度，可有效量化因果模型差异，并确定模型在特定变量子集上的分歧范围。
AI.conclusion: IKL散度为动态环境下的因果模型比较提供了理论工具，有助于提升跨领域知识迁移的可靠性。

authors_text: Andrea Maracani,Raffaello Camoriano,Elisa Maiettini,Davide Talon,Lorenzo Rosasco,Lorenzo Natale
title: Key Design Choices for Double-Transfer in Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无源无监督域适应中双迁移的关键设计选择
abstract: Fine-tuning and Domain Adaptation emerged as effective strategies for efficiently transferring deep learning models to new target tasks. However, target domain labels are not accessible in many real-world scenarios. This led to the development of Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods, which only employ unlabeled target samples. Furthermore, efficiency and privacy requirements may also prevent the use of source domain data during the adaptation stage. This challenging setting, known as Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), is gaining interest among researchers and practitioners due to its potential for real-world applications. In this paper, we provide the first in-depth analysis of the main design choices in SF-UDA through a large-scale empirical study across 500 models and 74 domain pairs. We pinpoint the normalization approach, pre-training strategy, and backbone architecture as the most critical factors. Based on our quantitative findings, we propose recipes to best tackle SF-UDA scenarios. Moreover, we show that SF-UDA is competitive also beyond standard benchmarks and backbone architectures, performing on par with UDA at a fraction of the data and computational cost. In the interest of reproducibility, we include the full experimental results and code as supplementary material.
summary: Fine-tuning and Domain Adaptation emerged as effective strategies for efficiently transferring deep learning models to new target tasks. However, target domain labels are not accessible in many real-world scenarios. This led to the development of Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods, which only employ unlabeled target samples. Furthermore, efficiency and privacy requirements may also prevent the use of source domain data during the adaptation stage. This challenging setting, known as Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), is gaining interest among researchers and practitioners due to its potential for real-world applications. In this paper, we provide the first in-depth analysis of the main design choices in SF-UDA through a large-scale empirical study across 500 models and 74 domain pairs. We pinpoint the normalization approach, pre-training strategy, and backbone architecture as the most critical factors. Based on our quantitative findings, we propose recipes to best tackle SF-UDA scenarios. Moreover, we show that SF-UDA is competitive also beyond standard benchmarks and backbone architectures, performing on par with UDA at a fraction of the data and computational cost. In the interest of reproducibility, we include the full experimental results and code as supplementary material.
abstract_zh: 微调和领域适应成为将深度学习模型有效转移到新目标任务的有效策略。然而，在许多现实场景中，目标域标签是不可访问的。这导致了无监督域适应（UDA）方法的发展，该方法仅采用未标记的目标样本。此外，效率和隐私要求也可能阻止在适应阶段使用源域数据。这种具有挑战性的设置被称为无源无监督域适应（SF-UDA），由于其在实际应用中的潜力而引起了研究人员和从业者的兴趣。在本文中，我们通过跨 500 个模型和 74 个领域对的大规模实证研究，首次对 SF-UDA 中的主要设计选择进行了深入分析。我们将标准化方法、预训练策略和主干架构确定为最关键的因素。根据我们的定量发现，我们提出了解决 SF-UDA 场景的最佳方案。此外，我们表明 SF-UDA 还具有超越标准基准和骨干架构的竞争力，其性能与 UDA 相当，而数据和计算成本仅为 UDA 的一小部分。为了再现性，我们提供了完整的实验结果和代码作为补充材料。

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模实证研究分析了源自由无监督域适应（SF-UDA）中的关键设计选择，提出了优化策略并验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景中，目标域标签不可获取且源域数据受效率和隐私限制，传统域适应方法难以适用，亟需研究SF-UDA的有效设计框架。
AI.method: 通过500个模型和74个域对的大规模实验，系统评估归一化方法、预训练策略和主干网络架构等关键因素，提出针对性优化方案。
AI.result: 发现归一化方法等三个因素最为关键，SF-UDA在标准基准和主流架构上表现与UDA相当，且数据和计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: SF-UDA可通过优化设计实现高效域适应，研究为实际应用提供了可复现的指导方案和实现代码。

search_text: Key Design Choices for Double-Transfer in Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 无源无监督域适应中双迁移的关键设计选择 Fine-tuning and Domain Adaptation emerged as effective strategies for efficiently transferring deep learning models to new target tasks. However, target domain labels are not accessible in many real-world scenarios. This led to the development of Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) methods, which only employ unlabeled target samples. Furthermore, efficiency and privacy requirements may also prevent the use of source domain data during the adaptation stage. This challenging setting, known as Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA), is gaining interest among researchers and practitioners due to its potential for real-world applications. In this paper, we provide the first in-depth analysis of the main design choices in SF-UDA through a large-scale empirical study across 500 models and 74 domain pairs. We pinpoint the normalization approach, pre-training strategy, and backbone architecture as the most critical factors. Based on our quantitative findings, we propose recipes to best tackle SF-UDA scenarios. Moreover, we show that SF-UDA is competitive also beyond standard benchmarks and backbone architectures, performing on par with UDA at a fraction of the data and computational cost. In the interest of reproducibility, we include the full experimental results and code as supplementary material. 微调和领域适应成为将深度学习模型有效转移到新目标任务的有效策略。然而，在许多现实场景中，目标域标签是不可访问的。这导致了无监督域适应（UDA）方法的发展，该方法仅采用未标记的目标样本。此外，效率和隐私要求也可能阻止在适应阶段使用源域数据。这种具有挑战性的设置被称为无源无监督域适应（SF-UDA），由于其在实际应用中的潜力而引起了研究人员和从业者的兴趣。在本文中，我们通过跨 500 个模型和 74 个领域对的大规模实证研究，首次对 SF-UDA 中的主要设计选择进行了深入分析。我们将标准化方法、预训练策略和主干架构确定为最关键的因素。根据我们的定量发现，我们提出了解决 SF-UDA 场景的最佳方案。此外，我们表明 SF-UDA 还具有超越标准基准和骨干架构的竞争力，其性能与 UDA 相当，而数据和计算成本仅为 UDA 的一小部分。为了再现性，我们提供了完整的实验结果和代码作为补充材料。 本文通过大规模实证研究分析了源自由无监督域适应（SF-UDA）中的关键设计选择，提出了优化策略并验证了其有效性。 Andrea Maracani,Raffaello Camoriano,Elisa Maiettini,Davide Talon,Lorenzo Rosasco,Lorenzo Natale cs.LG,cs.CV

title: LCDnet: A Lightweight Crowd Density Estimation Model for Real-time Video Surveillance
title_zh: LCDnet：用于实时视频监控的轻量级人群密度估计模型
abstract: Automatic crowd counting using density estimation has gained significant attention in computer vision research. As a result, a large number of crowd counting and density estimation models using convolution neural networks (CNN) have been published in the last few years. These models have achieved good accuracy over benchmark datasets. However, attempts to improve the accuracy often lead to higher complexity in these models. In real-time video surveillance applications using drones with limited computing resources, deep models incur intolerable higher inference delay. In this paper, we propose (i) a Lightweight Crowd Density estimation model (LCDnet) for real-time video surveillance, and (ii) an improved training method using curriculum learning (CL). LCDnet is trained using CL and evaluated over two benchmark datasets i.e., DroneRGBT and CARPK. Results are compared with existing crowd models. Our evaluation shows that the LCDnet achieves a reasonably good accuracy while significantly reducing the inference time and memory requirement and thus can be deployed over edge devices with very limited computing resources.
summary: Automatic crowd counting using density estimation has gained significant attention in computer vision research. As a result, a large number of crowd counting and density estimation models using convolution neural networks (CNN) have been published in the last few years. These models have achieved good accuracy over benchmark datasets. However, attempts to improve the accuracy often lead to higher complexity in these models. In real-time video surveillance applications using drones with limited computing resources, deep models incur intolerable higher inference delay. In this paper, we propose (i) a Lightweight Crowd Density estimation model (LCDnet) for real-time video surveillance, and (ii) an improved training method using curriculum learning (CL). LCDnet is trained using CL and evaluated over two benchmark datasets i.e., DroneRGBT and CARPK. Results are compared with existing crowd models. Our evaluation shows that the LCDnet achieves a reasonably good accuracy while significantly reducing the inference time and memory requirement and thus can be deployed over edge devices with very limited computing resources.
abstract_zh: 使用密度估计的自动人群计数在计算机视觉研究中引起了极大的关注。因此，在过去几年中已经发表了大量使用卷积神经网络（CNN）的人群计数和密度估计模型。这些模型在基准数据集上取得了良好的准确性。然而，提高准确性的尝试通常会导致这些模型的复杂性更高。在使用计算资源有限的无人机的实时视频监控应用中，深度模型会产生难以忍受的较高推理延迟。在本文中，我们提出（i）用于实时视频监控的轻量级人群密度估计模型（LCDnet），以及（ii）使用课程学习（CL）的改进训练方法。 LCDnet 使用 CL 进行训练，并在两个基准数据集（即 DroneRGBT 和 CARPK）上进行评估。结果与现有的人群模型进行了比较。我们的评估表明，LCDnet 实现了相当好的精度，同时显着减少了推理时间和内存需求，因此可以部署在计算资源非常有限的边缘设备上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级的实时视频监控人群密度估计模型LCDnet。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型在提升精度时复杂度增加，导致在计算资源有限的无人机等边缘设备上推理延迟过高。
AI.method: 设计轻量级CNN架构LCDnet，并结合课程学习（Curriculum Learning）改进训练方法。
AI.result: 在DroneRGBT和CARPK数据集上验证，LCDnet在保持合理精度的同时显著降低推理时间和内存需求。
AI.conclusion: LCDnet适合部署在计算资源受限的边缘设备，满足实时视频监控需求。

title: Interactive Context-Preserving Color Highlighting for Multiclass Scatterplots
title_zh: 多类散点图的交互式上下文保留颜色突出显示
comment: To appear in CHI'23: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: To appear in CHI'23: ACM Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Color is one of the main visual channels used for highlighting elements of interest in visualization. However, in multi-class scatterplots, color highlighting often comes at the expense of degraded color discriminability. In this paper, we argue for context-preserving highlighting during the interactive exploration of multi-class scatterplots to achieve desired pop-out effects, while maintaining good perceptual separability among all classes and consistent color mapping schemes under varying points of interest. We do this by first generating two contrastive color mapping schemes with large and small contrasts to the background. Both schemes maintain good perceptual separability among all classes and ensure that when colors from the two palettes are assigned to the same class, they have a high color consistency in color names. We then interactively combine these two schemes to create a dynamic color mapping for highlighting different points of interest. We demonstrate the effectiveness through crowd-sourced experiments and case studies.
summary: Color is one of the main visual channels used for highlighting elements of interest in visualization. However, in multi-class scatterplots, color highlighting often comes at the expense of degraded color discriminability. In this paper, we argue for context-preserving highlighting during the interactive exploration of multi-class scatterplots to achieve desired pop-out effects, while maintaining good perceptual separability among all classes and consistent color mapping schemes under varying points of interest. We do this by first generating two contrastive color mapping schemes with large and small contrasts to the background. Both schemes maintain good perceptual separability among all classes and ensure that when colors from the two palettes are assigned to the same class, they have a high color consistency in color names. We then interactively combine these two schemes to create a dynamic color mapping for highlighting different points of interest. We demonstrate the effectiveness through crowd-sourced experiments and case studies.
abstract_zh: 颜色是用于突出可视化中感兴趣的元素的主要视觉通道之一。然而，在多类散点图中，颜色突出显示通常会以降低颜色辨别力为代价。在本文中，我们主张在多类散点图的交互式探索过程中保留上下文突出显示，以实现所需的弹出效果，同时在不同兴趣点下保持所有类之间良好的感知可分离性和一致的颜色映射方案。为此，我们首先生成两种对比色映射方案，与背景的对比度有大有小。两种方案都在所有类别之间保持了良好的感知可分离性，并确保当两个调色板中的颜色分配给同一类别时，它们在颜色名称上具有较高的颜色一致性。然后，我们以交互方式结合这两种方案来创建动态颜色映射，以突出显示不同的兴趣点。我们通过众包实验和案例研究证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在多类散点图中进行交互式上下文保留的颜色突出显示方法，以在保持类间感知可区分性和颜色映射一致性的同时实现有效的突出效果。
AI.motivation: 在多类散点图中，传统颜色突出显示方法会导致类间颜色可区分性下降，且难以在不同兴趣点间保持一致的颜色映射方案。
AI.method: 生成两种对比色映射方案（高对比度和低对比度），确保同类颜色名称一致性，并通过交互组合两种方案实现动态颜色映射。
AI.result: 通过众包实验和案例研究验证了该方法在提升突出效果的同时有效保持了类间可区分性和颜色映射一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为多类散点图的交互式探索提供了兼顾突出效果与感知分离性的颜色映射解决方案。

title: Online Algorithms with Randomly Infused Advice
title_zh: 带有随机注入建议的在线算法
comment: Appeared at ESA 2023. This version includes an elaborated discussion on online algorithms that access past coin tosses
comments: Appeared at ESA 2023. This version includes an elaborated discussion on online algorithms that access past coin tosses
abstract: We introduce a novel method for the rigorous quantitative evaluation of online algorithms that relaxes the "radical worst-case" perspective of classic competitive analysis. In contrast to prior work, our method, referred to as randomly infused advice (RIA), does not make any probabilistic assumptions about the input sequence and does not rely on the development of designated online algorithms. Rather, it can be applied to existing online randomized algorithms, introducing a means to evaluate their performance in scenarios that lie outside the radical worst-case regime. More concretely, an online algorithm ALG with RIA benefits from pieces of advice generated by an omniscient but not entirely reliable oracle. The crux of the new method is that the advice is provided to ALG by writing it into the buffer B from which ALG normally reads its random bits, hence allowing us to augment it through a very simple and non-intrusive interface. The (un)reliability of the oracle is captured via a parameter 0 {\le} α {\le} 1 that determines the probability (per round) that the advice is successfully infused by the oracle; if the advice is not infused, which occurs with probability 1 - α, then the buffer B contains fresh random bits (as in the classic online setting). The applicability of the new RIA method is demonstrated by applying it to three extensively studied online problems: paging, uniform metrical task systems, and online set cover. For these problems, we establish new upper bounds on the competitive ratio of classic online algorithms that improve as the infusion parameter α increases. These are complemented with (often tight) lower bounds on the competitive ratio of online algorithms with RIA for the three problems.

More concretely, an online algorithm ALG with RIA benefits from pieces of advice generated by an omniscient but not entirely reliable oracle. The crux of the new method is that the advice is provided to ALG by writing it into the buffer B from which ALG normally reads its random bits, hence allowing us to augment it through a very simple and non-intrusive interface. The (un)reliability of the oracle is captured via a parameter 0 {\le} α {\le} 1 that determines the probability (per round) that the advice is successfully infused by the oracle; if the advice is not infused, which occurs with probability 1 - α, then the buffer B contains fresh random bits (as in the classic online setting). The applicability of the new RIA method is demonstrated by applying it to three extensively studied online problems: paging, uniform metrical task systems, and online set cover. For these problems, we establish new upper bounds on the competitive ratio of classic online algorithms that improve as the infusion parameter α increases. These are complemented with (often tight) lower bounds on the competitive ratio of online algorithms with RIA for the three problems.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种对在线算法进行严格定量评估的新方法，该方法放宽了经典竞争分析的“激进的最坏情况”视角。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法被称为随机注入建议（RIA），不会对输入序列做出任何概率假设，也不依赖于指定在线算法的开发。相反，它可以应用于现有的在线随机算法，引入一种方法来评估其在最坏情况之外的场景中的性能。更具体地说，带有 RIA 的在线算法 ALG 受益于全知但不完全可靠的预言机生成的建议。新方法的关键在于，通过将建议写入缓冲区 B 来向 ALG 提供建议，ALG 通常从缓冲区 B 读取其随机位，因此允许我们通过非常简单且非侵入式的接口来增强它。预言机的（不）可靠性通过参数 0 {\le} α {\le} 1 来捕获，该参数确定预言机成功注入建议的概率（每轮）；如果未注入建议（发生概率为 1 - α），则缓冲区 B 包含新的随机位（如经典在线设置中所示）。新的 RIA 方法的适用性通过将其应用于三个广泛研究的在线问题来证明：分页、统一度量任务系统和在线集覆盖。针对这些问题，我们为经典在线算法的竞争比建立了新的上限，该上限随着注入参数 α 的增加而提高。对于这三个问题，这些都通过 RIA 在线算法的竞争比下限（通常是严格的）进行了补充。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为随机注入建议（RIA）的新方法，用于评估在线算法的性能，该方法通过引入一个可靠性参数α来放松传统竞争分析中的极端最坏情况假设。
AI.motivation: 传统竞争分析依赖于极端最坏情况假设，难以反映实际场景。现有方法或依赖特定算法设计，或需概率输入假设，缺乏灵活性和实用性。
AI.method: 通过将全知但不可靠的预言机建议注入算法的随机位缓冲区，利用参数α控制建议注入成功率。未成功注入时，缓冲区保留经典在线设置的随机位。
AI.result: 将RIA应用于页面调度、均匀度量任务系统和在线集合覆盖问题，证明经典算法在α增加时具有更优的竞争比上界，并给出对应的下界证明。
AI.conclusion: RIA方法为在线算法评估提供了灵活框架，展示了经典算法在非极端场景下的潜力，且无需修改算法本身或输入分布假设。

search_text: Online Algorithms with Randomly Infused Advice 带有随机注入建议的在线算法 We introduce a novel method for the rigorous quantitative evaluation of online algorithms that relaxes the "radical worst-case" perspective of classic competitive analysis. In contrast to prior work, our method, referred to as randomly infused advice (RIA), does not make any probabilistic assumptions about the input sequence and does not rely on the development of designated online algorithms. Rather, it can be applied to existing online randomized algorithms, introducing a means to evaluate their performance in scenarios that lie outside the radical worst-case regime. More concretely, an online algorithm ALG with RIA benefits from pieces of advice generated by an omniscient but not entirely reliable oracle. The crux of the new method is that the advice is provided to ALG by writing it into the buffer B from which ALG normally reads its random bits, hence allowing us to augment it through a very simple and non-intrusive interface. The (un)reliability of the oracle is captured via a parameter 0 {\le} α {\le} 1 that determines the probability (per round) that the advice is successfully infused by the oracle; if the advice is not infused, which occurs with probability 1 - α, then the buffer B contains fresh random bits (as in the classic online setting). The applicability of the new RIA method is demonstrated by applying it to three extensively studied online problems: paging, uniform metrical task systems, and online set cover. For these problems, we establish new upper bounds on the competitive ratio of classic online algorithms that improve as the infusion parameter α increases. These are complemented with (often tight) lower bounds on the competitive ratio of online algorithms with RIA for the three problems. 我们引入了一种对在线算法进行严格定量评估的新方法，该方法放宽了经典竞争分析的“激进的最坏情况”视角。与之前的工作相比，我们的方法被称为随机注入建议（RIA），不会对输入序列做出任何概率假设，也不依赖于指定在线算法的开发。相反，它可以应用于现有的在线随机算法，引入一种方法来评估其在最坏情况之外的场景中的性能。更具体地说，带有 RIA 的在线算法 ALG 受益于全知但不完全可靠的预言机生成的建议。新方法的关键在于，通过将建议写入缓冲区 B 来向 ALG 提供建议，ALG 通常从缓冲区 B 读取其随机位，因此允许我们通过非常简单且非侵入式的接口来增强它。预言机的（不）可靠性通过参数 0 {\le} α {\le} 1 来捕获，该参数确定预言机成功注入建议的概率（每轮）；如果未注入建议（发生概率为 1 - α），则缓冲区 B 包含新的随机位（如经典在线设置中所示）。新的 RIA 方法的适用性通过将其应用于三个广泛研究的在线问题来证明：分页、统一度量任务系统和在线集覆盖。针对这些问题，我们为经典在线算法的竞争比建立了新的上限，该上限随着注入参数 α 的增加而提高。对于这三个问题，这些都通过 RIA 在线算法的竞争比下限（通常是严格的）进行了补充。 本文提出了一种名为随机注入建议（RIA）的新方法，用于评估在线算法的性能，该方法通过引入一个可靠性参数α来放松传统竞争分析中的极端最坏情况假设。 Yuval Emek,Yuval Gil,Maciej Pacut,Stefan Schmid cs.DS

authors_text: Xiaoguang Li,Qing Guo,Rabab Abdelfattah,Di Lin,Wei Feng,Ivor Tsang,Song Wang
title: Leveraging Inpainting for Single-Image Shadow Removal
title_zh: 利用修复进行单图像阴影去除
abstract: Fully-supervised shadow removal methods achieve the best restoration qualities on public datasets but still generate some shadow remnants. One of the reasons is the lack of large-scale shadow & shadow-free image pairs. Unsupervised methods can alleviate the issue but their restoration qualities are much lower than those of fully-supervised methods. In this work, we find that pretraining shadow removal networks on the image inpainting dataset can reduce the shadow remnants significantly: a naive encoder-decoder network gets competitive restoration quality w.r.t. the state-of-the-art methods via only 10% shadow & shadow-free image pairs. After analyzing networks with/without inpainting pre-training via the information stored in the weight (IIW), we find that inpainting pretraining improves restoration quality in non-shadow regions and enhances the generalization ability of networks significantly. Additionally, shadow removal fine-tuning enables networks to fill in the details of shadow regions. Inspired by these observations we formulate shadow removal as an adaptive fusion task that takes advantage of both shadow removal and image inpainting. Specifically, we develop an adaptive fusion network consisting of two encoders, an adaptive fusion block, and a decoder. The two encoders are responsible for extracting the feature from the shadow image and the shadow-masked image respectively. The adaptive fusion block is responsible for combining these features in an adaptive manner. Finally, the decoder converts the adaptive fused features to the desired shadow-free result. The extensive experiments show that our method empowered with inpainting outperforms all state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Fully-supervised shadow removal methods achieve the best restoration qualities on public datasets but still generate some shadow remnants. One of the reasons is the lack of large-scale shadow & shadow-free image pairs. Unsupervised methods can alleviate the issue but their restoration qualities are much lower than those of fully-supervised methods. In this work, we find that pretraining shadow removal networks on the image inpainting dataset can reduce the shadow remnants significantly: a naive encoder-decoder network gets competitive restoration quality w.r.t. the state-of-the-art methods via only 10% shadow & shadow-free image pairs. After analyzing networks with/without inpainting pre-training via the information stored in the weight (IIW), we find that inpainting pretraining improves restoration quality in non-shadow regions and enhances the generalization ability of networks significantly. Additionally, shadow removal fine-tuning enables networks to fill in the details of shadow regions. Inspired by these observations we formulate shadow removal as an adaptive fusion task that takes advantage of both shadow removal and image inpainting. Specifically, we develop an adaptive fusion network consisting of two encoders, an adaptive fusion block, and a decoder. The two encoders are responsible for extracting the feature from the shadow image and the shadow-masked image respectively. The adaptive fusion block is responsible for combining these features in an adaptive manner. Finally, the decoder converts the adaptive fused features to the desired shadow-free result. The extensive experiments show that our method empowered with inpainting outperforms all state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 完全监督的阴影去除方法在公共数据集上实现了最佳的恢复质量，但仍然产生一些阴影残留。原因之一是缺乏大规模的阴影和无阴影图像对。无监督方法可以缓解这个问题，但其恢复质量远低于完全监督方法。在这项工作中，我们发现在图像修复数据集上预训练阴影去除网络可以显着减少阴影残留：一个简单的编码器-解码器网络可以获得有竞争力的恢复质量。最先进的方法仅通过 10% 的阴影和无阴影图像对。通过权重（IIW）中存储的信息对有/没有修复预训练的网络进行分析后，我们发现修复预训练提高了非阴影区域的恢复质量，并显着增强了网络的泛化能力。此外，阴影去除微调使网络能够填充阴影区域的细节。受这些观察的启发，我们将阴影去除制定为自适应融合任务，利用阴影去除和图像修复的优势。 Specifically, we develop an adaptive fusion network consisting of two encoders, an adaptive fusion block, and a decoder.两个编码器分别负责从阴影图像和阴影掩模图像中提取特征。 The adaptive fusion block is responsible for combining these features in an adaptive manner.最后，解码器将自适应融合特征转换为所需的无阴影结果。大量的实验表明，我们的修复方法优于所有最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合图像修复的单幅图像阴影去除方法，通过自适应融合网络提升阴影区域的修复质量。
AI.motivation: 现有全监督方法因缺乏大规模阴影-无阴影图像对而存在阴影残留问题，无监督方法效果较差。通过图像修复预训练可缓解该问题但未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计包含双编码器、自适应融合块和解码器的网络架构，利用图像修复预训练提升非阴影区域修复能力，通过阴影区域微调增强细节还原，将阴影去除建模为自适应融合任务。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在仅使用10%图像对时即超越现有最先进方法，在非阴影区域修复和泛化能力上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 图像修复预训练显著提升阴影去除效果，自适应融合框架有效结合了阴影去除与图像修复的优势，为小样本场景提供新解决方案。
