title: Beyond the Boolean: How Programmers Ask About, Use, and Discuss Gender
title_zh: 超越布尔值：程序员如何询问、使用和讨论性别
comment: To appear at CSCW 2023 and in Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact., Vol. 7, No. CSCW1, Article 28. (April 2023)
comments: To appear at CSCW 2023 and in Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact., Vol. 7, No. CSCW1, Article 28. (April 2023)
abstract: Categorization via gender is omnipresent throughout society, and thus also computing; gender identity is often requested of users before they use software or web services. Despite this fact, no research has explored how software developers approach requesting gender disclosure from users. To understand how developers think about gender in software, we present an interview study with 15 software developers recruited from the freelancing platform Upwork as well as Twitter. We also collected and categorized 917 threads that contained keywords relevant to gender from programming-related sub-forums on the social media service Reddit. 16 posts that discussed approaches to gender disclosure were further analyzed. We found that while some developers have an understanding of inclusive gender options, programmers rarely consider when gender data is necessary or the way in which they request gender disclosure from users. Our findings have implications for programmers, software engineering educators, and the broader community concerned with inclusivity.
summary: Categorization via gender is omnipresent throughout society, and thus also computing; gender identity is often requested of users before they use software or web services. Despite this fact, no research has explored how software developers approach requesting gender disclosure from users. To understand how developers think about gender in software, we present an interview study with 15 software developers recruited from the freelancing platform Upwork as well as Twitter. We also collected and categorized 917 threads that contained keywords relevant to gender from programming-related sub-forums on the social media service Reddit. 16 posts that discussed approaches to gender disclosure were further analyzed. We found that while some developers have an understanding of inclusive gender options, programmers rarely consider when gender data is necessary or the way in which they request gender disclosure from users. Our findings have implications for programmers, software engineering educators, and the broader community concerned with inclusivity.
abstract_zh: 按性别进行分类在整个社会中无处不在，计算也同样如此。用户在使用软件或网络服务之前通常会询问其性别身份。尽管如此，还没有研究探讨软件开发人员如何要求用户披露性别。为了了解开发人员如何看待软件中的性别问题，我们对从自由职业平台 Upwork 和 Twitter 招募的 15 名软件开发人员进行了采访研究。我们还从社交媒体服务 Reddit 上与编程相关的子论坛中收集并分类了 917 个包含与性别相关的关键词的帖子。进一步分析了 16 个讨论性别披露方法的帖子。我们发现，虽然一些开发人员了解包容性的性别选项，但程序员很少考虑何时需要性别数据或他们要求用户披露性别的方式。我们的研究结果对程序员、软件工程教育工作者以及关注包容性的更广泛社区都有影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究软件开发者如何询问、使用和讨论性别信息，探讨其在软件设计中对性别数据的处理方式。
AI.motivation: 尽管性别信息在软件中普遍存在，但缺乏对开发者如何处理性别披露问题的研究，需填补这一空白以促进包容性设计。
AI.method: 通过访谈Upwork和Twitter上的15名开发者，并分析Reddit编程论坛中917条含性别关键词的帖子，进一步研究16条相关讨论内容。
AI.result: 部分开发者了解包容性性别选项，但极少考虑性别数据的必要性及收集方式，存在设计上的包容性不足问题。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为开发者、教育者及包容性社区提供参考，需更关注性别数据收集的合理性和用户隐私保护。

authors_text: Theodoros Theodoropoulos,John Violos,Stylianos Tsanakas,Aris Leivadeas,Konstantinos Tserpes,Theodora Varvarigou
title: Intelligent Proactive Fault Tolerance at the Edge through Resource Usage Prediction
title_zh: 通过资源使用预测实现边缘智能主动容错
comment: Also available in ITU's Journal on Future and Evolving Technologies
comments: Also available in ITU's Journal on Future and Evolving Technologies
abstract: The proliferation of demanding applications and edge computing establishes the need for an efficient management of the underlying computing infrastructures, urging the providers to rethink their operational methods. In this paper, we propose an Intelligent Proactive Fault Tolerance (IPFT) method that leverages the edge resource usage predictions through Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN). More specifically, we focus on the process-faults, which are related with the inability of the infrastructure to provide Quality of Service (QoS) in acceptable ranges due to the lack of processing power. In order to tackle this challenge we propose a composite deep learning architecture that predicts the resource usage metrics of the edge nodes and triggers proactive node replications and task migration. Taking also into consideration that the edge computing infrastructure is also highly dynamic and heterogeneous, we propose an innovative Hybrid Bayesian Evolution Strategy (HBES) algorithm for automated adaptation of the resource usage models. The proposed resource usage prediction mechanism has been experimentally evaluated and compared with other state of the art methods with significant improvements in terms of Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) and Mean Absolute Error (MAE). Additionally, the IPFT mechanism that leverages the resource usage predictions has been evaluated in an extensive simulation in CloudSim Plus and the results show significant improvement compared to the reactive fault tolerance method in terms of reliability and maintainability.
summary: The proliferation of demanding applications and edge computing establishes the need for an efficient management of the underlying computing infrastructures, urging the providers to rethink their operational methods. In this paper, we propose an Intelligent Proactive Fault Tolerance (IPFT) method that leverages the edge resource usage predictions through Recurrent Neural Networks (RNN). More specifically, we focus on the process-faults, which are related with the inability of the infrastructure to provide Quality of Service (QoS) in acceptable ranges due to the lack of processing power. In order to tackle this challenge we propose a composite deep learning architecture that predicts the resource usage metrics of the edge nodes and triggers proactive node replications and task migration. Taking also into consideration that the edge computing infrastructure is also highly dynamic and heterogeneous, we propose an innovative Hybrid Bayesian Evolution Strategy (HBES) algorithm for automated adaptation of the resource usage models. The proposed resource usage prediction mechanism has been experimentally evaluated and compared with other state of the art methods with significant improvements in terms of Root Mean Squared Error (RMSE) and Mean Absolute Error (MAE). Additionally, the IPFT mechanism that leverages the resource usage predictions has been evaluated in an extensive simulation in CloudSim Plus and the results show significant improvement compared to the reactive fault tolerance method in terms of reliability and maintainability.
abstract_zh: 要求苛刻的应用程序和边缘计算的激增提出了对底层计算基础设施进行有效管理的需求，敦促提供商重新考虑其运营方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能主动容错（IPFT）方法，该方法通过循环神经网络（RNN）利用边缘资源使用预测。更具体地说，我们关注流程故障，这些故障与基础设施由于缺乏处理能力而无法提供可接受范围内的服务质量（QoS）有关。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种复合深度学习架构，可以预测边缘节点的资源使用指标并触发主动节点复制和任务迁移。还考虑到边缘计算基础设施也是高度动态和异构的，我们提出了一种创新的混合贝叶斯进化策略（HBES）算法，用于自动适应资源使用模型。所提出的资源使用预测机制已经过实验评估，并与其他最先进的方法进行了比较，在均方根误差（RMSE）和平均绝对误差（MAE）方面有显着改进。此外，利用资源使用预测的 IPFT 机制已在 CloudSim Plus 中进行了广泛的模拟评估，结果显示与反应式容错方法相比，在可靠性和可维护性方面有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于边缘计算资源使用预测的智能主动容错方法（IPFT），通过循环神经网络（RNN）预测资源使用情况并触发主动节点复制和任务迁移，以应对边缘计算中的服务质量（QoS）问题。
AI.motivation: 随着高需求应用和边缘计算的普及，基础设施需高效管理以确保服务质量（QoS）。现有方法难以应对动态异构边缘环境中的资源不足导致的进程故障问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种复合深度学习架构，利用RNN预测边缘节点资源使用指标，并结合创新的混合贝叶斯进化策略（HBES）算法自动调整资源模型，实现主动容错机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，资源预测机制在RMSE和MAE指标上优于现有方法；CloudSim Plus仿真显示，IPFT在可靠性和可维护性方面显著优于传统反应式容错方法。
AI.conclusion: IPFT方法通过资源预测与动态适应算法有效提升了边缘计算环境的容错能力，为应对动态异构基础设施中的QoS问题提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Weichao Mao,Ruta Desai,Michael Louis Iuzzolino,Nitin Kamra
title: Action Dynamics Task Graphs for Learning Plannable Representations of Procedural Tasks
title_zh: 用于学习程序任务的可规划表示的动作动力学任务图
comment: AAAI 2023 Workshop on User-Centric Artificial Intelligence for Assistance in At-Home Tasks
comments: AAAI 2023 Workshop on User-Centric Artificial Intelligence for Assistance in At-Home Tasks
abstract: Given video demonstrations and paired narrations of an at-home procedural task such as changing a tire, we present an approach to extract the underlying task structure -- relevant actions and their temporal dependencies -- via action-centric task graphs. Learnt structured representations from our method, Action Dynamics Task Graphs (ADTG), can then be used for understanding such tasks in unseen videos of humans performing them. Furthermore, ADTG can enable providing user-centric guidance to humans in these tasks, either for performing them better or for learning new tasks. Specifically, we show how ADTG can be used for: (1) tracking an ongoing task, (2) recommending next actions, and (3) planning a sequence of actions to accomplish a procedural task. We compare against state-of-the-art Neural Task Graph method and demonstrate substantial gains on 18 procedural tasks from the CrossTask dataset, including 30.1% improvement in task tracking accuracy and 20.3% accuracy gain in next action prediction.
summary: Given video demonstrations and paired narrations of an at-home procedural task such as changing a tire, we present an approach to extract the underlying task structure -- relevant actions and their temporal dependencies -- via action-centric task graphs. Learnt structured representations from our method, Action Dynamics Task Graphs (ADTG), can then be used for understanding such tasks in unseen videos of humans performing them. Furthermore, ADTG can enable providing user-centric guidance to humans in these tasks, either for performing them better or for learning new tasks. Specifically, we show how ADTG can be used for: (1) tracking an ongoing task, (2) recommending next actions, and (3) planning a sequence of actions to accomplish a procedural task. We compare against state-of-the-art Neural Task Graph method and demonstrate substantial gains on 18 procedural tasks from the CrossTask dataset, including 30.1% improvement in task tracking accuracy and 20.3% accuracy gain in next action prediction.
abstract_zh: 给定家庭程序任务（例如更换轮胎）的视频演示和配对叙述，我们提出了一种通过以动作为中心的任务图来提取底层任务结构（相关动作及其时间依赖性）的方法。从我们的方法“动作动态任务图”（ADTG）中学习到的结构化表示可以用于理解人类执行任务的未见过的视频中的此类任务。此外，ADTG 可以在这些任务中为人类提供以用户为中心的指导，以便更好地执行任务或学习新任务。具体来说，我们展示了 ADTG 如何用于：(1) 跟踪正在进行的任务，(2) 建议下一步行动，以及 (3) 规划一系列行动来完成程序任务。我们与最先进的神经任务图方法进行比较，并展示了 CrossTask 数据集中 18 个程序任务的显着收益，包括任务跟踪精度提高了 30.1%，下一动作预测精度提高了 20.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从家庭环境视频演示和叙述中学习可规划任务表示的方法，用于理解和指导程序性任务的执行。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在任务结构理解和用户指导方面存在不足，需更有效的结构化表示来提升任务跟踪和预测准确性。

AI.conclusion: ADTG方法有效提升了程序性任务的结构化理解与指导能力，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Action Dynamics Task Graphs for Learning Plannable Representations of Procedural Tasks 用于学习程序任务的可规划表示的动作动力学任务图 Given video demonstrations and paired narrations of an at-home procedural task such as changing a tire, we present an approach to extract the underlying task structure -- relevant actions and their temporal dependencies -- via action-centric task graphs. Learnt structured representations from our method, Action Dynamics Task Graphs (ADTG), can then be used for understanding such tasks in unseen videos of humans performing them. Furthermore, ADTG can enable providing user-centric guidance to humans in these tasks, either for performing them better or for learning new tasks. Specifically, we show how ADTG can be used for: (1) tracking an ongoing task, (2) recommending next actions, and (3) planning a sequence of actions to accomplish a procedural task. We compare against state-of-the-art Neural Task Graph method and demonstrate substantial gains on 18 procedural tasks from the CrossTask dataset, including 30.1% improvement in task tracking accuracy and 20.3% accuracy gain in next action prediction. 给定家庭程序任务（例如更换轮胎）的视频演示和配对叙述，我们提出了一种通过以动作为中心的任务图来提取底层任务结构（相关动作及其时间依赖性）的方法。从我们的方法“动作动态任务图”（ADTG）中学习到的结构化表示可以用于理解人类执行任务的未见过的视频中的此类任务。此外，ADTG 可以在这些任务中为人类提供以用户为中心的指导，以便更好地执行任务或学习新任务。具体来说，我们展示了 ADTG 如何用于：(1) 跟踪正在进行的任务，(2) 建议下一步行动，以及 (3) 规划一系列行动来完成程序任务。我们与最先进的神经任务图方法进行比较，并展示了 CrossTask 数据集中 18 个程序任务的显着收益，包括任务跟踪精度提高了 30.1%，下一动作预测精度提高了 20.3%。 本文提出一种从家庭环境视频演示和叙述中学习可规划任务表示的方法，用于理解和指导程序性任务的执行。 Weichao Mao,Ruta Desai,Michael Louis Iuzzolino,Nitin Kamra cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Scalable Real-Time Recurrent Learning Using Columnar-Constructive Networks
title_zh: 使用柱状构造网络的可扩展实时循环学习
comment: Scalable recurrent learning, online learning, real-time recurrent learning, cascade correlation networks, agent-state construction, columnar networks, constructive networks
comments: Scalable recurrent learning, online learning, real-time recurrent learning, cascade correlation networks, agent-state construction, columnar networks, constructive networks
abstract: Constructing states from sequences of observations is an important component of reinforcement learning agents. One solution for state construction is to use recurrent neural networks. Back-propagation through time (BPTT), and real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) are two popular gradient-based methods for recurrent learning. BPTT requires complete trajectories of observations before it can compute the gradients and is unsuitable for online updates. RTRL can do online updates but scales poorly to large networks. In this paper, we propose two constraints that make RTRL scalable. We show that by either decomposing the network into independent modules or learning the network in stages, we can make RTRL scale linearly with the number of parameters. Unlike prior scalable gradient estimation algorithms, such as UORO and Truncated-BPTT, our algorithms do not add noise or bias to the gradient estimate. Instead, they trade off the functional capacity of the network for computationally efficient learning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over Truncated-BPTT on a prediction benchmark inspired by animal learning and by doing policy evaluation of pre-trained policies for Atari 2600 games.
summary: Constructing states from sequences of observations is an important component of reinforcement learning agents. One solution for state construction is to use recurrent neural networks. Back-propagation through time (BPTT), and real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) are two popular gradient-based methods for recurrent learning. BPTT requires complete trajectories of observations before it can compute the gradients and is unsuitable for online updates. RTRL can do online updates but scales poorly to large networks. In this paper, we propose two constraints that make RTRL scalable. We show that by either decomposing the network into independent modules or learning the network in stages, we can make RTRL scale linearly with the number of parameters. Unlike prior scalable gradient estimation algorithms, such as UORO and Truncated-BPTT, our algorithms do not add noise or bias to the gradient estimate. Instead, they trade off the functional capacity of the network for computationally efficient learning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach over Truncated-BPTT on a prediction benchmark inspired by animal learning and by doing policy evaluation of pre-trained policies for Atari 2600 games.
abstract_zh: Constructing states from sequences of observations is an important component of reinforcement learning agents. One solution for state construction is to use recurrent neural networks. Back-propagation through time (BPTT), and real-time recurrent learning (RTRL) are two popular gradient-based methods for recurrent learning. BPTT 需要完整的观测轨迹才能计算梯度，并且不适合在线更新。 RTRL 可以进行在线更新，但对于大型网络的扩展性较差。在本文中，我们提出了两个使 RTRL 可扩展的约束。我们证明，通过将网络分解为独立的模块或分阶段学习网络，我们可以使 RTRL 随参数数量线性扩展。与之前的可扩展梯度估计算法（例如 UORO 和 Truncated-BPTT）不同，我们的算法不会在梯度估计中添加噪声或偏差。相反，他们会牺牲网络的功能能力来换取计算效率较高的学习。我们通过对 Atari 2600 游戏的预训练策略进行策略评估，在受动物学习启发的预测基准上证明了我们的方法相对于 Truncated-BPTT 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可扩展的实时循环学习方法，通过模块化分解或分阶段学习优化RTRL算法的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 传统RTRL算法在处理大规模网络时计算复杂度高，而BPTT无法进行在线更新，现有可扩展方法存在梯度噪声或偏差问题。
AI.method: 通过将网络分解为独立模块或分阶段训练，使RTRL的计算复杂度线性缩放，同时避免引入梯度噪声。
AI.result: 在动物学习启发的预测基准测试和Atari 2600游戏策略评估中，该方法优于截断BPTT。
AI.conclusion: 该方法以牺牲部分网络容量为代价，实现了无噪声的高效实时循环学习，为大规模RNN训练提供新思路。

title: SOCRATES: Text-based Human Search and Approach using a Robot Dog
title_zh: 苏格拉底：基于文本的人类搜索和使用机器狗的方法
abstract: In this paper, we propose a SOCratic model for Robots Approaching humans based on TExt System (SOCRATES) focusing on the human search and approach based on free-form textual description; the robot first searches for the target user, then the robot proceeds to approach in a human-friendly manner. In particular, textual descriptions are composed of appearance (e.g., wearing white shirts with black hair) and location clues (e.g., is a student who works with robots). We initially present a Human Search Socratic Model that connects large pre-trained models in the language domain to solve the downstream task, which is searching for the target person based on textual descriptions. Then, we propose a hybrid learning-based framework for generating target-cordial robotic motion to approach a person, consisting of a learning-from-demonstration module and a knowledge distillation module. We validate the proposed searching module via simulation using a virtual mobile robot as well as through real-world experiments involving participants and the Boston Dynamics Spot robot. Furthermore, we analyze the properties of the proposed approaching framework with human participants based on the Robotic Social Attributes Scale (RoSAS)
summary: In this paper, we propose a SOCratic model for Robots Approaching humans based on TExt System (SOCRATES) focusing on the human search and approach based on free-form textual description; the robot first searches for the target user, then the robot proceeds to approach in a human-friendly manner. In particular, textual descriptions are composed of appearance (e.g., wearing white shirts with black hair) and location clues (e.g., is a student who works with robots). We initially present a Human Search Socratic Model that connects large pre-trained models in the language domain to solve the downstream task, which is searching for the target person based on textual descriptions. Then, we propose a hybrid learning-based framework for generating target-cordial robotic motion to approach a person, consisting of a learning-from-demonstration module and a knowledge distillation module. We validate the proposed searching module via simulation using a virtual mobile robot as well as through real-world experiments involving participants and the Boston Dynamics Spot robot. Furthermore, we analyze the properties of the proposed approaching framework with human participants based on the Robotic Social Attributes Scale (RoSAS)
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于文本系统的机器人接近人类的 SOCratic 模型（苏格拉底），重点关注基于自由格式文本描述的人类搜索和接近；机器人首先搜索目标用户，然后机器人以人性化的方式接近。特别是，文本描述由外观（例如，穿着白衬衫、黑头发）和位置线索（例如，是一个与机器人一起工作的学生）组成。我们最初提出了一种人类搜索苏格拉底模型，该模型连接语言领域中的大型预训练模型来解决下游任务，即根据文本描述搜索目标人。然后，我们提出了一种基于混合学习的框架，用于生成目标亲切的机器人运动来接近人，由演示学习模块和知识蒸馏模块组成。我们通过使用虚拟移动机器人进行模拟以及通过涉及参与者和波士顿动力 Spot 机器人的真实实验来验证所提出的搜索模块。此外，我们基于机器人社交属性量表（RoSAS）分析了所提出的人类参与者接近框架的属性

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOCRATES模型，通过文本描述实现机器人狗对目标人物的搜索与友好接近。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人难以基于自然语言描述高效搜索并安全接近目标人物，需结合语言理解和运动控制解决实际交互需求。
AI.method: 构建语言预训练模型驱动的搜索模块，结合演示学习与知识蒸馏的混合框架生成目标导向的机器人运动策略，并通过仿真与实体机器人验证。
AI.result: 仿真与实验证明搜索模块有效，Spot机器人接近行为在RoSAS量表中获得积极社会属性评价。
AI.conclusion: SOCRATES为文本驱动的机器人搜索与交互提供了可扩展框架，推动了社会机器人技术的发展。

Then, we propose a hybrid learning-based framework for generating target-cordial robotic motion to approach a person, consisting of a learning-from-demonstration module and a knowledge distillation module. Furthermore, we analyze the properties of the proposed approaching framework with human participants based on the Robotic Social Attributes Scale (RoSAS) 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于文本系统的机器人接近人类的 SOCratic 模型（苏格拉底），重点关注基于自由格式文本描述的人类搜索和接近；机器人首先搜索目标用户，然后机器人以人性化的方式接近。特别是，文本描述由外观（例如，穿着白衬衫、黑头发）和位置线索（例如，是一个与机器人一起工作的学生）组成。我们最初提出了一种人类搜索苏格拉底模型，该模型连接语言领域中的大型预训练模型来解决下游任务，即根据文本描述搜索目标人。然后，我们提出了一种基于混合学习的框架，用于生成目标亲切的机器人运动来接近人，由演示学习模块和知识蒸馏模块组成。我们通过使用虚拟移动机器人进行模拟以及通过涉及参与者和波士顿动力 Spot 机器人的真实实验来验证所提出的搜索模块。此外，我们基于机器人社交属性量表（RoSAS）分析了所提出的人类参与者接近框架的属性 本文提出SOCRATES模型，通过文本描述实现机器人狗对目标人物的搜索与友好接近。 Jeongeun Park,Jefferson Silveria,Matthew Pan,Sungjoon Choi cs.RO,cs.AI

title: On Achieving Privacy-Preserving State-of-the-Art Edge Intelligence
title_zh: 关于实现保护隐私的最先进的边缘智能
abstract: Deep Neural Network (DNN) Inference in Edge Computing, often called Edge Intelligence, requires solutions to insure that sensitive data confidentiality and intellectual property are not revealed in the process. Privacy-preserving Edge Intelligence is only emerging, despite the growing prevalence of Edge Computing as a context of Machine-Learning-as-a-Service. Solutions are yet to be applied, and possibly adapted, to state-of-the-art DNNs. This position paper provides an original assessment of the compatibility of existing techniques for privacy-preserving DNN Inference with the characteristics of an Edge Computing setup, highlighting the appropriateness of secret sharing in this context. We then address the future role of model compression methods in the research towards secret sharing on DNNs with state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Deep Neural Network (DNN) Inference in Edge Computing, often called Edge Intelligence, requires solutions to insure that sensitive data confidentiality and intellectual property are not revealed in the process. Privacy-preserving Edge Intelligence is only emerging, despite the growing prevalence of Edge Computing as a context of Machine-Learning-as-a-Service. Solutions are yet to be applied, and possibly adapted, to state-of-the-art DNNs. This position paper provides an original assessment of the compatibility of existing techniques for privacy-preserving DNN Inference with the characteristics of an Edge Computing setup, highlighting the appropriateness of secret sharing in this context. We then address the future role of model compression methods in the research towards secret sharing on DNNs with state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算中的深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理（通常称为边缘智能）需要解决方案来确保敏感数据机密性和知识产权在此过程中不会泄露。尽管边缘计算作为机器学习即服务的背景日益普及，但保护隐私的边缘智能才刚刚兴起。解决方案尚未应用于或可能适用于最先进的 DNN。本立场文件对隐私保护 DNN 推理的现有技术与边缘计算设置的特征的兼容性进行了原始评估，强调了在此背景下秘密共享的适当性。然后，我们讨论了模型压缩方法在具有最先进性能的 DNN 秘密共享研究中的未来作用。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了现有隐私保护技术在边缘智能中的适用性，并提出秘密共享是适合该场景的方案，同时探讨模型压缩方法在未来研究中的作用。
AI.motivation: 随着边缘计算在机器学习即服务中的普及，保护数据隐私和模型知识产权的需求日益迫切，但现有技术尚未完全适配最先进的深度神经网络。
AI.method: 通过分析现有隐私保护技术与边缘计算场景的兼容性，重点探讨秘密共享方案的适用性，并研究模型压缩技术对提升秘密共享性能的潜力。
AI.result: 确定秘密共享在边缘计算环境中的有效性，并指出模型压缩方法可作为未来提升隐私保护性能的关键研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 秘密共享是实现隐私保护边缘智能的可行方案，结合模型压缩技术将进一步推动该领域的发展。

authors_text: Carol F. Scott,Gabriela Marcu,Riana Elyse Anderson,Mark W. Newman,Sarita Schoenebeck
title: Trauma-Informed Social Media: Towards Solutions for Reducing and Healing Online Harm
title_zh: 创伤知情社交媒体：寻求减少和治愈在线伤害的解决方案
comment: 20 pages, 2 figures. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record will be published in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: 20 pages, 2 figures. This is the author's version of the work. It is posted here for your personal use. Not for redistribution. The definitive Version of Record will be published in Proceedings of the 2023 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: Social media platforms exacerbate trauma, and many users experience various forms of trauma unique to them (e.g., doxxing and swatting). Trauma is the psychological and physical response to experiencing a deeply disturbing event. Platforms' failures to address trauma threaten users' well-being globally, especially amongst minoritized groups. Platform policies also expose moderators and designers to trauma through content they must engage with as part of their jobs (e.g., child sexual abuse). We consider how a trauma-informed approach might help address or decrease the likelihood of (re)experiencing trauma online. A trauma-informed approach to social media recognizes that everyone likely has a trauma history and that trauma is experienced at the individual, secondary, collective, and cultural levels. This paper proceeds by detailing trauma and its impacts. We then describe how the six trauma-informed principles can be applied to social media design, content moderation, and companies. We conclude by offering recommendations that balance platform responsibility and accountability with well-being and healing for all.
summary: Social media platforms exacerbate trauma, and many users experience various forms of trauma unique to them (e.g., doxxing and swatting). Trauma is the psychological and physical response to experiencing a deeply disturbing event. Platforms' failures to address trauma threaten users' well-being globally, especially amongst minoritized groups. Platform policies also expose moderators and designers to trauma through content they must engage with as part of their jobs (e.g., child sexual abuse). We consider how a trauma-informed approach might help address or decrease the likelihood of (re)experiencing trauma online. A trauma-informed approach to social media recognizes that everyone likely has a trauma history and that trauma is experienced at the individual, secondary, collective, and cultural levels. This paper proceeds by detailing trauma and its impacts. We then describe how the six trauma-informed principles can be applied to social media design, content moderation, and companies. We conclude by offering recommendations that balance platform responsibility and accountability with well-being and healing for all.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体平台加剧了创伤，许多用户经历了他们特有的各种形式的创伤（例如，人肉搜索和殴打）。创伤是经历令人深感不安的事件后的心理和身体反应。平台未能解决创伤问题，威胁着全球用户的福祉，尤其是少数群体的福祉。平台政策还使版主和设计师因工作中必须接触的内容（例如儿童性虐待）而遭受创伤。我们考虑创伤知情方法如何帮助解决或减少在线（重新）经历创伤的可能性。社交媒体的创伤知情方法认识到每个人都可能有创伤史，并且创伤是在个人、次要、集体和文化层面经历的。本文首先详细介绍创伤及其影响。然后，我们描述了如何将六项创伤知情原则应用于社交媒体设计、内容审核和公司。最后，我们提出了一些建议，平衡平台责任和问责制与所有人的福祉和康复。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何通过创伤知情方法减少和治愈社交媒体上的在线伤害。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体平台未能有效应对创伤问题，导致用户（尤其是边缘化群体）面临心理和生理伤害，需寻求系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 分析创伤的多层级影响，并将六项创伤知情原则应用于社交媒体设计、内容审核及公司政策。
AI.result: 提出平衡平台责任与用户福祉的建议，包括改进审核机制、设计伦理框架及员工支持措施。
AI.conclusion: 创伤知情方法可为社交媒体构建更安全、人性化的环境，促进用户愈合与预防二次伤害。

authors_text: Ilayda Yaman,Guoda Tian,Martin Larsson,Patrik Persson,Michiel Sandra,Alexander Dürr,Erik Tegler,Nikhil Challa,Henrik Garde,Fredrik Tufvesson,Kalle Åström,Ove Edfors,Steffen Malkowsky,Liang Liu
title: The LuViRA Dataset: Synchronized Vision, Radio, and Audio Sensors for Indoor Localization
title_zh: LuViRA 数据集：用于室内定位的同步视觉、无线电和音频传感器
abstract: We present a synchronized multisensory dataset for accurate and robust indoor localization: the Lund University Vision, Radio, and Audio (LuViRA) Dataset. The dataset includes color images, corresponding depth maps, inertial measurement unit (IMU) readings, channel response between a 5G massive multiple-input and multiple-output (MIMO) testbed and user equipment, audio recorded by 12 microphones, and accurate six degrees of freedom (6DOF) pose ground truth of 0.5 mm. We synchronize these sensors to ensure that all data is recorded simultaneously. A camera, speaker, and transmit antenna are placed on top of a slowly moving service robot, and 89 trajectories are recorded. Each trajectory includes 20 to 50 seconds of recorded sensor data and ground truth labels. Data from different sensors can be used separately or jointly to perform localization tasks, and data from the motion capture (mocap) system is used to verify the results obtained by the localization algorithms. The main aim of this dataset is to enable research on sensor fusion with the most commonly used sensors for localization tasks. Moreover, the full dataset or some parts of it can also be used for other research areas such as channel estimation, image classification, etc. Our dataset is available at: https://github.com/ilaydayaman/LuViRA_Dataset
summary: We present a synchronized multisensory dataset for accurate and robust indoor localization: the Lund University Vision, Radio, and Audio (LuViRA) Dataset. The dataset includes color images, corresponding depth maps, inertial measurement unit (IMU) readings, channel response between a 5G massive multiple-input and multiple-output (MIMO) testbed and user equipment, audio recorded by 12 microphones, and accurate six degrees of freedom (6DOF) pose ground truth of 0.5 mm. We synchronize these sensors to ensure that all data is recorded simultaneously. A camera, speaker, and transmit antenna are placed on top of a slowly moving service robot, and 89 trajectories are recorded. Each trajectory includes 20 to 50 seconds of recorded sensor data and ground truth labels. Data from different sensors can be used separately or jointly to perform localization tasks, and data from the motion capture (mocap) system is used to verify the results obtained by the localization algorithms. The main aim of this dataset is to enable research on sensor fusion with the most commonly used sensors for localization tasks. Moreover, the full dataset or some parts of it can also be used for other research areas such as channel estimation, image classification, etc. Our dataset is available at: https://github.com/ilaydayaman/LuViRA_Dataset
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个同步多感官数据集，用于准确和强大的室内定位：隆德大学视觉、无线电和音频 (LuViRA) 数据集。该数据集包括彩色图像、相应的深度图、惯性测量单元 (IMU) 读数、5G 大规模多输入多输出 (MIMO) 测试台和用户设备之间的通道响应、12 个麦克风录制的音频以及 0.5 毫米的精确六自由度 (6DOF) 姿态地面实况。我们同步这些传感器以确保所有数据同时记录。摄像头、扬声器和发射天线被放置在缓慢移动的服务机器人顶部，并记录 89 条轨迹。每个轨迹包含 20 到 50 秒记录的传感器数据和地面实况标签。来自不同传感器的数据可以单独或联合使用来执行定位任务，并且来自运动捕捉（mocap）系统的数据用于验证定位算法获得的结果。该数据集的主要目的是能够研究与定位任务中最常用的传感器的传感器融合。此外，完整数据集或部分数据集还可以用于其他研究领域，例如通道估计、图像分类等。我们的数据集位于：https://github.com/ilaydayaman/LuViRA_Dataset

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为LuViRA的同步多传感器数据集，用于提高室内定位的准确性和鲁棒性，包含视觉、射频和音频传感器数据。
AI.motivation: 现有室内定位数据集缺乏多模态传感器同步和高精度地面真值，限制了传感器融合研究。本文旨在提供一个包含常见定位传感器的同步数据集，推动相关算法研究。
AI.method: 在移动服务机器人顶部集成摄像头、IMU、5G MIMO测试床、12麦克风阵列等传感器，通过运动捕捉系统获取0.5mm精度的6自由度地面真值，同步记录89条轨迹的多模态数据。
AI.result: 发布包含颜色图像、深度图、射频信道响应、音频记录及高精度姿态标签的同步数据集，支持定位算法验证及通道估计、图像分类等其他研究。
AI.conclusion: LuViRA数据集为传感器融合研究提供了标准化基准，其多模态同步特性可促进室内定位、通信信道建模等领域的算法创新。

search_text: The LuViRA Dataset: Synchronized Vision, Radio, and Audio Sensors for Indoor Localization LuViRA 数据集：用于室内定位的同步视觉、无线电和音频传感器 We present a synchronized multisensory dataset for accurate and robust indoor localization: the Lund University Vision, Radio, and Audio (LuViRA) Dataset. The dataset includes color images, corresponding depth maps, inertial measurement unit (IMU) readings, channel response between a 5G massive multiple-input and multiple-output (MIMO) testbed and user equipment, audio recorded by 12 microphones, and accurate six degrees of freedom (6DOF) pose ground truth of 0.5 mm. We synchronize these sensors to ensure that all data is recorded simultaneously. A camera, speaker, and transmit antenna are placed on top of a slowly moving service robot, and 89 trajectories are recorded. Each trajectory includes 20 to 50 seconds of recorded sensor data and ground truth labels. Data from different sensors can be used separately or jointly to perform localization tasks, and data from the motion capture (mocap) system is used to verify the results obtained by the localization algorithms. The main aim of this dataset is to enable research on sensor fusion with the most commonly used sensors for localization tasks. Moreover, the full dataset or some parts of it can also be used for other research areas such as channel estimation, image classification, etc. Our dataset is available at: https://github.com/ilaydayaman/LuViRA_Dataset 我们提出了一个同步多感官数据集，用于准确和强大的室内定位：隆德大学视觉、无线电和音频 (LuViRA) 数据集。该数据集包括彩色图像、相应的深度图、惯性测量单元 (IMU) 读数、5G 大规模多输入多输出 (MIMO) 测试台和用户设备之间的通道响应、12 个麦克风录制的音频以及 0.5 毫米的精确六自由度 (6DOF) 姿态地面实况。我们同步这些传感器以确保所有数据同时记录。摄像头、扬声器和发射天线被放置在缓慢移动的服务机器人顶部，并记录 89 条轨迹。每个轨迹包含 20 到 50 秒记录的传感器数据和地面实况标签。来自不同传感器的数据可以单独或联合使用来执行定位任务，并且来自运动捕捉（mocap）系统的数据用于验证定位算法获得的结果。该数据集的主要目的是能够研究与定位任务中最常用的传感器的传感器融合。此外，完整数据集或部分数据集还可以用于其他研究领域，例如通道估计、图像分类等。我们的数据集位于：https://github.com/ilaydayaman/LuViRA_Dataset 本文提出一个名为LuViRA的同步多传感器数据集，用于提高室内定位的准确性和鲁棒性，包含视觉、射频和音频传感器数据。 Ilayda Yaman,Guoda Tian,Martin Larsson,Patrik Persson,Michiel Sandra,Alexander Dürr,Erik Tegler,Nikhil Challa,Henrik Garde,Fredrik Tufvesson,Kalle Åström,Ove Edfors,Steffen Malkowsky,Liang Liu eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Multi-armed Bandit Learning for TDMA Transmission Slot Scheduling and Defragmentation for Improved Bandwidth Usage
title_zh: 用于 TDMA 传输时隙调度和碎片整理的多臂强盗学习，以提高带宽利用率
comment: ef:In 2023 International Conference on Information Networking (pp. 370-375). IEEE
comments: ef:In 2023 International Conference on Information Networking (pp. 370-375). IEEE
abstract: This paper proposes a Time Division Multiple Access (TDMA) MAC slot allocation protocol with efficient bandwidth usage in wireless sensor networks and Internet of Things (IoTs). The developed protocol has two primary components: a Multi-Armed Bandits (MAB)-based slot allocation mechanism for collision free transmission, and a Decentralized Defragmented Slot Backshift (DDSB) operation for improving bandwidth usage efficiency. The proposed framework is decentralized in that each node finds its transmission schedule independently without the control of any centralized arbitrator. The developed mechanism is suitable for networks with or without time synchronization, thus, making it suitable for low-complexity wireless transceivers for wireless sensor and IoT nodes. This framework is able to manage the trade-off between learning convergence time and bandwidth. In addition, it allows the nodes to adapt to topological changes while maintaining efficient bandwidth usage. The developed logic is tested for both fully-connected and arbitrary mesh networks with extensive simulation experiments. It is shown how the nodes can learn to select collision-free transmission slots using MAB. Moreover, the nodes learn to self-adjust their transmission schedules using a novel DDSB framework in order to reduce bandwidth usage.

abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种时分多址 (TDMA) MAC 时隙分配协议，可在无线传感器网络和物联网 (IoT) 中有效利用带宽。所开发的协议有两个主要组件：用于无冲突传输的基于 Multi-Armed Bandits (MAB) 的时隙分配机制，以及用于提高带宽使用效率的分散碎片整理时隙回移 (DDSB) 操作。所提出的框架是去中心化的，因为每个节点独立地找到其传输时间表，而无需任何集中仲裁器的控制。所开发的机制适用于有或没有时间同步的网络，因此适合无线传感器和物联网节点的低复杂度无线收发器。该框架能够管理学习收敛时间和带宽之间的权衡。此外，它允许节点适应拓扑变化，同时保持有效的带宽使用。通过广泛的模拟实验，对完全连接和任意网状网络所开发的逻辑进行了测试。显示了节点如何学习使用 MAB 选择无冲突传输时隙。此外，节点学会使用新颖的 DDSB 框架自我调整其传输时间表，以减少带宽使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多臂老虎机（MAB）和去中心化碎片化时隙后移（DDSB）的TDMA协议，旨在提升无线传感器网络和物联网中的带宽利用率。
AI.motivation: 传统TDMA协议在动态网络拓扑和低复杂度设备中存在带宽利用率低、碰撞避免效率不足的问题，需设计适应性强的自组织调度机制。
AI.method: 结合MAB算法实现无碰撞时隙分配，通过DDSB框架动态调整传输计划，无需中心化协调且兼容同步/异步网络环境。
AI.result: 仿真表明节点可自主学习无碰撞时隙，DDSB有效减少带宽浪费，框架在拓扑变化下保持高效性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架平衡了学习收敛速度与带宽效率，适用于各类无线网络场景，为低复杂度物联网设备提供可靠通信方案。

title: Reinforcement Learning for Protocol Synthesis in Resource-Constrained Wireless Sensor and IoT Networks
title_zh: 资源受限的无线传感器和物联网网络中协议合成的强化学习
comment: In International Conference on Ubiquitous Networking (UNet 2022), Springer
comments: In International Conference on Ubiquitous Networking (UNet 2022), Springer
abstract: This article explores the concepts of online protocol synthesis using Reinforcement Learning (RL). The study is performed in the context of sensor and IoT networks with ultra low complexity wireless transceivers. The paper introduces the use of RL and Multi Armed Bandit (MAB), a specific type of RL, for Medium Access Control (MAC) under different network and traffic conditions. It then introduces a novel learning based protocol synthesis framework that addresses specific difficulties and limitations in medium access for both random access and time slotted networks. The mechanism does not rely on carrier sensing, network time-synchronization, collision detection, and other low level complex operations, thus making it ideal for ultra simple transceiver hardware used in resource constrained sensor and IoT networks. Additionally, the ability of independent protocol learning by the nodes makes the system robust and adaptive to the changes in network and traffic conditions. It is shown that the nodes can be trained to learn to avoid collisions, and to achieve network throughputs that are comparable to ALOHA based access protocols in sensor and IoT networks with simplest transceiver hardware. It is also shown that using RL, it is feasible to synthesize access protocols that can sustain network throughput at high traffic loads, which is not feasible in the ALOHA-based systems. The ability of the system to provide throughput fairness under network and traffic heterogeneities are also experimentally demonstrated.

The mechanism does not rely on carrier sensing, network time-synchronization, collision detection, and other low level complex operations, thus making it ideal for ultra simple transceiver hardware used in resource constrained sensor and IoT networks. Additionally, the ability of independent protocol learning by the nodes makes the system robust and adaptive to the changes in network and traffic conditions. It is shown that the nodes can be trained to learn to avoid collisions, and to achieve network throughputs that are comparable to ALOHA based access protocols in sensor and IoT networks with simplest transceiver hardware. It is also shown that using RL, it is feasible to synthesize access protocols that can sustain network throughput at high traffic loads, which is not feasible in the ALOHA-based systems. The ability of the system to provide throughput fairness under network and traffic heterogeneities are also experimentally demonstrated.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了使用强化学习 (RL) 进行在线协议合成的概念。该研究是在具有超低复杂性无线收发器的传感器和物联网网络的背景下进行的。本文介绍了 RL 和 Multi Armed Bandit (MAB)（一种特定类型的 RL）在不同网络和流量条件下用于媒体访问控制 (MAC) 的使用。然后介绍了一种新颖的基于学习的协议综合框架，该框架解决了随机访问和时隙网络的介质访问中的特定困难和限制。该机制不依赖于载波侦听、网络时间同步、冲突检测和其他低级复杂操作，因此非常适合资源受限的传感器和物联网网络中使用的超简单收发器硬件。此外，节点独立协议学习的能力使系统具有鲁棒性并能够适应网络和流量条件的变化。结果表明，可以训练节点学习避免冲突，并使用最简单的收发器硬件实现与传感器和物联网网络中基于 ALOHA 的访问协议相当的网络吞吐量。它还表明，使用 RL 可以合成能够在高流量负载下维持网络吞吐量的访问协议，这在基于 ALOHA 的系统中是不可行的。该系统在网络和流量异构情况下提供吞吐量公平性的能力也得到了实验证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）和多臂老虎机（MAB）的协议合成框架，用于资源受限的无线传感器和物联网网络中的介质访问控制（MAC）。
AI.motivation: 传统协议如ALOHA在高流量下性能不足，且依赖复杂硬件操作（如载波侦听、碰撞检测），难以适应资源受限设备的需求。
AI.method: 采用RL和MAB方法，设计无需载波侦听、时间同步等复杂操作的协议合成机制，节点通过独立学习避免碰撞并适应网络变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在简单硬件下实现了与ALOHA相当的吞吐量，且在高流量下保持稳定吞吐，同时具备网络异构性下的吞吐公平性。
AI.conclusion: 基于RL的协议合成框架为资源受限网络提供了鲁棒、自适应的解决方案，优于传统ALOHA系统在高负载场景下的表现。

search_text: Reinforcement Learning for Protocol Synthesis in Resource-Constrained Wireless Sensor and IoT Networks 资源受限的无线传感器和物联网网络中协议合成的强化学习 This article explores the concepts of online protocol synthesis using Reinforcement Learning (RL). The study is performed in the context of sensor and IoT networks with ultra low complexity wireless transceivers. The paper introduces the use of RL and Multi Armed Bandit (MAB), a specific type of RL, for Medium Access Control (MAC) under different network and traffic conditions. It then introduces a novel learning based protocol synthesis framework that addresses specific difficulties and limitations in medium access for both random access and time slotted networks. The mechanism does not rely on carrier sensing, network time-synchronization, collision detection, and other low level complex operations, thus making it ideal for ultra simple transceiver hardware used in resource constrained sensor and IoT networks. Additionally, the ability of independent protocol learning by the nodes makes the system robust and adaptive to the changes in network and traffic conditions. It is shown that the nodes can be trained to learn to avoid collisions, and to achieve network throughputs that are comparable to ALOHA based access protocols in sensor and IoT networks with simplest transceiver hardware. It is also shown that using RL, it is feasible to synthesize access protocols that can sustain network throughput at high traffic loads, which is not feasible in the ALOHA-based systems. The ability of the system to provide throughput fairness under network and traffic heterogeneities are also experimentally demonstrated. 本文探讨了使用强化学习 (RL) 进行在线协议合成的概念。该研究是在具有超低复杂性无线收发器的传感器和物联网网络的背景下进行的。本文介绍了 RL 和 Multi Armed Bandit (MAB)（一种特定类型的 RL）在不同网络和流量条件下用于媒体访问控制 (MAC) 的使用。然后介绍了一种新颖的基于学习的协议综合框架，该框架解决了随机访问和时隙网络的介质访问中的特定困难和限制。该机制不依赖于载波侦听、网络时间同步、冲突检测和其他低级复杂操作，因此非常适合资源受限的传感器和物联网网络中使用的超简单收发器硬件。此外，节点独立协议学习的能力使系统具有鲁棒性并能够适应网络和流量条件的变化。结果表明，可以训练节点学习避免冲突，并使用最简单的收发器硬件实现与传感器和物联网网络中基于 ALOHA 的访问协议相当的网络吞吐量。它还表明，使用 RL 可以合成能够在高流量负载下维持网络吞吐量的访问协议，这在基于 ALOHA 的系统中是不可行的。该系统在网络和流量异构情况下提供吞吐量公平性的能力也得到了实验证明。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）和多臂老虎机（MAB）的协议合成框架，用于资源受限的无线传感器和物联网网络中的介质访问控制（MAC）。 Hrishikesh Dutta,Amit Kumar Bhuyan,Subir Biswas cs.NI,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xuming Zhang,Jian Yan,Jia Tian,Wei Li,Xingfa Gu,Qingjiu Tian
title: Objective Evaluation-based High-efficiency Learning Framework for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 基于客观评价的高光谱图像分类高效学习框架
abstract: Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to hyperspectral image (HSI) classification with remarkable performance. Because of limited labelled HSI data, earlier studies primarily adopted a patch-based classification framework, which divides images into overlapping patches for training and testing. However, this approach results in redundant computations and possible information leakage. In this study, we propose an objective evaluation-based high-efficiency learning framework for tiny HSI classification. This framework comprises two main parts: (i) a leakage-free balanced sampling strategy, and (ii) a modified end-to-end fully convolutional network (FCN) architecture that optimizes the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. The leakage-free balanced sampling strategy generates balanced and non-overlapping training and testing data by partitioning an HSI and the ground truth image into small windows, each of which corresponds to one training or testing sample. The proposed high-efficiency FCN exhibits a pixel-to-pixel architecture with modifications aimed at faster inference speed and improved parameter efficiency. Experiments conducted on four representative datasets demonstrated that the proposed sampling strategy can provide objective performance evaluation and that the proposed network outperformed many state-of-the-art approaches with respect to the speed/accuracy tradeoff. Our source code is available at https://github.com/xmzhang2018.
summary: Deep learning methods have been successfully applied to hyperspectral image (HSI) classification with remarkable performance. Because of limited labelled HSI data, earlier studies primarily adopted a patch-based classification framework, which divides images into overlapping patches for training and testing. However, this approach results in redundant computations and possible information leakage. In this study, we propose an objective evaluation-based high-efficiency learning framework for tiny HSI classification. This framework comprises two main parts: (i) a leakage-free balanced sampling strategy, and (ii) a modified end-to-end fully convolutional network (FCN) architecture that optimizes the trade-off between accuracy and efficiency. The leakage-free balanced sampling strategy generates balanced and non-overlapping training and testing data by partitioning an HSI and the ground truth image into small windows, each of which corresponds to one training or testing sample. The proposed high-efficiency FCN exhibits a pixel-to-pixel architecture with modifications aimed at faster inference speed and improved parameter efficiency. Experiments conducted on four representative datasets demonstrated that the proposed sampling strategy can provide objective performance evaluation and that the proposed network outperformed many state-of-the-art approaches with respect to the speed/accuracy tradeoff. Our source code is available at https://github.com/xmzhang2018.
abstract_zh: 深度学习方法已成功应用于高光谱图像（HSI）分类，并具有显着的性能。由于标记的 HSI 数据有限，早期的研究主要采用基于块的分类框架，将图像划分为重叠的块进行训练和测试。然而，这种方法会导致冗余计算和可能的信息泄漏。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于客观评估的微型 HSI 分类的高效学习框架。该框架包括两个主要部分：（i）无泄漏平衡采样策略，以及（ii）改进的端到端全卷积网络（FCN）架构，可优化准确性和效率之间的权衡。无泄漏平衡采样策略通过将 HSI 和地面实况图像划分为小窗口来生成平衡且不重叠的训练和测试数据，每个窗口对应一个训练或测试样本。所提出的高效 FCN 展示了一种像素到像素的架构，并进行了一些修改，旨在加快推理速度并提高参数效率。在四个代表性数据集上进行的实验表明，所提出的采样策略可以提供客观的性能评估，并且所提出的网络在速度/准确性权衡方面优于许多最先进的方法。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/xmzhang2018 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于客观评估的高效学习框架，用于解决高光谱图像分类中的数据冗余和信息泄漏问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于补丁的分类方法因重叠区域导致计算冗余和信息泄漏，且高光谱图像标注数据有限，需更高效的分类框架。
AI.method: 框架包含两部分：（i）无泄漏的平衡采样策略，通过划分图像窗口生成非重叠训练/测试数据；（ii）改进的端到端全卷积网络（FCN），优化速度与精度的平衡。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实验表明，该方法在速度/精度权衡上优于现有方法，采样策略可提供客观性能评估。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了传统方法的冗余与泄漏问题，在高光谱图像分类中实现了更优的效率与精度平衡。

title: MoreauGrad: Sparse and Robust Interpretation of Neural Networks via Moreau Envelope
title_zh: MoreauGrad：通过 Moreau 包络对神经网络进行稀疏和鲁棒的解释
abstract: Explaining the predictions of deep neural nets has been a topic of great interest in the computer vision literature. While several gradient-based interpretation schemes have been proposed to reveal the influential variables in a neural net's prediction, standard gradient-based interpretation frameworks have been commonly observed to lack robustness to input perturbations and flexibility for incorporating prior knowledge of sparsity and group-sparsity structures. In this work, we propose MoreauGrad as an interpretation scheme based on the classifier neural net's Moreau envelope. We demonstrate that MoreauGrad results in a smooth and robust interpretation of a multi-layer neural network and can be efficiently computed through first-order optimization methods. Furthermore, we show that MoreauGrad can be naturally combined with $L_1$-norm regularization techniques to output a sparse or group-sparse explanation which are prior conditions applicable to a wide range of deep learning applications. We empirically evaluate the proposed MoreauGrad scheme on standard computer vision datasets, showing the qualitative and quantitative success of the MoreauGrad approach in comparison to standard gradient-based interpretation methods.
summary: Explaining the predictions of deep neural nets has been a topic of great interest in the computer vision literature. While several gradient-based interpretation schemes have been proposed to reveal the influential variables in a neural net's prediction, standard gradient-based interpretation frameworks have been commonly observed to lack robustness to input perturbations and flexibility for incorporating prior knowledge of sparsity and group-sparsity structures. In this work, we propose MoreauGrad as an interpretation scheme based on the classifier neural net's Moreau envelope. We demonstrate that MoreauGrad results in a smooth and robust interpretation of a multi-layer neural network and can be efficiently computed through first-order optimization methods. Furthermore, we show that MoreauGrad can be naturally combined with $L_1$-norm regularization techniques to output a sparse or group-sparse explanation which are prior conditions applicable to a wide range of deep learning applications. We empirically evaluate the proposed MoreauGrad scheme on standard computer vision datasets, showing the qualitative and quantitative success of the MoreauGrad approach in comparison to standard gradient-based interpretation methods.
abstract_zh: 解释深度神经网络的预测一直是计算机视觉文献中非常感兴趣的话题。虽然已经提出了几种基于梯度的解释方案来揭示神经网络预测中的影响变量，但通常观察到标准的基于梯度的解释框架缺乏对输入扰动的鲁棒性和结合稀疏性和群稀疏结构先验知识的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们提出 MoreauGrad 作为基于分类器神经网络的 Moreau 包络的解释方案。我们证明 MoreauGrad 可以对多层神经网络进行平滑且稳健的解释，并且可以通过一阶优化方法进行有效计算。此外，我们表明 MoreauGrad 可以自然地与 $L_1$-norm 正则化技术结合，以输出稀疏或组稀疏解释，这是适用于广泛的深度学习应用的先验条件。我们在标准计算机视觉数据集上对所提出的 MoreauGrad 方案进行了实证评估，表明与标准的基于梯度的解释方法相比，MoreauGrad 方法在定性和定量方面取得了成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MoreauGrad方法，通过Moreau包络实现神经网络的稀疏且鲁棒的解释。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度解释方法对输入扰动不鲁棒，且难以结合稀疏性先验知识，需改进解释的鲁棒性和灵活性。
AI.method: 基于分类器神经网络的Moreau包络构建解释框架，结合L1正则化实现稀疏或组稀疏解释，并通过一阶优化方法高效计算。
AI.result: 在标准计算机视觉数据集上验证，MoreauGrad在定性和定量指标上优于传统梯度解释方法。
AI.conclusion: MoreauGrad通过理论分析与实验验证，为深度学习模型提供了更鲁棒且符合稀疏先验的解释方案。

search_text: MoreauGrad: Sparse and Robust Interpretation of Neural Networks via Moreau Envelope MoreauGrad：通过 Moreau 包络对神经网络进行稀疏和鲁棒的解释 Explaining the predictions of deep neural nets has been a topic of great interest in the computer vision literature. While several gradient-based interpretation schemes have been proposed to reveal the influential variables in a neural net's prediction, standard gradient-based interpretation frameworks have been commonly observed to lack robustness to input perturbations and flexibility for incorporating prior knowledge of sparsity and group-sparsity structures. In this work, we propose MoreauGrad as an interpretation scheme based on the classifier neural net's Moreau envelope. We demonstrate that MoreauGrad results in a smooth and robust interpretation of a multi-layer neural network and can be efficiently computed through first-order optimization methods. Furthermore, we show that MoreauGrad can be naturally combined with $L_1$-norm regularization techniques to output a sparse or group-sparse explanation which are prior conditions applicable to a wide range of deep learning applications. We empirically evaluate the proposed MoreauGrad scheme on standard computer vision datasets, showing the qualitative and quantitative success of the MoreauGrad approach in comparison to standard gradient-based interpretation methods. 解释深度神经网络的预测一直是计算机视觉文献中非常感兴趣的话题。虽然已经提出了几种基于梯度的解释方案来揭示神经网络预测中的影响变量，但通常观察到标准的基于梯度的解释框架缺乏对输入扰动的鲁棒性和结合稀疏性和群稀疏结构先验知识的灵活性。在这项工作中，我们提出 MoreauGrad 作为基于分类器神经网络的 Moreau 包络的解释方案。我们证明 MoreauGrad 可以对多层神经网络进行平滑且稳健的解释，并且可以通过一阶优化方法进行有效计算。此外，我们表明 MoreauGrad 可以自然地与 $L_1$-norm 正则化技术结合，以输出稀疏或组稀疏解释，这是适用于广泛的深度学习应用的先验条件。我们在标准计算机视觉数据集上对所提出的 MoreauGrad 方案进行了实证评估，表明与标准的基于梯度的解释方法相比，MoreauGrad 方法在定性和定量方面取得了成功。 本文提出MoreauGrad方法，通过Moreau包络实现神经网络的稀疏且鲁棒的解释。 Jingwei Zhang,Farzan Farnia cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Zongmin Liu,Jirui Wang,Jie Li,Pengda Liu,Kai Ren
title: A Novel Improved Mask RCNN for Multiple Targets Detection in the Indoor Complex Scenes
title_zh: 一种用于室内复杂场景中多目标检测的新型改进掩模 RCNN
abstract: With the expansive aging of global population, service robot with living assistance applied in indoor scenes will serve as a crucial role in the field of elderly care and health in the future. Service robots need to detect multiple targets when completing auxiliary tasks. However, indoor scenes are usually complex and there are many types of interference factors, leading to great challenges in the multiple targets detection. To overcome this technical difficulty, a novel improved Mask RCNN method for multiple targets detection in the indoor complex scenes is proposed in this paper. The improved model utilizes Mask RCNN as the network framework. On this basis, Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) with channel mechanism and space mechanism is integrated, and the influence of different background, distance, angle and interference factors are comprehensively considered. Meanwhile, in order to evaluate the detection and identification effects of the established model, a comprehensive evaluation system based on loss function and Mean Average Precision (mAP) is established. For verification, experiments on the detection and identification effects under different distances, backgrounds, angles and interference factors were conducted. The results show that designed model improves the accuracy to a higher level and has a better anti-interference ability than other methods when the detection speed was nearly the same.
summary: With the expansive aging of global population, service robot with living assistance applied in indoor scenes will serve as a crucial role in the field of elderly care and health in the future. Service robots need to detect multiple targets when completing auxiliary tasks. However, indoor scenes are usually complex and there are many types of interference factors, leading to great challenges in the multiple targets detection. To overcome this technical difficulty, a novel improved Mask RCNN method for multiple targets detection in the indoor complex scenes is proposed in this paper. The improved model utilizes Mask RCNN as the network framework. On this basis, Convolutional Block Attention Module (CBAM) with channel mechanism and space mechanism is integrated, and the influence of different background, distance, angle and interference factors are comprehensively considered. Meanwhile, in order to evaluate the detection and identification effects of the established model, a comprehensive evaluation system based on loss function and Mean Average Precision (mAP) is established. For verification, experiments on the detection and identification effects under different distances, backgrounds, angles and interference factors were conducted. The results show that designed model improves the accuracy to a higher level and has a better anti-interference ability than other methods when the detection speed was nearly the same.
abstract_zh: 随着全球人口老龄化的加剧，应用于室内场景的生活辅助服务机器人将在未来养老健康领域发挥重要作用。服务机器人在完成辅助任务时需要检测多个目标。然而，室内场景通常比较复杂，干扰因素种类较多，给多目标检测带来了巨大的挑战。为了克服这一技术难题，本文提出了一种用于室内复杂场景中多目标检测的改进Mask RCNN方法。改进后的模型采用Mask RCNN作为网络框架。在此基础上，集成了具有通道机制和空间机制的卷积块注意力模块（CBAM），综合考虑不同背景、距离、角度和干扰因素的影响。同时，为了评估所建立模型的检测和识别效果，建立了基于损失函数和平均精度（mAP）的综合评价体系。为了验证，对不同距离、背景、角度和干扰因素下的检测识别效果进行了实验。结果表明，在检测速度几乎相同的情况下，所设计的模型比其他方法提高了精度，并且具有更好的抗干扰能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的Mask RCNN方法，用于解决室内复杂场景中多目标检测的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着全球人口老龄化加剧，服务机器人需在复杂室内环境中准确检测多目标以辅助老年人护理，但现有技术受背景、距离、角度等干扰因素影响较大。
AI.method: 以Mask RCNN为框架，集成CBAM模块（含通道机制与空间机制），综合考虑背景、距离、角度及干扰因素，并构建基于损失函数和mAP的评估体系。
AI.result: 实验表明，改进模型在检测速度相近的情况下，检测精度显著提升且抗干扰能力优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效提升了复杂室内场景下多目标检测的准确性与鲁棒性，为服务机器人应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Tristan S. W. Stevens,Hans van Gorp,Faik C. Meral,Junseob Shin,Jason Yu,Jean-Luc Robert,Ruud J. G. van Sloun
title: Removing Structured Noise with Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型消除结构化噪声
comment: 20 pages, 8 figures, Transactions on Machine Learning Research
comments: 20 pages, 8 figures, Transactions on Machine Learning Research
abstract: Solving ill-posed inverse problems requires careful formulation of prior beliefs over the signals of interest and an accurate description of their manifestation into noisy measurements. Handcrafted signal priors based on e.g. sparsity are increasingly replaced by data-driven deep generative models, and several groups have recently shown that state-of-the-art score-based diffusion models yield particularly strong performance and flexibility. In this paper, we show that the powerful paradigm of posterior sampling with diffusion models can be extended to include rich, structured, noise models. To that end, we propose a joint conditional reverse diffusion process with learned scores for the noise and signal-generating distribution. We demonstrate strong performance gains across various inverse problems with structured noise, outperforming competitive baselines that use normalizing flows and adversarial networks. This opens up new opportunities and relevant practical applications of diffusion modeling for inverse problems in the context of non-Gaussian measurement models.
summary: Solving ill-posed inverse problems requires careful formulation of prior beliefs over the signals of interest and an accurate description of their manifestation into noisy measurements. Handcrafted signal priors based on e.g. sparsity are increasingly replaced by data-driven deep generative models, and several groups have recently shown that state-of-the-art score-based diffusion models yield particularly strong performance and flexibility. In this paper, we show that the powerful paradigm of posterior sampling with diffusion models can be extended to include rich, structured, noise models. To that end, we propose a joint conditional reverse diffusion process with learned scores for the noise and signal-generating distribution. We demonstrate strong performance gains across various inverse problems with structured noise, outperforming competitive baselines that use normalizing flows and adversarial networks. This opens up new opportunities and relevant practical applications of diffusion modeling for inverse problems in the context of non-Gaussian measurement models.
abstract_zh: 解决不适定反问题需要仔细制定对感兴趣信号的先验信念，并准确描述其在噪声测量中的表现。基于例如手工制作的信号先验稀疏性越来越多地被数据驱动的深度生成模型所取代，并且几个小组最近表明，最先进的基于分数的扩散模型可以产生特别强大的性能和灵活性。在本文中，我们证明了使用扩散模型的后验采样的强大范式可以扩展到包括丰富的结构化噪声模型。为此，我们提出了一种联合条件反向扩散过程，其中包含噪声和信号生成分布的学习分数。我们在具有结构化噪声的各种反问题上展示了强大的性能提升，优于使用标准化流和对抗网络的竞争基线。这为非高斯测量模型背景下的反问题扩散建模开辟了新的机会和相关的实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用扩散模型解决具有结构化噪声的反问题，通过联合学习噪声和信号分布的分数来提升去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 传统反问题求解依赖人工设计的信号先验（如稀疏性），但难以处理复杂结构化噪声。数据驱动的扩散模型虽表现优异，但尚未有效整合结构化噪声建模。
AI.method: 设计联合条件反向扩散过程，同时学习信号生成分布与噪声分布的分数，扩展扩散模型的后验采样框架以适应结构化噪声。
AI.result: 在多个结构化噪声反问题中显著优于归一化流和对抗网络等基线方法，验证了模型有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非高斯测量模型下的反问题求解提供了新范式，拓展了扩散模型在实际应用中的潜力。

tldr: 本文提出利用扩散模型解决具有结构化噪声的反问题，通过联合学习噪声和信号分布的分数来提升去噪效果。
motivation: 传统反问题求解依赖人工设计的信号先验（如稀疏性），但难以处理复杂结构化噪声。数据驱动的扩散模型虽表现优异，但尚未有效整合结构化噪声建模。
method: 设计联合条件反向扩散过程，同时学习信号生成分布与噪声分布的分数，扩展扩散模型的后验采样框架以适应结构化噪声。
result: 在多个结构化噪声反问题中显著优于归一化流和对抗网络等基线方法，验证了模型有效性。
conclusion: 该方法为非高斯测量模型下的反问题求解提供了新范式，拓展了扩散模型在实际应用中的潜力。
search_text: Removing Structured Noise with Diffusion Models 使用扩散模型消除结构化噪声 Solving ill-posed inverse problems requires careful formulation of prior beliefs over the signals of interest and an accurate description of their manifestation into noisy measurements. Handcrafted signal priors based on e.g. sparsity are increasingly replaced by data-driven deep generative models, and several groups have recently shown that state-of-the-art score-based diffusion models yield particularly strong performance and flexibility. In this paper, we show that the powerful paradigm of posterior sampling with diffusion models can be extended to include rich, structured, noise models. To that end, we propose a joint conditional reverse diffusion process with learned scores for the noise and signal-generating distribution. We demonstrate strong performance gains across various inverse problems with structured noise, outperforming competitive baselines that use normalizing flows and adversarial networks. This opens up new opportunities and relevant practical applications of diffusion modeling for inverse problems in the context of non-Gaussian measurement models. 解决不适定反问题需要仔细制定对感兴趣信号的先验信念，并准确描述其在噪声测量中的表现。基于例如手工制作的信号先验稀疏性越来越多地被数据驱动的深度生成模型所取代，并且几个小组最近表明，最先进的基于分数的扩散模型可以产生特别强大的性能和灵活性。在本文中，我们证明了使用扩散模型的后验采样的强大范式可以扩展到包括丰富的结构化噪声模型。为此，我们提出了一种联合条件反向扩散过程，其中包含噪声和信号生成分布的学习分数。我们在具有结构化噪声的各种反问题上展示了强大的性能提升，优于使用标准化流和对抗网络的竞争基线。这为非高斯测量模型背景下的反问题扩散建模开辟了新的机会和相关的实际应用。 本文提出利用扩散模型解决具有结构化噪声的反问题，通过联合学习噪声和信号分布的分数来提升去噪效果。 Tristan S. W. Stevens,Hans van Gorp,Faik C. Meral,Junseob Shin,Jason Yu,Jean-Luc Robert,Ruud J. G. van Sloun cs.LG,eess.IV,eess.SP

authors_text: Abderrazek Azri,Cécile Favre,Nouria Harbi,Jérôme Darmont,Camille Noûs
title: Rumor Classification through a Multimodal Fusion Framework and Ensemble Learning
title_zh: 通过多模态融合框架和集成学习进行谣言分类
abstract: The proliferation of rumors on social media has become a major concern due to its ability to create a devastating impact. Manually assessing the veracity of social media messages is a very time-consuming task that can be much helped by machine learning. Most message veracity verification methods only exploit textual contents and metadata. Very few take both textual and visual contents, and more particularly images, into account. Moreover, prior works have used many classical machine learning models to detect rumors. However, although recent studies have proven the effectiveness of ensemble machine learning approaches, such models have seldom been applied. Thus, in this paper, we propose a set of advanced image features that are inspired from the field of image quality assessment, and introduce the Multimodal fusiON framework to assess message veracIty in social neTwORks (MONITOR), which exploits all message features by exploring various machine learning models. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ensemble learning algorithms for rumor detection by using five metalearning models. Eventually, we conduct extensive experiments on two real-world datasets. Results show that MONITOR outperforms state-of-the-art machine learning baselines and that ensemble models significantly increase MONITOR's performance.
summary: The proliferation of rumors on social media has become a major concern due to its ability to create a devastating impact. Manually assessing the veracity of social media messages is a very time-consuming task that can be much helped by machine learning. Most message veracity verification methods only exploit textual contents and metadata. Very few take both textual and visual contents, and more particularly images, into account. Moreover, prior works have used many classical machine learning models to detect rumors. However, although recent studies have proven the effectiveness of ensemble machine learning approaches, such models have seldom been applied. Thus, in this paper, we propose a set of advanced image features that are inspired from the field of image quality assessment, and introduce the Multimodal fusiON framework to assess message veracIty in social neTwORks (MONITOR), which exploits all message features by exploring various machine learning models. Moreover, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ensemble learning algorithms for rumor detection by using five metalearning models. Eventually, we conduct extensive experiments on two real-world datasets. Results show that MONITOR outperforms state-of-the-art machine learning baselines and that ensemble models significantly increase MONITOR's performance.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体上谣言的泛滥已成为一个主要问题，因为它能够产生毁灭性的影响。手动评估社交媒体消息的真实性是一项非常耗时的任务，而机器学习可以提供很大帮助。大多数消息准确性验证方法仅利用文本内容和元数据。很少有人同时考虑文本和视觉内容，尤其是图像。此外，先前的工作已经使用了许多经典的机器学习模型来检测谣言。然而，尽管最近的研究证明了集成机器学习方法的有效性，但此类模型很少得到应用。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一组受图像质量评估领域启发的高级图像特征，并引入了多模态融合框架来评估社交网络中的消息准确性（MONITOR），该框架通过探索各种机器学习模型来利用所有消息特征。此外，我们通过使用五个元学习模型证明了集成学习算法用于谣言检测的有效性。最终，我们对两个真实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，MONITOR 的性能优于最先进的机器学习基线，并且集成模型显着提高了 MONITOR 的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合多模态融合框架与集成学习的谣言分类方法MONITOR，通过融合文本、视觉信息及元数据提升谣言检测效果。
AI.motivation: 现有谣言检测方法多依赖文本和元数据，忽视图像等视觉信息，且未充分应用集成学习提升性能。
AI.method: 设计基于图像质量评估的先进图像特征提取方法，构建多模态融合框架MONITOR，并引入五种元学习模型进行集成学习。
AI.result: 在两个真实数据集上实验表明，MONITOR优于现有基线方法，集成模型显著提升分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模态信息融合与集成学习相结合能有效提升社交媒体谣言检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Luca Casini,Valentina Orrù,Andrea Montanucci,Nicolò Marchetti,Marco Roccetti
title: Archaeological Sites Detection with a Human-AI Collaboration Workflow
title_zh: 使用人机协作工作流程进行考古遗址检测
abstract: This paper illustrates the results obtained by using pre-trained semantic segmentation deep learning models for the detection of archaeological sites within the Mesopotamian floodplains environment. The models were fine-tuned using openly available satellite imagery and vector shapes coming from a large corpus of annotations (i.e., surveyed sites). A randomized test showed that the best model reaches a detection accuracy in the neighborhood of 80%. Integrating domain expertise was crucial to define how to build the dataset and how to evaluate the predictions, since defining if a proposed mask counts as a prediction is very subjective. Furthermore, even an inaccurate prediction can be useful when put into context and interpreted by a trained archaeologist. Coming from these considerations we close the paper with a vision for a Human-AI collaboration workflow. Starting with an annotated dataset that is refined by the human expert we obtain a model whose predictions can either be combined to create a heatmap, to be overlaid on satellite and/or aerial imagery, or alternatively can be vectorized to make further analysis in a GIS software easier and automatic. In turn, the archaeologists can analyze the predictions, organize their onsite surveys, and refine the dataset with new, corrected, annotation
summary: This paper illustrates the results obtained by using pre-trained semantic segmentation deep learning models for the detection of archaeological sites within the Mesopotamian floodplains environment. The models were fine-tuned using openly available satellite imagery and vector shapes coming from a large corpus of annotations (i.e., surveyed sites). A randomized test showed that the best model reaches a detection accuracy in the neighborhood of 80%. Integrating domain expertise was crucial to define how to build the dataset and how to evaluate the predictions, since defining if a proposed mask counts as a prediction is very subjective. Furthermore, even an inaccurate prediction can be useful when put into context and interpreted by a trained archaeologist. Coming from these considerations we close the paper with a vision for a Human-AI collaboration workflow. Starting with an annotated dataset that is refined by the human expert we obtain a model whose predictions can either be combined to create a heatmap, to be overlaid on satellite and/or aerial imagery, or alternatively can be vectorized to make further analysis in a GIS software easier and automatic. In turn, the archaeologists can analyze the predictions, organize their onsite surveys, and refine the dataset with new, corrected, annotation
abstract_zh: 本文说明了使用预训练的语义分割深度学习模型检测美索不达米亚洪泛区环境中的考古遗址所获得的结果。这些模型使用公开的卫星图像和来自大型注释语料库（即调查站点）的矢量形状进行了微调。随机测试表明，最佳模型的检测准确率约为 80%。整合领域专业知识对于定义如何构建数据集以及如何评估预测至关重要，因为定义建议的掩模是否算作预测是非常主观的。此外，即使是不准确的预测，如果将其置于上下文中并由训练有素的考古学家进行解释，也会很有用。出于这些考虑，我们以人类与人工智能协作工作流程的愿景来结束本文。从由人类专家精炼的带注释的数据集开始，我们获得一个模型，该模型的预测可以组合起来创建热图，覆盖在卫星和/或航空图像上，或者可以进行矢量化以使 GIS 软件中的进一步分析变得更容易和自动。反过来，考古学家可以分析预测，组织现场调查，并使用新的、更正的注释来完善数据集

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种结合人类专家与人工智能协作的工作流程，用于在美索不达米亚泛滥平原环境中检测考古遗址。
AI.motivation: 由于考古遗址的检测具有高度主观性，需要结合领域专业知识与人工智能技术来提高检测的准确性和实用性。
AI.method: 使用预训练的语义分割深度学习模型，并利用公开的卫星图像和矢量形状数据集进行微调，结合考古学家的专业知识进行数据集构建和预测评估。
AI.result: 最佳模型的检测准确率接近80%，预测结果可用于生成热图或矢量化数据，辅助进一步的GIS分析和实地考察。
AI.conclusion: 结合人类专家与人工智能的工作流程能够提高考古遗址检测的效率与准确性，并为后续的实地调查和数据修正提供支持。

abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) continues to advance rapidly, it becomes increasingly important to consider AI's ethical and societal implications. In this paper, we present a bottom-up mapping of the current state of research at the intersection of Human-Centered AI, Ethical, and Responsible AI (HCER-AI) by thematically reviewing and analyzing 164 research papers from leading conferences in ethical, social, and human factors of AI: AIES, CHI, CSCW, and FAccT. The ongoing research in HCER-AI places emphasis on governance, fairness, and explainability. These conferences, however, concentrate on specific themes rather than encompassing all aspects. While AIES has fewer papers on HCER-AI, it emphasizes governance and rarely publishes papers about privacy, security, and human flourishing. FAccT publishes more on governance and lacks papers on privacy, security, and human flourishing. CHI and CSCW, as more established conferences, have a broader research portfolio. We find that the current emphasis on governance and fairness in AI research may not adequately address the potential unforeseen and unknown implications of AI. Therefore, we recommend that future research should expand its scope and diversify resources to prepare for these potential consequences. This could involve exploring additional areas such as privacy, security, human flourishing, and explainability.

The ongoing research in HCER-AI places emphasis on governance, fairness, and explainability. These conferences, however, concentrate on specific themes rather than encompassing all aspects. While AIES has fewer papers on HCER-AI, it emphasizes governance and rarely publishes papers about privacy, security, and human flourishing. FAccT publishes more on governance and lacks papers on privacy, security, and human flourishing. CHI and CSCW, as more established conferences, have a broader research portfolio. We find that the current emphasis on governance and fairness in AI research may not adequately address the potential unforeseen and unknown implications of AI. Therefore, we recommend that future research should expand its scope and diversify resources to prepare for these potential consequences. This could involve exploring additional areas such as privacy, security, human flourishing, and explainability.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能 (AI) 持续快速发展，考虑 AI 的道德和社会影响变得越来越重要。在本文中，我们通过主题回顾和分析来自人工智能伦理、社会和人为因素领域领先会议（AIES、CHI、CSCW 和 FaccT）的 164 篇研究论文，呈现了以人为中心的人工智能、道德和责任人工智能 (HCER-AI) 交叉点的研究现状的自下而上的映射。 HCER-AI 正在进行的研究强调治理、公平性和可解释性。然而，这些会议集中于特定主题，而不是涵盖所有方面。虽然 AIES 关于 HCER-AI 的论文较少，但它强调治理，很少发表有关隐私、安全和人类繁荣的论文。 FAccT 发表了更多有关治理的论文，但缺乏有关隐私、安全和人类繁荣的论文。 CHI 和 CSCW 作为更成熟的会议，拥有更广泛的研究组合。我们发现，目前人工智能研究中对治理和公平的强调可能无法充分解决人工智能潜在的不可预见和未知的影响。因此，我们建议未来的研究应扩大其范围并使资源多样化，为这些潜在后果做好准备。这可能涉及探索隐私、安全、人类繁荣和可解释性等其他领域。

AI.tldr: 本文通过主题回顾和分析164篇来自AIES、CHI、CSCW和FAccT会议的论文，系统梳理了人本、伦理和负责任AI（HCER-AI）领域的研究现状。
AI.motivation: 随着人工智能的快速发展，需关注其伦理和社会影响，但现有研究在治理、公平性等方向可能存在盲区，需系统梳理研究现状以指导未来方向。
AI.method: 采用自下而上的主题分析法，对四大顶级会议中与HCER-AI相关的164篇论文进行分类和主题归纳，对比各会议的研究重点与覆盖范围。
AI.result: 发现当前研究集中于治理、公平性和可解释性，但AIES和FAccT缺乏隐私、安全及人类福祉相关研究，而CHI和CSCW覆盖更广。
AI.conclusion: 建议未来研究需扩展隐私、安全、人类福祉等方向，避免因研究范围局限而忽视AI的潜在未知影响。

search_text: A Systematic Literature Review of Human-Centered, Ethical, and Responsible AI 以人为本、有道德和负责任的人工智能的系统文献综述 As Artificial Intelligence (AI) continues to advance rapidly, it becomes increasingly important to consider AI's ethical and societal implications. The ongoing research in HCER-AI places emphasis on governance, fairness, and explainability. These conferences, however, concentrate on specific themes rather than encompassing all aspects. While AIES has fewer papers on HCER-AI, it emphasizes governance and rarely publishes papers about privacy, security, and human flourishing. FAccT publishes more on governance and lacks papers on privacy, security, and human flourishing. CHI and CSCW, as more established conferences, have a broader research portfolio. We find that the current emphasis on governance and fairness in AI research may not adequately address the potential unforeseen and unknown implications of AI. Therefore, we recommend that future research should expand its scope and diversify resources to prepare for these potential consequences. title: Deep Learning from Parametrically Generated Virtual Buildings for Real-World Object Recognition
title_zh: 从参数化生成的虚拟建筑中进行深度学习以实现现实世界的对象识别
abstract: We study the use of parametric building information modeling (BIM) to automatically generate training data for artificial neural networks (ANNs) to recognize building objects in photos. Teaching artificial intelligence (AI) machines to detect building objects in images is the foundation toward AI-assisted semantic 3D reconstruction of existing buildings. However, there exists the challenge of acquiring training data which is typically human-annotated, that is, unless a computer machine can generate high-quality data to train itself for a certain task. In that vein, we trained ANNs solely on realistic computer-generated images of 3D BIM models which were parametrically and automatically generated using the BIMGenE program. The ANN training result demonstrated generalizability and good semantic segmentation on a test case as well as arbitrary photos of buildings that are outside the range of the training data, which is significant for the future of training AI with generated data for solving real-world architectural problems.
summary: We study the use of parametric building information modeling (BIM) to automatically generate training data for artificial neural networks (ANNs) to recognize building objects in photos. Teaching artificial intelligence (AI) machines to detect building objects in images is the foundation toward AI-assisted semantic 3D reconstruction of existing buildings. However, there exists the challenge of acquiring training data which is typically human-annotated, that is, unless a computer machine can generate high-quality data to train itself for a certain task. In that vein, we trained ANNs solely on realistic computer-generated images of 3D BIM models which were parametrically and automatically generated using the BIMGenE program. The ANN training result demonstrated generalizability and good semantic segmentation on a test case as well as arbitrary photos of buildings that are outside the range of the training data, which is significant for the future of training AI with generated data for solving real-world architectural problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究使用参数化建筑信息模型 (BIM) 自动生成人工神经网络 (ANN) 的训练数据，以识别照片中的建筑对象。教导人工智能 (AI) 机器检测图像中的建筑对象是人工智能辅助现有建筑语义 3D 重建的基础。然而，获取通常由人工注释的训练数据存在挑战，也就是说，除非计算机能够生成高质量的数据来针对特定任务进行自我训练。本着这种精神，我们仅根据 3D BIM 模型的计算机生成的真实图像来训练 ANN，这些图像是使用 BIMGenE 程序自动参数化生成的。 ANN 训练结果在测试用例以及训练数据范围之外的任意建筑物照片上展示了通用性和良好的语义分割，这对于未来使用生成的数据训练 AI 来解决现实世界的建筑问题具有重要意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用参数化生成的虚拟建筑数据训练深度学习模型，以实现真实世界中的建筑物体识别。
AI.motivation: 传统建筑物体识别依赖人工标注数据，成本高且效率低，而通过程序生成高质量训练数据可解决这一问题。
AI.method: 使用BIMGenE程序自动生成参数化3D建筑模型的逼真图像，并以此训练人工神经网络（ANN）。
AI.result: 训练后的模型在测试案例及训练数据范围外的真实建筑图像中均表现出良好的语义分割能力和泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 生成的虚拟数据能有效训练AI模型，为未来解决实际建筑问题提供可行方案。

title: Graph Neural Networks Go Forward-Forward
title_zh: 图神经网络向前推进
abstract: We present the Graph Forward-Forward (GFF) algorithm, an extension of the Forward-Forward procedure to graphs, able to handle features distributed over a graph's nodes. This allows training graph neural networks with forward passes only, without backpropagation. Our method is agnostic to the message-passing scheme, and provides a more biologically plausible learning scheme than backpropagation, while also carrying computational advantages. With GFF, graph neural networks are trained greedily layer by layer, using both positive and negative samples. We run experiments on 11 standard graph property prediction tasks, showing how GFF provides an effective alternative to backpropagation for training graph neural networks. This shows in particular that this procedure is remarkably efficient in spite of combining the per-layer training with the locality of the processing in a GNN.
summary: We present the Graph Forward-Forward (GFF) algorithm, an extension of the Forward-Forward procedure to graphs, able to handle features distributed over a graph's nodes. This allows training graph neural networks with forward passes only, without backpropagation. Our method is agnostic to the message-passing scheme, and provides a more biologically plausible learning scheme than backpropagation, while also carrying computational advantages. With GFF, graph neural networks are trained greedily layer by layer, using both positive and negative samples. We run experiments on 11 standard graph property prediction tasks, showing how GFF provides an effective alternative to backpropagation for training graph neural networks. This shows in particular that this procedure is remarkably efficient in spite of combining the per-layer training with the locality of the processing in a GNN.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了图向前-向前（GFF）算法，这是向前-向前过程对图的扩展，能够处理分布在图节点上的特征。这允许仅使用前向传播来训练图神经网络，而无需反向传播。我们的方法与消息传递方案无关，并且提供了比反向传播在生物学上更合理的学习方案，同时还具有计算优势。使用 GFF，图神经网络使用正样本和负样本逐层进行贪婪训练。我们对 11 个标准图属性预测任务进行了实验，展示了 GFF 如何为训练图神经网络提供反向传播的有效替代方案。这特别表明，尽管将每层训练与 GNN 中的处理局部性相结合，但该过程仍然非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需反向传播的图神经网络训练算法GFF，通过前向传递实现图结构数据的特征学习。
AI.motivation: 传统反向传播存在生物合理性不足和计算成本高的问题，需探索更高效的图神经网络训练方法。
AI.method: 扩展前向前向算法至图结构，分层贪婪训练图网络，结合正负样本且独立于消息传递机制。
AI.result: 在11个图属性预测任务中验证有效性，证明GFF在分层训练与局部处理下具有显著效率优势。
AI.conclusion: GFF为图神经网络训练提供了反向传播的有效替代方案，兼具生物合理性与计算效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需反向传播的图神经网络训练算法GFF，通过前向传递实现图结构数据的特征学习。

ai_content.conclusion: GFF为图神经网络训练提供了反向传播的有效替代方案，兼具生物合理性与计算效率。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需反向传播的图神经网络训练算法GFF，通过前向传递实现图结构数据的特征学习。
motivation: 传统反向传播存在生物合理性不足和计算成本高的问题，需探索更高效的图神经网络训练方法。

result: 在11个图属性预测任务中验证有效性，证明GFF在分层训练与局部处理下具有显著效率优势。

search_text: Graph Neural Networks Go Forward-Forward 图神经网络向前推进 We present the Graph Forward-Forward (GFF) algorithm, an extension of the Forward-Forward procedure to graphs, able to handle features distributed over a graph's nodes. This allows training graph neural networks with forward passes only, without backpropagation. Our method is agnostic to the message-passing scheme, and provides a more biologically plausible learning scheme than backpropagation, while also carrying computational advantages. With GFF, graph neural networks are trained greedily layer by layer, using both positive and negative samples. We run experiments on 11 standard graph property prediction tasks, showing how GFF provides an effective alternative to backpropagation for training graph neural networks. This shows in particular that this procedure is remarkably efficient in spite of combining the per-layer training with the locality of the processing in a GNN. 我们提出了图向前-向前（GFF）算法，这是向前-向前过程对图的扩展，能够处理分布在图节点上的特征。这允许仅使用前向传播来训练图神经网络，而无需反向传播。我们的方法与消息传递方案无关，并且提供了比反向传播在生物学上更合理的学习方案，同时还具有计算优势。使用 GFF，图神经网络使用正样本和负样本逐层进行贪婪训练。我们对 11 个标准图属性预测任务进行了实验，展示了 GFF 如何为训练图神经网络提供反向传播的有效替代方案。这特别表明，尽管将每层训练与 GNN 中的处理局部性相结合，但该过程仍然非常有效。 本文提出了一种无需反向传播的图神经网络训练算法GFF，通过前向传递实现图结构数据的特征学习。 Daniele Paliotta,Mathieu Alain,Bálint Máté,François Fleuret cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Conceptual Views on Tree Ensemble Classifiers
title_zh: 树集成分类器的概念视图
abstract: Random Forests and related tree-based methods are popular for supervised learning from table based data. Apart from their ease of parallelization, their classification performance is also superior. However, this performance, especially parallelizability, is offset by the loss of explainability. Statistical methods are often used to compensate for this disadvantage. Yet, their ability for local explanations, and in particular for global explanations, is limited. In the present work we propose an algebraic method, rooted in lattice theory, for the (global) explanation of tree ensembles. In detail, we introduce two novel conceptual views on tree ensemble classifiers and demonstrate their explanatory capabilities on Random Forests that were trained with standard parameters.
summary: Random Forests and related tree-based methods are popular for supervised learning from table based data. Apart from their ease of parallelization, their classification performance is also superior. However, this performance, especially parallelizability, is offset by the loss of explainability. Statistical methods are often used to compensate for this disadvantage. Yet, their ability for local explanations, and in particular for global explanations, is limited. In the present work we propose an algebraic method, rooted in lattice theory, for the (global) explanation of tree ensembles. In detail, we introduce two novel conceptual views on tree ensemble classifiers and demonstrate their explanatory capabilities on Random Forests that were trained with standard parameters.
abstract_zh: 随机森林和相关的基于树的方法在基于表的数据的监督学习中很流行。除了易于并行化之外，它们的分类性能也非常出色。然而，这种性能，尤其是并行性，被可解释性的损失所抵消。通常使用统计方法来弥补这一缺点。然而，他们的局部解释能力，特别是全局解释能力是有限的。在目前的工作中，我们提出了一种植根于格理论的代数方法，用于树系综的（全局）解释。详细地，我们介绍了关于树集成分类器的两种新颖的概念视图，并展示了它们对使用标准参数训练的随机森林的解释能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于格论的代数方法，为树集成分类器（如随机森林）提供全局解释性分析。
AI.motivation: 树集成方法虽性能优越且易并行化，但可解释性较差，现有统计方法在全局解释上存在局限。
AI.method: 引入两种基于格论的新型概念视图，通过代数方法对树集成分类器进行全局解释。
AI.result: 该方法在标准参数训练的随机森林上验证了其解释能力，有效揭示了模型决策逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 提出的概念视图为树集成模型提供了系统性解释框架，弥补了传统方法的不足。
