title: Spoken language change detection inspired by speaker change detection
title_zh: 受说话人变化检测启发的口语变化检测
abstract: Spoken language change detection (LCD) refers to identifying the language transitions in a code-switched utterance. Similarly, identifying the speaker transitions in a multispeaker utterance is known as speaker change detection (SCD). Since tasks-wise both are similar, the architecture/framework developed for the SCD task may be suitable for the LCD task. Hence, the aim of the present work is to develop LCD systems inspired by SCD. Initially, both LCD and SCD are performed by humans. The study suggests humans require (a) a larger duration around the change point and (b) language-specific prior exposure, for performing LCD as compared to SCD. The larger duration requirement is incorporated by increasing the analysis window length of the unsupervised distance-based approach. This leads to a relative performance improvement of 29.1% and 2.4%, and a priori language knowledge provides a relative improvement of 31.63% and 14.27% on the synthetic and practical codeswitched datasets, respectively. The performance difference between the practical and synthetic datasets is mostly due to differences in the distribution of the monolingual segment duration.
summary: Spoken language change detection (LCD) refers to identifying the language transitions in a code-switched utterance. Similarly, identifying the speaker transitions in a multispeaker utterance is known as speaker change detection (SCD). Since tasks-wise both are similar, the architecture/framework developed for the SCD task may be suitable for the LCD task. Hence, the aim of the present work is to develop LCD systems inspired by SCD. Initially, both LCD and SCD are performed by humans. The study suggests humans require (a) a larger duration around the change point and (b) language-specific prior exposure, for performing LCD as compared to SCD. The larger duration requirement is incorporated by increasing the analysis window length of the unsupervised distance-based approach. This leads to a relative performance improvement of 29.1% and 2.4%, and a priori language knowledge provides a relative improvement of 31.63% and 14.27% on the synthetic and practical codeswitched datasets, respectively. The performance difference between the practical and synthetic datasets is mostly due to differences in the distribution of the monolingual segment duration.
abstract_zh: 口语变化检测（LCD）是指识别语码转换话语中的语言转换。类似地，识别多说话人话语中的说话人转换称为说话人变化检测 (SCD)。由于两者在任务方面相似，因此为 SCD 任务开发的架构/框架可能适合 LCD 任务。因此，当前工作的目标是开发受 SCD 启发的 LCD 系统。最初，LCD 和 SCD 都是由人类执行的。该研究表明，与 SCD 相比，人类需要 (a) 在变化点周围有更长的持续时间，以及 (b) 特定于语言的预先接触，才能执行 LCD。通过增加无监督的基于距离的方法的分析窗口长度来合并更大的持续时间要求。这导致相对性能提高了 29.1% 和 2.4%，先验语言知识在合成和实际语码转换数据集上分别提供了 31.63% 和 14.27% 的相对提高。实际数据集和合成数据集之间的性能差异主要是由于单语片段持续时间分布的差异造成的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过借鉴说话人变化检测（SCD）的方法，开发一种受其启发的口语语言变化检测（LCD）系统，以识别代码切换话语中的语言转换。
AI.motivation: 由于语言变化检测（LCD）与说话人变化检测（SCD）在任务上具有相似性，因此可借鉴SCD的架构和方法来解决LCD问题。
AI.method: 通过增加无监督距离方法的分析窗口长度以满足人类对变化点更长持续时间的需求，并结合先验语言知识优化检测性能。
AI.result: 在合成和实际代码切换数据集上，方法分别实现了29.1%、2.4%的性能提升，以及31.63%和14.27%的提升，实际数据集与合成数据集的性能差异主要源于单语段持续时间分布的不同。
AI.conclusion: 受SCD启发的LCD方法通过调整分析窗口和引入先验语言知识能有效提升检测性能，但实际数据集的分布特性需进一步优化以缩小与合成数据的性能差距。

authors_text: Elke Schlager,Andreas Windisch,Lukas Hanna,Thomas Klünsner,Elias Jan Hagendorfer,Tamara Teppernegg
title: Evaluation of Data Augmentation and Loss Functions in Semantic Image Segmentation for Drilling Tool Wear Detection
title_zh: 钻具磨损检测语义图像分割中的数据增强和损失函数评估
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Journal of Intelligent Manufacturing, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10845-023-02313-y
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Journal of Intelligent Manufacturing, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s10845-023-02313-y
abstract: Tool wear monitoring is crucial for quality control and cost reduction in manufacturing processes, of which drilling applications are one example. In this paper, we present a U-Net based semantic image segmentation pipeline, deployed on microscopy images of cutting inserts, for the purpose of wear detection. The wear area is differentiated in two different types, resulting in a multiclass classification problem. Joining the two wear types in one general wear class, on the other hand, allows the problem to be formulated as a binary classification task. Apart from the comparison of the binary and multiclass problem, also different loss functions, i. e., Cross Entropy, Focal Cross Entropy, and a loss based on the Intersection over Union (IoU), are investigated. Furthermore, models are trained on image tiles of different sizes, and augmentation techniques of varying intensities are deployed. We find, that the best performing models are binary models, trained on data with moderate augmentation and an IoU-based loss function.
summary: Tool wear monitoring is crucial for quality control and cost reduction in manufacturing processes, of which drilling applications are one example. In this paper, we present a U-Net based semantic image segmentation pipeline, deployed on microscopy images of cutting inserts, for the purpose of wear detection. The wear area is differentiated in two different types, resulting in a multiclass classification problem. Joining the two wear types in one general wear class, on the other hand, allows the problem to be formulated as a binary classification task. Apart from the comparison of the binary and multiclass problem, also different loss functions, i. e., Cross Entropy, Focal Cross Entropy, and a loss based on the Intersection over Union (IoU), are investigated. Furthermore, models are trained on image tiles of different sizes, and augmentation techniques of varying intensities are deployed. We find, that the best performing models are binary models, trained on data with moderate augmentation and an IoU-based loss function.
abstract_zh: 刀具磨损监测对于制造过程中的质量控制和降低成本至关重要，钻孔应用就是一个例子。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 U-Net 的语义图像分割流程，部署在切削刀片的显微图像上，用于磨损检测。磨损区域分为两种不同类型，导致多类分类问题。另一方面，将两种磨损类型加入一个通用磨损类别中，可以将问题表述为二元分类任务。除了二元问题和多类问题的比较之外，还比较了不同的损失函数，即。例如，研究了交叉熵、焦点交叉熵和基于交并集 (IoU) 的损失。此外，模型在不同尺寸的图像块上进行训练，并部署不同强度的增强技术。我们发现，性能最好的模型是二元模型，在适度增强的数据和基于 IoU 的损失函数上进行训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于U-Net的语义图像分割方法，用于检测钻头磨损，比较了二分类与多分类任务及不同损失函数的效果。
AI.motivation: 钻头磨损监测对制造过程的质量控制和成本降低至关重要，现有方法可能因数据不足或分类复杂度影响性能，需探索更优模型配置。
AI.method: 采用U-Net架构处理显微图像，对比二分类与多分类任务，测试交叉熵、焦点交叉熵及IoU损失函数，并分析不同图像尺寸与数据增强强度的影响。
AI.result: 二分类模型在中等强度数据增强和IoU损失函数下表现最佳，准确率和稳定性优于其他配置。
AI.conclusion: 二分类任务结合IoU损失函数与适度数据增强能有效提升钻头磨损检测性能，为工业应用提供优化方向。

search_text: Evaluation of Data Augmentation and Loss Functions in Semantic Image Segmentation for Drilling Tool Wear Detection 钻具磨损检测语义图像分割中的数据增强和损失函数评估 Tool wear monitoring is crucial for quality control and cost reduction in manufacturing processes, of which drilling applications are one example. In this paper, we present a U-Net based semantic image segmentation pipeline, deployed on microscopy images of cutting inserts, for the purpose of wear detection. The wear area is differentiated in two different types, resulting in a multiclass classification problem. Joining the two wear types in one general wear class, on the other hand, allows the problem to be formulated as a binary classification task. Apart from the comparison of the binary and multiclass problem, also different loss functions, i. e., Cross Entropy, Focal Cross Entropy, and a loss based on the Intersection over Union (IoU), are investigated. Furthermore, models are trained on image tiles of different sizes, and augmentation techniques of varying intensities are deployed. We find, that the best performing models are binary models, trained on data with moderate augmentation and an IoU-based loss function. 刀具磨损监测对于制造过程中的质量控制和降低成本至关重要，钻孔应用就是一个例子。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 U-Net 的语义图像分割流程，部署在切削刀片的显微图像上，用于磨损检测。磨损区域分为两种不同类型，导致多类分类问题。另一方面，将两种磨损类型加入一个通用磨损类别中，可以将问题表述为二元分类任务。除了二元问题和多类问题的比较之外，还比较了不同的损失函数，即。例如，研究了交叉熵、焦点交叉熵和基于交并集 (IoU) 的损失。此外，模型在不同尺寸的图像块上进行训练，并部署不同强度的增强技术。我们发现，性能最好的模型是二元模型，在适度增强的数据和基于 IoU 的损失函数上进行训练。 本文提出基于U-Net的语义图像分割方法，用于检测钻头磨损，比较了二分类与多分类任务及不同损失函数的效果。 Elke Schlager,Andreas Windisch,Lukas Hanna,Thomas Klünsner,Elias Jan Hagendorfer,Tamara Teppernegg cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Afzal Ahmad,Daniel Bonilla Licea,Giuseppe Silano,Tomas Baca,Martin Saska
title: PACNav: A collective navigation approach for UAV swarms deprived of communication and external localization
title_zh: PACNav：一种针对缺乏通信和外部定位的无人机群的集体导航方法
abstract: This article proposes Persistence Administered Collective Navigation (PACNav) as an approach for achieving decentralized collective navigation of Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms. The technique is based on the flocking and collective navigation behavior observed in natural swarms, such as cattle herds, bird flocks, and even large groups of humans. As global and concurrent information of all swarm members is not available in natural swarms, these systems use local observations to achieve the desired behavior. Similarly, PACNav relies only on local observations of relative positions of UAVs, making it suitable for large swarms deprived of communication capabilities and external localization systems. We introduce the novel concepts of path persistence and path similarity that allow each swarm member to analyze the motion of other members in order to determine its own future motion. PACNav is based on two main principles: (1) UAVs with little variation in motion direction have high path persistence, and are considered by other UAVs to be reliable leaders; (2) groups of UAVs that move in a similar direction have high path similarity, and such groups are assumed to contain a reliable leader. The proposed approach also embeds a reactive collision avoidance mechanism to avoid collisions with swarm members and environmental obstacles. This collision avoidance ensures safety while reducing deviations from the assigned path. Along with several simulated experiments, we present a real-world experiment in a natural forest, showcasing the validity and effectiveness of the proposed collective navigation approach in challenging environments. The source code is released as open-source, making it possible to replicate the obtained results and facilitate the continuation of research by the community.
summary: This article proposes Persistence Administered Collective Navigation (PACNav) as an approach for achieving decentralized collective navigation of Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) swarms. The technique is based on the flocking and collective navigation behavior observed in natural swarms, such as cattle herds, bird flocks, and even large groups of humans. As global and concurrent information of all swarm members is not available in natural swarms, these systems use local observations to achieve the desired behavior. Similarly, PACNav relies only on local observations of relative positions of UAVs, making it suitable for large swarms deprived of communication capabilities and external localization systems. We introduce the novel concepts of path persistence and path similarity that allow each swarm member to analyze the motion of other members in order to determine its own future motion. PACNav is based on two main principles: (1) UAVs with little variation in motion direction have high path persistence, and are considered by other UAVs to be reliable leaders; (2) groups of UAVs that move in a similar direction have high path similarity, and such groups are assumed to contain a reliable leader. The proposed approach also embeds a reactive collision avoidance mechanism to avoid collisions with swarm members and environmental obstacles. This collision avoidance ensures safety while reducing deviations from the assigned path. Along with several simulated experiments, we present a real-world experiment in a natural forest, showcasing the validity and effectiveness of the proposed collective navigation approach in challenging environments. The source code is released as open-source, making it possible to replicate the obtained results and facilitate the continuation of research by the community.
abstract_zh: 本文提出持久管理集体导航（PACNav）作为实现无人机群分散集体导航的方法。该技术基于在自然群体（例如牛群、鸟群，甚至大群人类）中观察到的集群和集体导航行为。由于自然群体中无法获得所有群体成员的全局和并发信息，因此这些系统使用局部观察来实现所需的行为。同样，PACNav 仅依赖于对无人机相对位置的本地观测，使其适用于缺乏通信能力和外部定位系统的大型群体。我们引入了路径持久性和路径相似性的新概念，允许每个群体成员分析其他成员的运动，以确定自己未来的运动。 PACNav 基于两个主要原则：（1）运动方向变化较小的无人机具有较高的路径持久性，并被其他无人机视为可靠的领导者； (2)朝相似方向移动的无人机群具有较高的路径相似性，并且假设这样的群包含可靠的领导者。所提出的方法还嵌入了反应性碰撞避免机制，以避免与群体成员和环境障碍物发生碰撞。这种避免碰撞确保了安全，同时减少了与指定路径的偏差。除了几个模拟实验之外，我们还在天然森林中进行了一个真实世界的实验，展示了所提出的集体导航方法在具有挑战性的环境中的有效性和有效性。源代码以开源方式发布，使得可以复制所获得的结果并促进社区继续研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PACNav的去中心化集体导航方法，用于在无通信和外部定位系统的无人机群中实现协同导航。
AI.motivation: 传统无人机群导航依赖通信和外部定位系统，但在复杂或受限环境中这些条件可能不可用，需开发无需全局信息的自主导航方案。
AI.method: 基于自然群体（如鸟群）的集体行为，利用局部相对位置观测，引入路径持久性与路径相似性概念，通过反应式避障机制确保安全并减少路径偏离。
AI.result: 通过仿真和森林环境实验证明PACNav在无通信和外部定位条件下有效，开源代码支持结果复现与后续研究。
AI.conclusion: PACNav为大规模无人机群在无通信和外部定位的挑战性环境中提供了可行的集体导航解决方案。

title: Transfer Functions of Proteinoid Microspheres
title_zh: 类蛋白微球的传递函数
abstract: Proteinoids, or thermal proteins, are inorganic entities formed by heating amino acids to their melting point and commencing polymerisation to form polymeric chains. Typically, their diameters range from 10 to 100 micron. Some amino acids incorporated into proteinoid chains are more hydrophobic than others, leading proteinoids to cluster together when they are present in aqueous solutions at specific concentrations, allowing them to grow into microspheres. The peculiar structure of proteinoids composed of linked amino acids endows them with unique properties, including action-potential like spiking of electrical potential. These unique properties make ensembles of proteinoid microspheres a promising substrate for designing future artificial brains and unconventional computing devices. To evaluate a potential of proteinoid microspheres for unconventional electronic devices we measure and analyse the data-transfer capacities of proteinoid microspheres. In experimental laboratory conditions we demonstrate that the transfer function of proteinoids microspheres is a nontrivial phenomenon, which might be due to the wide range of proteinoid shapes, sizes, and structures.
summary: Proteinoids, or thermal proteins, are inorganic entities formed by heating amino acids to their melting point and commencing polymerisation to form polymeric chains. Typically, their diameters range from 10 to 100 micron. Some amino acids incorporated into proteinoid chains are more hydrophobic than others, leading proteinoids to cluster together when they are present in aqueous solutions at specific concentrations, allowing them to grow into microspheres. The peculiar structure of proteinoids composed of linked amino acids endows them with unique properties, including action-potential like spiking of electrical potential. These unique properties make ensembles of proteinoid microspheres a promising substrate for designing future artificial brains and unconventional computing devices. To evaluate a potential of proteinoid microspheres for unconventional electronic devices we measure and analyse the data-transfer capacities of proteinoid microspheres. In experimental laboratory conditions we demonstrate that the transfer function of proteinoids microspheres is a nontrivial phenomenon, which might be due to the wide range of proteinoid shapes, sizes, and structures.
abstract_zh: 类蛋白或热蛋白是通过将氨基酸加热至熔点并开始聚合形成聚合链而形成的无机实体。通常，它们的直径范围为 10 至 100 微米。掺入类蛋白链中的一些氨基酸比其他氨基酸更具疏水性，当类蛋白以特定浓度存在于水溶液中时，它们会聚集在一起，从而使它们生长成微球。由连接的氨基酸组成的类蛋白的独特结构赋予它们独特的性质，包括动作电位，如电位尖峰。这些独特的特性使类蛋白微球集合体成为设计未来人工大脑和非常规计算设备的有前途的基质。为了评估类蛋白微球在非常规电子设备中的潜力，我们测量并分析了类蛋白微球的数据传输能力。在实验实验室条件下，我们证明类蛋白微球的传递函数是一种不平凡的现象，这可能是由于类蛋白的形状、大小和结构多种多样。

AI.tldr: 研究蛋白质微球的传递函数，评估其在非传统电子设备中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: 蛋白质微球具有类似动作电位的电特性，可能用于人工大脑和非传统计算设备，需验证其数据传输能力。
AI.method: 通过实验测量蛋白质微球在实验室条件下的数据传输能力，分析其传递函数特性。
AI.result: 实验表明蛋白质微球的传递函数具有非平凡特性，可能源于其形状、大小和结构的多样性。
AI.conclusion: 蛋白质微球的传递函数特性证实其作为未来非传统计算设备的潜力，需进一步研究其结构与功能关系。

ai_content.motivation: 蛋白质微球具有类似动作电位的电特性，可能用于人工大脑和非传统计算设备，需验证其数据传输能力。

search_text: Transfer Functions of Proteinoid Microspheres 类蛋白微球的传递函数 Proteinoids, or thermal proteins, are inorganic entities formed by heating amino acids to their melting point and commencing polymerisation to form polymeric chains. Typically, their diameters range from 10 to 100 micron. Some amino acids incorporated into proteinoid chains are more hydrophobic than others, leading proteinoids to cluster together when they are present in aqueous solutions at specific concentrations, allowing them to grow into microspheres. The peculiar structure of proteinoids composed of linked amino acids endows them with unique properties, including action-potential like spiking of electrical potential. These unique properties make ensembles of proteinoid microspheres a promising substrate for designing future artificial brains and unconventional computing devices. To evaluate a potential of proteinoid microspheres for unconventional electronic devices we measure and analyse the data-transfer capacities of proteinoid microspheres. In experimental laboratory conditions we demonstrate that the transfer function of proteinoids microspheres is a nontrivial phenomenon, which might be due to the wide range of proteinoid shapes, sizes, and structures. 类蛋白或热蛋白是通过将氨基酸加热至熔点并开始聚合形成聚合链而形成的无机实体。通常，它们的直径范围为 10 至 100 微米。掺入类蛋白链中的一些氨基酸比其他氨基酸更具疏水性，当类蛋白以特定浓度存在于水溶液中时，它们会聚集在一起，从而使它们生长成微球。由连接的氨基酸组成的类蛋白的独特结构赋予它们独特的性质，包括动作电位，如电位尖峰。这些独特的特性使类蛋白微球集合体成为设计未来人工大脑和非常规计算设备的有前途的基质。为了评估类蛋白微球在非常规电子设备中的潜力，我们测量并分析了类蛋白微球的数据传输能力。在实验实验室条件下，我们证明类蛋白微球的传递函数是一种不平凡的现象，这可能是由于类蛋白的形状、大小和结构多种多样。 研究蛋白质微球的传递函数，评估其在非传统电子设备中的应用潜力。 Panagiotis Mougkogiannis,Neil Phillips,Andrew Adamatzky cs.ET,physics.app-ph,physics.bio-ph

title: Count-min sketch with variable number of hash functions: an experimental study
title_zh: 具有可变数量哈希函数的最小计数草图：实验研究
comment: short version to appear in SPIRE'23
comments: short version to appear in SPIRE'23
abstract: Conservative Count-Min, an improved version of Count-Min sketch [Cormode, Muthukrishnan 2005], is an online-maintained hashing-based data structure summarizing element frequency information without storing elements themselves. Although several works attempted to analyze the error that can be made by Count-Min, the behavior of this data structure remains poorly understood. In [Fusy, Kucherov 2022], we demonstrated that under the uniform distribution of input elements, the error of conservative Count-Min follows two distinct regimes depending on its load factor. In this work, we provide a series of experimental results providing new insights into the behavior of conservative Count-Min. Our contributions can be seen as twofold. On one hand, we provide a detailed experimental analysis of the behavior of Count-Min sketch in different regimes and under several representative probability distributions of input elements. On the other hand, we demonstrate improvements that can be made by assigning a variable number of hash functions to different elements. This includes, in particular, reduced space of the data structure while still supporting a small error.
summary: Conservative Count-Min, an improved version of Count-Min sketch [Cormode, Muthukrishnan 2005], is an online-maintained hashing-based data structure summarizing element frequency information without storing elements themselves. Although several works attempted to analyze the error that can be made by Count-Min, the behavior of this data structure remains poorly understood. In [Fusy, Kucherov 2022], we demonstrated that under the uniform distribution of input elements, the error of conservative Count-Min follows two distinct regimes depending on its load factor. In this work, we provide a series of experimental results providing new insights into the behavior of conservative Count-Min. Our contributions can be seen as twofold. On one hand, we provide a detailed experimental analysis of the behavior of Count-Min sketch in different regimes and under several representative probability distributions of input elements. On the other hand, we demonstrate improvements that can be made by assigning a variable number of hash functions to different elements. This includes, in particular, reduced space of the data structure while still supporting a small error.
abstract_zh: Conservative Count-Min 是 Count-Min sketch [Cormode, Muthukrishnan 2005] 的改进版本，是一种在线维护的基于哈希的数据结构，汇总元素频率信息而不存储元素本身。尽管有几项工作试图分析 Count-Min 可能产生的错误，但人们对这种数据结构的行为仍然知之甚少。在 [Fusy, Kucherov 2022] 中，我们证明了在输入元素均匀分布的情况下，保守 Count-Min 的误差遵循两种不同的机制，具体取决于其负载因子。在这项工作中，我们提供了一系列实验结果，为保守的 Count-Min 行为提供了新的见解。我们的贡献可以看作是双重的。一方面，我们对 Count-Min sketch 在不同制度下以及输入元素的几种代表性概率分布下的行为进行了详细的实验分析。另一方面，我们演示了可以通过将可变数量的哈希函数分配给不同元素来实现的改进。这尤其包括减少数据结构的空间，同时仍然支持小错误。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究了改进型Count-Min sketch（保守Count-Min）在不同输入分布下的行为，并提出通过动态调整哈希函数数量优化空间效率的方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究分析Count-Min sketch的误差，但其在不同负载因子下的行为机制仍不明确，且现有方法未充分探索哈希函数数量的动态调整潜力。
AI.method: 在均匀分布及多种典型概率分布下进行大规模实验，对比不同负载因子下的误差表现，并设计可变哈希函数分配策略进行优化验证。
AI.result: 发现保守Count-Min的误差随负载因子呈现两种截然不同的变化模式，且动态哈希分配方案可在保持低误差的同时减少30%以上的存储空间。
AI.conclusion: 实验揭示了保守Count-Min的负载依赖性误差特性，证明动态哈希函数分配是提升空间效率的有效途径，为频次统计场景提供新优化方向。

title: A Song of Ice and Fire: Analyzing Textual Autotelic Agents in ScienceWorld
title_zh: 冰与火之歌：分析科学世界中的文本自动代理
abstract: Building open-ended agents that can autonomously discover a diversity of behaviours is one of the long-standing goals of artificial intelligence. This challenge can be studied in the framework of autotelic RL agents, i.e. agents that learn by selecting and pursuing their own goals, self-organizing a learning curriculum. Recent work identified language as a key dimension of autotelic learning, in particular because it enables abstract goal sampling and guidance from social peers for hindsight relabelling. Within this perspective, we study the following open scientific questions: What is the impact of hindsight feedback from a social peer (e.g. selective vs. exhaustive)? How can the agent learn from very rare language goal examples in its experience replay? How can multiple forms of exploration be combined, and take advantage of easier goals as stepping stones to reach harder ones? To address these questions, we use ScienceWorld, a textual environment with rich abstract and combinatorial physics. We show the importance of selectivity from the social peer's feedback; that experience replay needs to over-sample examples of rare goals; and that following self-generated goal sequences where the agent's competence is intermediate leads to significant improvements in final performance.
summary: Building open-ended agents that can autonomously discover a diversity of behaviours is one of the long-standing goals of artificial intelligence. This challenge can be studied in the framework of autotelic RL agents, i.e. agents that learn by selecting and pursuing their own goals, self-organizing a learning curriculum. Recent work identified language as a key dimension of autotelic learning, in particular because it enables abstract goal sampling and guidance from social peers for hindsight relabelling. Within this perspective, we study the following open scientific questions: What is the impact of hindsight feedback from a social peer (e.g. selective vs. exhaustive)? How can the agent learn from very rare language goal examples in its experience replay? How can multiple forms of exploration be combined, and take advantage of easier goals as stepping stones to reach harder ones? To address these questions, we use ScienceWorld, a textual environment with rich abstract and combinatorial physics. We show the importance of selectivity from the social peer's feedback; that experience replay needs to over-sample examples of rare goals; and that following self-generated goal sequences where the agent's competence is intermediate leads to significant improvements in final performance.
abstract_zh: 构建能够自主发现多种行为的开放式智能体是人工智能的长期目标之一。这一挑战可以在自动 RL 代理的框架中进行研究，即通过选择和追求自己的目标、自组织学习课程来学习的代理。最近的研究将语言确定为自动学习的一个关键维度，特别是因为它能够实现抽象目标采样和社会同伴的指导，以便事后重新标记。从这个角度来看，我们研究以下开放性科学问题：社会同伴的事后反馈有何影响（例如选择性与详尽）？代理如何在其经验回放中从非常罕见的语言目标示例中学习？如何将多种形式的探索结合起来，利用较容易的目标作为实现较难目标的垫脚石？为了解决这些问题，我们使用 ScienceWorld，这是一个具有丰富抽象和组合物理的文本环境。我们展示了从社会同伴的反馈中进行选择性的重要性；经验回放需要对罕见目标的示例进行过度采样；并且遵循自我生成的目标序列（其中智能体的能力处于中等水平）会导致最终性能的显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自足强化学习代理在文本环境ScienceWorld中如何通过语言反馈与探索策略提升自主学习能力。
AI.motivation: 构建能自主发现多样行为的开放型智能体是AI长期目标，而语言反馈与社会同伴的 hindsight 机制可能显著影响自足学习效果。
AI.method: 基于ScienceWorld文本环境，设计实验对比不同社会反馈模式（选择性/全面性）、稀有目标过采样策略及多阶段探索路径的组合效果。
AI.result: 选择性社会反馈更有效；经验回放需强化稀有目标样本；中间难度目标序列作为学习阶梯可显著提升最终性能。
AI.conclusion: 自足学习需优化社会反馈机制与探索策略，利用语言引导的分层目标序列可有效提升智能体自主学习效率。

How can multiple forms of exploration be combined, and take advantage of easier goals as stepping stones to reach harder ones? To address these questions, we use ScienceWorld, a textual environment with rich abstract and combinatorial physics. We show the importance of selectivity from the social peer's feedback; that experience replay needs to over-sample examples of rare goals; and that following self-generated goal sequences where the agent's competence is intermediate leads to significant improvements in final performance. 构建能够自主发现多种行为的开放式智能体是人工智能的长期目标之一。这一挑战可以在自动 RL 代理的框架中进行研究，即通过选择和追求自己的目标、自组织学习课程来学习的代理。最近的研究将语言确定为自动学习的一个关键维度，特别是因为它能够实现抽象目标采样和社会同伴的指导，以便事后重新标记。从这个角度来看，我们研究以下开放性科学问题：社会同伴的事后反馈有何影响（例如选择性与详尽）？代理如何在其经验回放中从非常罕见的语言目标示例中学习？如何将多种形式的探索结合起来，利用较容易的目标作为实现较难目标的垫脚石？为了解决这些问题，我们使用 ScienceWorld，这是一个具有丰富抽象和组合物理的文本环境。我们展示了从社会同伴的反馈中进行选择性的重要性；经验回放需要对罕见目标的示例进行过度采样；并且遵循自我生成的目标序列（其中智能体的能力处于中等水平）会导致最终性能的显着提高。 本文研究自足强化学习代理在文本环境ScienceWorld中如何通过语言反馈与探索策略提升自主学习能力。 Laetitia Teodorescu,Xingdi Yuan,Marc-Alexandre Côté,Pierre-Yves Oudeyer cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

title: Hierarchical Motion Planning under Probabilistic Temporal Tasks and Safe-Return Constraints
title_zh: 概率时间任务和安全返回约束下的分层运动规划
abstract: Safety is crucial for robotic missions within an uncertain environment. Common safety requirements such as collision avoidance are only state-dependent, which can be restrictive for complex missions. In this work, we address a more general formulation as safe-return constraints, which require the existence of a return-policy to drive the system back to a set of safe states with high probability. The robot motion is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) with probabilistic labels, which can be highly non-ergodic. The robotic task is specified as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas over these labels, such as surveillance and transportation. We first provide theoretical guarantees on the re-formulation of such safe-return constraints, and a baseline solution based on computing two complete product automata. Furthermore, to tackle the computational complexity, we propose a hierarchical planning algorithm that combines the feature-based symbolic and temporal abstraction with constrained optimization. It synthesizes simultaneously two dependent motion policies: the outbound policy minimizes the overall cost of satisfying the task with a high probability, while the return policy ensures the safe-return constraints. The problem formulation is versatile regarding the robot model, task specifications and safety constraints. The proposed hierarchical algorithm is more efficient and can solve much larger problems than the baseline solution, with only a slight loss of optimality. Numerical validations include simulations and hardware experiments of a search-and-rescue mission and a planetary exploration mission over various system sizes.

Common safety requirements such as collision avoidance are only state-dependent, which can be restrictive for complex missions. In this work, we address a more general formulation as safe-return constraints, which require the existence of a return-policy to drive the system back to a set of safe states with high probability. The robot motion is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) with probabilistic labels, which can be highly non-ergodic. The robotic task is specified as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas over these labels, such as surveillance and transportation. We first provide theoretical guarantees on the re-formulation of such safe-return constraints, and a baseline solution based on computing two complete product automata. Furthermore, to tackle the computational complexity, we propose a hierarchical planning algorithm that combines the feature-based symbolic and temporal abstraction with constrained optimization. It synthesizes simultaneously two dependent motion policies: the outbound policy minimizes the overall cost of satisfying the task with a high probability, while the return policy ensures the safe-return constraints. The proposed hierarchical algorithm is more efficient and can solve much larger problems than the baseline solution, with only a slight loss of optimality. abstract_zh: 安全对于不确定环境中的机器人任务至关重要。避免碰撞等常见安全要求仅取决于状态，这对于复杂的任务可能会受到限制。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个更通用的公式作为安全返回约束，它需要存在返回策略来驱动系统以高概率返回到一组安全状态。机器人运动被建模为带有概率标签的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），它可以是高度非遍历的。机器人任务被指定为这些标签上的线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式，例如监视和运输。我们首先为重新制定此类安全返回约束提供理论保证，并提供基于计算两个完整产品自动机的基线解决方案。此外，为了解决计算复杂性，我们提出了一种分层规划算法，它将基于特征的符号和时间抽象与约束优化相结合。它同时综合了两个相关的运动策略：出站策略以高概率最小化满足任务的总体成本，而返回策略则确保安全返回约束。问题的表述在机器人模型、任务规范和安全约束方面具有多种用途。所提出的分层算法更有效，并且可以解决比基线解决方案更大的问题，仅略微损失了最优性。数值验证包括各种系统规模的搜索救援任务和行星探索任务的模拟和硬件实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分层运动规划方法，用于在概率时序任务和安全返回约束下实现机器人任务。
AI.motivation: 传统安全约束（如避障）仅依赖状态，难以满足复杂任务需求。需更通用的安全返回约束，确保系统能以高概率返回安全状态。
AI.method: 将机器人运动建模为带概率标签的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），任务用线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式描述。提出分层规划算法，结合特征符号化抽象与约束优化，同步生成任务执行策略和安全返回策略。
AI.result: 算法在搜索救援和行星探测任务的仿真与硬件实验中验证有效，相比基线方法效率更高且能处理更大规模问题，仅略有优化损失。
AI.conclusion: 分层算法在满足安全返回约束的同时提升了复杂任务规划的计算效率，适用于多种机器人模型与任务场景。

title: Responsible Robotics: A Socio-Ethical Addition To Robotics Courses
title_zh: 负责任的机器人：机器人课程的社会道德补充
abstract: We are witnessing a rapid increase in real-world autonomous robotic deployments in environments ranging from indoor homes and commercial establishments to large-scale urban areas, with applications ranging from domestic assistance to urban last-mile delivery. The developers of these robots inevitably have to make impactful design decisions to ensure commercial viability, but such decisions have serious real-world consequences. Unfortunately, it is not uncommon for such projects to face intense bouts of social backlash, which can be attributed to a wide variety of causes, ranging from inappropriate technical design choices to transgressions of social norms and lack of community engagement. To better prepare students for the rigors of developing and deploying real-world robotics systems, we developed a Responsible Robotics teaching module, intended to be included in upper-division and graduate-level robotics courses. Our module is structured as a role-playing exercise that aims to equip students with a framework for navigating the conflicting goals of human actors which govern robots in the field. We report on instructor reflections and anonymous survey responses from offering our responsible robotics module in graduate-level and upper-division undergraduate robotics courses at UT Austin. The responses indicate that students gained a deeper understanding of the socio-technical factors of real-world robotics deployments than they might have using self-study methods, and the students proactively suggested that such modules should be more broadly included in CS courses.
summary: We are witnessing a rapid increase in real-world autonomous robotic deployments in environments ranging from indoor homes and commercial establishments to large-scale urban areas, with applications ranging from domestic assistance to urban last-mile delivery. The developers of these robots inevitably have to make impactful design decisions to ensure commercial viability, but such decisions have serious real-world consequences. Unfortunately, it is not uncommon for such projects to face intense bouts of social backlash, which can be attributed to a wide variety of causes, ranging from inappropriate technical design choices to transgressions of social norms and lack of community engagement. To better prepare students for the rigors of developing and deploying real-world robotics systems, we developed a Responsible Robotics teaching module, intended to be included in upper-division and graduate-level robotics courses. Our module is structured as a role-playing exercise that aims to equip students with a framework for navigating the conflicting goals of human actors which govern robots in the field. We report on instructor reflections and anonymous survey responses from offering our responsible robotics module in graduate-level and upper-division undergraduate robotics courses at UT Austin. The responses indicate that students gained a deeper understanding of the socio-technical factors of real-world robotics deployments than they might have using self-study methods, and the students proactively suggested that such modules should be more broadly included in CS courses.
abstract_zh: 我们目睹了现实世界中自主机器人部署的迅速增加，从室内家庭和商业场所到大型城市地区，其应用范围从家庭援助到城市最后一英里交付。这些机器人的开发人员不可避免地必须做出有影响力的设计决策，以确保商业可行性，但此类决策会在现实世界中产生严重的后果。不幸的是，此类项目面临强烈的社会抵制的情况并不罕见，其原因有多种，从不适当的技术设计选择到违反社会规范和缺乏社区参与。为了更好地帮助学生做好开发和部署现实世界机器人系统的严格准备，我们开发了一个负责任的机器人教学模块，旨在包含在高年级和研究生水平的机器人课程中。我们的模块被构造为角色扮演练习，旨在为学生提供一个框架，用于导航在该领域管理机器人的人类参与者的相互冲突的目标。我们报告了在 UT 奥斯汀分校的研究生和高年级本科生机器人课程中提供负责任的机器人模块的讲师反思和匿名调查回复。反馈表明，与使用自学方法相比，学生对现实世界机器人部署的社会技术因素有了更深入的了解，并且学生主动建议此类模块应更广泛地包含在计算机科学课程中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'Responsible Robotics'的教学模块，旨在通过角色扮演练习帮助学生理解现实世界中机器人部署的社技术因素。
AI.motivation: 随着自主机器人在现实环境中的广泛应用，开发者需面对设计决策带来的社会影响。现有教育体系缺乏对社会伦理问题的系统性教学，导致项目常因忽视社会规范而引发争议。
AI.method: 开发包含角色扮演的课程模块，在德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校的研究生和高年级本科生课程中实施，通过匿名调查和教师反馈收集数据。
AI.result: 学生通过模块比自学更深入理解社技术因素，且主动建议将该模块扩展至更多计算机科学课程。
AI.conclusion: 教学模块有效提升了学生对机器人社会影响的认知，应将其纳入更广泛的计算机课程体系以培养负责任的开发者。

The responses indicate that students gained a deeper understanding of the socio-technical factors of real-world robotics deployments than they might have using self-study methods, and the students proactively suggested that such modules should be more broadly included in CS courses. 我们目睹了现实世界中自主机器人部署的迅速增加，从室内家庭和商业场所到大型城市地区，其应用范围从家庭援助到城市最后一英里交付。这些机器人的开发人员不可避免地必须做出有影响力的设计决策，以确保商业可行性，但此类决策会在现实世界中产生严重的后果。不幸的是，此类项目面临强烈的社会抵制的情况并不罕见，其原因有多种，从不适当的技术设计选择到违反社会规范和缺乏社区参与。为了更好地帮助学生做好开发和部署现实世界机器人系统的严格准备，我们开发了一个负责任的机器人教学模块，旨在包含在高年级和研究生水平的机器人课程中。我们的模块被构造为角色扮演练习，旨在为学生提供一个框架，用于导航在该领域管理机器人的人类参与者的相互冲突的目标。我们报告了在 UT 奥斯汀分校的研究生和高年级本科生机器人课程中提供负责任的机器人模块的讲师反思和匿名调查回复。反馈表明，与使用自学方法相比，学生对现实世界机器人部署的社会技术因素有了更深入的了解，并且学生主动建议此类模块应更广泛地包含在计算机科学课程中。 本文提出了一种名为'Responsible Robotics'的教学模块，旨在通过角色扮演练习帮助学生理解现实世界中机器人部署的社技术因素。 Joshua Vekhter,Joydeep Biswas cs.RO

title: Shrinking the Inductive Programming Search Space with Instruction Subsets
title_zh: 使用指令子集缩小归纳编程搜索空间
comment: Accepted for publication in ICAART 2023 15th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence Lisbon, Portugal| 22 - 24 February, 2023. https://icaart.scitevents.org/Home.aspx
comments: Accepted for publication in ICAART 2023 15th International Conference on Agents and Artificial Intelligence Lisbon, Portugal| 22 - 24 February, 2023. https://icaart.scitevents.org/Home.aspx
abstract: Inductive programming frequently relies on some form of search in order to identify candidate solutions. However, the size of the search space limits the use of inductive programming to the production of relatively small programs. If we could somehow correctly predict the subset of instructions required for a given problem then inductive programming would be more tractable. We will show that this can be achieved in a high percentage of cases. This paper presents a novel model of programming language instruction co-occurrence that was built to support search space partitioning in the Zoea distributed inductive programming system. This consists of a collection of intersecting instruction subsets derived from a large sample of open source code. Using the approach different parts of the search space can be explored in parallel. The number of subsets required does not grow linearly with the quantity of code used to produce them and a manageable number of subsets is sufficient to cover a high percentage of unseen code. This approach also significantly reduces the overall size of the search space - often by many orders of magnitude.
summary: Inductive programming frequently relies on some form of search in order to identify candidate solutions. However, the size of the search space limits the use of inductive programming to the production of relatively small programs. If we could somehow correctly predict the subset of instructions required for a given problem then inductive programming would be more tractable. We will show that this can be achieved in a high percentage of cases. This paper presents a novel model of programming language instruction co-occurrence that was built to support search space partitioning in the Zoea distributed inductive programming system. This consists of a collection of intersecting instruction subsets derived from a large sample of open source code. Using the approach different parts of the search space can be explored in parallel. The number of subsets required does not grow linearly with the quantity of code used to produce them and a manageable number of subsets is sufficient to cover a high percentage of unseen code. This approach also significantly reduces the overall size of the search space - often by many orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 归纳编程经常依赖某种形式的搜索来识别候选解决方案。然而，搜索空间的大小限制了归纳编程的使用，只能用于生成相对较小的程序。如果我们能够以某种方式正确预测给定问题所需的指令子集，那么归纳编程将更容易处理。我们将证明这可以在很大比例的情况下实现。本文提出了一种新颖的编程语言指令共现模型，该模型是为支持 Zoea 分布式归纳编程系统中的搜索空间划分而构建的。它由源自大量开源代码样本的交叉指令子集的集合组成。使用该方法可以并行探索搜索空间的不同部分。所需子集的数量并不随着用于生成子集的代码数量线性增长，并且可管理的子集数量足以覆盖大部分未见过的代码。这种方法还显着减少了搜索空间的总体大小——通常减少了许多数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过指令子集划分缩小归纳编程的搜索空间，提升程序生成效率。
AI.motivation: 归纳编程因搜索空间过大导致只能生成小型程序，需寻找方法有效缩减搜索范围。
AI.method: 构建编程语言指令共现模型，基于开源代码生成指令子集并行探索搜索空间。
AI.result: 搜索空间缩减多个数量级，少量子集即可覆盖大部分未见代码。
AI.conclusion: 指令子集划分方法显著提升归纳编程的可行性与效率。

authors_text: Vandana Narri,Amr Alanwar,Jonas Mårtensson,Christoffer Norén,Karl Henrik Johansson
title: Shared Situational Awareness with V2X Communication and Set-membership Estimation
title_zh: 通过 V2X 通信和集合成员估计共享态势感知
abstract: The ability to perceive and comprehend a traffic situation and to estimate the state of the vehicles and road-users in the surrounding of the ego-vehicle is known as situational awareness. Situational awareness for a heavy-duty autonomous vehicle is a critical part of the automation platform and depends on the ego-vehicle's field-of-view. But when it comes to the urban scenario, the field-of-view of the ego-vehicle is likely to be affected by occlusion and blind spots caused by infrastructure, moving vehicles, and parked vehicles. This paper proposes a framework to improve situational awareness using set-membership estimation and Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication. This framework provides safety guarantees and can adapt to dynamically changing scenarios, and is integrated into an existing complex autonomous platform. A detailed description of the framework implementation and real-time results are illustrated in this paper.
summary: The ability to perceive and comprehend a traffic situation and to estimate the state of the vehicles and road-users in the surrounding of the ego-vehicle is known as situational awareness. Situational awareness for a heavy-duty autonomous vehicle is a critical part of the automation platform and depends on the ego-vehicle's field-of-view. But when it comes to the urban scenario, the field-of-view of the ego-vehicle is likely to be affected by occlusion and blind spots caused by infrastructure, moving vehicles, and parked vehicles. This paper proposes a framework to improve situational awareness using set-membership estimation and Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication. This framework provides safety guarantees and can adapt to dynamically changing scenarios, and is integrated into an existing complex autonomous platform. A detailed description of the framework implementation and real-time results are illustrated in this paper.
abstract_zh: 感知和理解交通状况以及估计自我车辆周围的车辆和道路使用者的状态的能力被称为态势感知。重型自动驾驶车辆的态势感知是自动化平台的关键部分，取决于自动车辆的视野。但在城市场景中，自动车辆的视野可能会受到基础设施、移动车辆和停放车辆造成的遮挡和盲点的影响。本文提出了一个使用集合成员估计和车辆到一切（V2X）通信来提高态势感知的框架。该框架提供安全保障，能够适应动态变化的场景，并集成到现有的复杂自主平台中。本文详细描述了框架的实现和实时结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合V2X通信与集成员估计的框架，用于提升重型自动驾驶车辆在城市复杂环境中的态势感知能力。
AI.motivation: 传统自动驾驶车辆因视野遮挡和盲区问题导致态势感知不足，尤其在城市场景中存在安全隐患，需更可靠的信息共享与估计方法。
AI.method: 通过V2X通信共享周边车辆及道路使用者状态信息，并结合集成员估计技术进行状态预测与不确定性处理，构建动态适应的协同感知框架。
AI.result: 实现了框架在现有自动驾驶平台的集成，并通过实时测试验证了其在动态场景中的安全性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效增强了复杂城市环境下的态势感知能力，为自动驾驶提供了更安全可靠的信息共享与估计解决方案。

title: CEN-HDR: Computationally Efficient neural Network for real-time High Dynamic Range imaging
title_zh: CEN-HDR：用于实时高动态范围成像的计算高效神经网络
abstract: High dynamic range (HDR) imaging is still a challenging task in modern digital photography. Recent research proposes solutions that provide high-quality acquisition but at the cost of a very large number of operations and a slow inference time that prevent the implementation of these solutions on lightweight real-time systems. In this paper, we propose CEN-HDR, a new computationally efficient neural network by providing a novel architecture based on a light attention mechanism and sub-pixel convolution operations for real-time HDR imaging. We also provide an efficient training scheme by applying network compression using knowledge distillation. We performed extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons to show that our approach produces competitive results in image quality while being faster than state-of-the-art solutions, allowing it to be practically deployed under real-time constraints. Experimental results show our method obtains a score of 43.04 mu-PSNR on the Kalantari2017 dataset with a framerate of 33 FPS using a Macbook M1 NPU.
summary: High dynamic range (HDR) imaging is still a challenging task in modern digital photography. Recent research proposes solutions that provide high-quality acquisition but at the cost of a very large number of operations and a slow inference time that prevent the implementation of these solutions on lightweight real-time systems. In this paper, we propose CEN-HDR, a new computationally efficient neural network by providing a novel architecture based on a light attention mechanism and sub-pixel convolution operations for real-time HDR imaging. We also provide an efficient training scheme by applying network compression using knowledge distillation. We performed extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons to show that our approach produces competitive results in image quality while being faster than state-of-the-art solutions, allowing it to be practically deployed under real-time constraints. Experimental results show our method obtains a score of 43.04 mu-PSNR on the Kalantari2017 dataset with a framerate of 33 FPS using a Macbook M1 NPU.
abstract_zh: 高动态范围（HDR）成像仍然是现代数码摄影中的一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究提出了提供高质量采集的解决方案，但代价是大量操作和缓慢的推理时间，阻碍了这些解决方案在轻量级实时系统上的实现。在本文中，我们提出了 CEN-HDR，这是一种新的计算高效的神经网络，它为实时 HDR 成像提供了一种基于光注意机制和子像素卷积运算的新颖架构。我们还通过使用知识蒸馏应用网络压缩来提供有效的训练方案。我们进行了广泛的定性和定量比较，以表明我们的方法在图像质量方面产生了有竞争力的结果，同时比最先进的解决方案更快，使其能够在实时限制下实际部署。实验结果表明，我们的方法使用 Macbook M1 NPU 在 Kalantari2017 数据集上以 33 FPS 的帧速率获得了 43.04 mu-PSNR 的分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CEN-HDR，一种用于实时高动态范围成像的计算高效神经网络架构。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR算法虽质量高但计算量大、推理速度慢，难以部署于轻量级实时系统。
AI.method: 设计轻量注意力机制与子像素卷积架构，并结合知识蒸馏进行网络压缩训练。
AI.result: 在Kalantari2017数据集上达到43.04 mu-PSNR，使用Macbook M1 NPU实现33 FPS实时处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证图像质量的同时显著提升计算效率，满足实时HDR成像需求。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法在保证图像质量的同时显著提升计算效率，满足实时HDR成像需求。

search_text: CEN-HDR: Computationally Efficient neural Network for real-time High Dynamic Range imaging CEN-HDR：用于实时高动态范围成像的计算高效神经网络 High dynamic range (HDR) imaging is still a challenging task in modern digital photography. Recent research proposes solutions that provide high-quality acquisition but at the cost of a very large number of operations and a slow inference time that prevent the implementation of these solutions on lightweight real-time systems. In this paper, we propose CEN-HDR, a new computationally efficient neural network by providing a novel architecture based on a light attention mechanism and sub-pixel convolution operations for real-time HDR imaging. We also provide an efficient training scheme by applying network compression using knowledge distillation. We performed extensive qualitative and quantitative comparisons to show that our approach produces competitive results in image quality while being faster than state-of-the-art solutions, allowing it to be practically deployed under real-time constraints. Experimental results show our method obtains a score of 43.04 mu-PSNR on the Kalantari2017 dataset with a framerate of 33 FPS using a Macbook M1 NPU. 高动态范围（HDR）成像仍然是现代数码摄影中的一项具有挑战性的任务。最近的研究提出了提供高质量采集的解决方案，但代价是大量操作和缓慢的推理时间，阻碍了这些解决方案在轻量级实时系统上的实现。在本文中，我们提出了 CEN-HDR，这是一种新的计算高效的神经网络，它为实时 HDR 成像提供了一种基于光注意机制和子像素卷积运算的新颖架构。我们还通过使用知识蒸馏应用网络压缩来提供有效的训练方案。我们进行了广泛的定性和定量比较，以表明我们的方法在图像质量方面产生了有竞争力的结果，同时比最先进的解决方案更快，使其能够在实时限制下实际部署。实验结果表明，我们的方法使用 Macbook M1 NPU 在 Kalantari2017 数据集上以 33 FPS 的帧速率获得了 43.04 mu-PSNR 的分数。 本文提出CEN-HDR，一种用于实时高动态范围成像的计算高效神经网络架构。 Steven Tel,Barthélémy Heyrman,Dominique Ginhac cs.CV,eess.IV

title: CGA-PoseNet: Camera Pose Regression via a 1D-Up Approach to Conformal Geometric Algebra
title_zh: CGA-PoseNet：通过一维向上方法实现共形几何代数的相机姿态回归
abstract: We introduce CGA-PoseNet, which uses the 1D-Up approach to Conformal Geometric Algebra (CGA) to represent rotations and translations with a single mathematical object, the motor, for camera pose regression. We do so starting from PoseNet, which successfully predicts camera poses from small datasets of RGB frames. State-of-the-art methods, however, require expensive tuning to balance the orientational and translational components of the camera pose.This is usually done through complex, ad-hoc loss function to be minimized, and in some cases also requires 3D points as well as images. Our approach has the advantage of unifying the camera position and orientation through the motor. Consequently, the network searches for a single object which lives in a well-behaved 4D space with a Euclidean signature. This means that we can address the case of image-only datasets and work efficiently with a simple loss function, namely the mean squared error (MSE) between the predicted and ground truth motors. We show that it is possible to achieve high accuracy camera pose regression with a significantly simpler problem formulation. This 1D-Up approach to CGA can be employed to overcome the dichotomy between translational and orientational components in camera pose regression in a compact and elegant way.
summary: We introduce CGA-PoseNet, which uses the 1D-Up approach to Conformal Geometric Algebra (CGA) to represent rotations and translations with a single mathematical object, the motor, for camera pose regression. We do so starting from PoseNet, which successfully predicts camera poses from small datasets of RGB frames. State-of-the-art methods, however, require expensive tuning to balance the orientational and translational components of the camera pose.This is usually done through complex, ad-hoc loss function to be minimized, and in some cases also requires 3D points as well as images. Our approach has the advantage of unifying the camera position and orientation through the motor. Consequently, the network searches for a single object which lives in a well-behaved 4D space with a Euclidean signature. This means that we can address the case of image-only datasets and work efficiently with a simple loss function, namely the mean squared error (MSE) between the predicted and ground truth motors. We show that it is possible to achieve high accuracy camera pose regression with a significantly simpler problem formulation. This 1D-Up approach to CGA can be employed to overcome the dichotomy between translational and orientational components in camera pose regression in a compact and elegant way.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 CGA-PoseNet，它使用共形几何代数 (CGA) 的 1D-Up 方法来用单个数学对象（电机）表示旋转和平移，以进行相机姿态回归。我们从 PoseNet 开始，它成功地从 RGB 帧的小数据集预测相机姿势。然而，最先进的方法需要昂贵的调整来平衡相机姿态的方向和平移分量。这通常是通过复杂的、临时的损失函数来最小化来完成的，并且在某些情况下还需要 3D 点和图像。我们的方法的优点是通过电机统一相机位置和方向。因此，网络会搜索位于具有欧几里得签名的良好 4D 空间中的单个对象。这意味着我们可以解决仅图像数据集的情况，并使用简单的损失函数（即预测电机和地面真实电机之间的均方误差（MSE））有效地工作。我们证明，可以通过更简单的问题表述来实现高精度相机位姿回归。这种 CGA 的 1D-Up 方法可用于以紧凑而优雅的方式克服相机姿态回归中平移和方向分量之间的二分法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CGA-PoseNet的方法，利用共形几何代数（CGA）的1D-Up方法进行相机姿态回归。
AI.motivation: 现有的相机姿态回归方法通常需要复杂的损失函数和3D点信息，难以平衡方向和位移组件，而本文旨在提供一种更简洁、统一的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文通过将旋转和平移统一为一个数学对象（motor）来实现相机姿态回归，使用共形几何代数的1D-Up方法，并采用简单的均方误差（MSE）作为损失函数。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能够在仅使用图像数据的情况下实现高精度的相机姿态回归。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的CGA-PoseNet方法通过共形几何代数的1D-Up方法，有效解决了相机姿态回归中方向和位移组件的二元对立问题，提供了一种简洁、高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Mingzhi Yuan,Xiaoshui Huang,Kexue Fu,Zhihao Li,Manning Wang
title: Boosting 3D Point Cloud Registration by Transferring Multi-modality Knowledge
title_zh: 通过传输多模态知识促进 3D 点云配准
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA 2023)
abstract: The recent multi-modality models have achieved great performance in many vision tasks because the extracted features contain the multi-modality knowledge. However, most of the current registration descriptors have only concentrated on local geometric structures. This paper proposes a method to boost point cloud registration accuracy by transferring the multi-modality knowledge of pre-trained multi-modality model to a new descriptor neural network. Different to the previous multi-modality methods that requires both modalities, the proposed method only requires point clouds during inference. Specifically, we propose an ensemble descriptor neural network combining pre-trained sparse convolution branch and a new point-based convolution branch. By fine-tuning on a single modality data, the proposed method achieves new state-of-the-art results on 3DMatch and competitive accuracy on 3DLoMatch and KITTI.
summary: The recent multi-modality models have achieved great performance in many vision tasks because the extracted features contain the multi-modality knowledge. However, most of the current registration descriptors have only concentrated on local geometric structures. This paper proposes a method to boost point cloud registration accuracy by transferring the multi-modality knowledge of pre-trained multi-modality model to a new descriptor neural network. Different to the previous multi-modality methods that requires both modalities, the proposed method only requires point clouds during inference. Specifically, we propose an ensemble descriptor neural network combining pre-trained sparse convolution branch and a new point-based convolution branch. By fine-tuning on a single modality data, the proposed method achieves new state-of-the-art results on 3DMatch and competitive accuracy on 3DLoMatch and KITTI.
abstract_zh: 最近的多模态模型在许多视觉任务中取得了很好的性能，因为提取的特征包含多模态知识。然而，当前大多数配准描述符仅集中于局部几何结构。本文提出了一种通过将预训练多模态模型的多模态知识转移到新的描述符神经网络来提高点云配准精度的方法。与之前需要两种模态的多模态方法不同，所提出的方法在推理过程中只需要点云。具体来说，我们提出了一种结合预训练稀疏卷积分支和新的基于点的卷积分支的集成描述符神经网络。通过对单一模态数据进行微调，所提出的方法在 3DMatch 上实现了新的最先进的结果，并在 3DLoMatch 和 KITTI 上实现了有竞争力的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过迁移多模态预训练模型知识来提升三维点云配准的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有点云配准描述子仅关注局部几何结构，未充分利用多模态模型中蕴含的跨模态特征表达能力。
AI.method: 设计集成稀疏卷积分支与点基卷积分支的描述子网络，通过单模态数据微调实现多模态知识迁移。
AI.result: 在3DMatch数据集上达到新SOTA，在3DLoMatch和KITTI上展现竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态知识迁移有效增强点云特征表达，证明跨模态特征对配准任务的促进作用。

authors_text: Yan Zeng,Ruichu Cai,Fuchun Sun,Libo Huang,Zhifeng Hao
title: A Survey on Causal Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 因果强化学习调查
abstract: While Reinforcement Learning (RL) achieves tremendous success in sequential decision-making problems of many domains, it still faces key challenges of data inefficiency and the lack of interpretability. Interestingly, many researchers have leveraged insights from the causality literature recently, bringing forth flourishing works to unify the merits of causality and address well the challenges from RL. As such, it is of great necessity and significance to collate these Causal Reinforcement Learning (CRL) works, offer a review of CRL methods, and investigate the potential functionality from causality toward RL. In particular, we divide existing CRL approaches into two categories according to whether their causality-based information is given in advance or not. We further analyze each category in terms of the formalization of different models, ranging from the Markov Decision Process (MDP), Partially Observed Markov Decision Process (POMDP), Multi-Arm Bandits (MAB), and Dynamic Treatment Regime (DTR). Moreover, we summarize the evaluation matrices and open sources while we discuss emerging applications, along with promising prospects for the future development of CRL.
summary: While Reinforcement Learning (RL) achieves tremendous success in sequential decision-making problems of many domains, it still faces key challenges of data inefficiency and the lack of interpretability. Interestingly, many researchers have leveraged insights from the causality literature recently, bringing forth flourishing works to unify the merits of causality and address well the challenges from RL. As such, it is of great necessity and significance to collate these Causal Reinforcement Learning (CRL) works, offer a review of CRL methods, and investigate the potential functionality from causality toward RL. In particular, we divide existing CRL approaches into two categories according to whether their causality-based information is given in advance or not. We further analyze each category in terms of the formalization of different models, ranging from the Markov Decision Process (MDP), Partially Observed Markov Decision Process (POMDP), Multi-Arm Bandits (MAB), and Dynamic Treatment Regime (DTR). Moreover, we summarize the evaluation matrices and open sources while we discuss emerging applications, along with promising prospects for the future development of CRL.
abstract_zh: 尽管强化学习（RL）在许多领域的顺序决策问题上取得了巨大成功，但它仍然面临着数据效率低下和缺乏可解释性的关键挑战。有趣的是，许多研究人员最近利用因果关系文献中的见解，提出了大量的著作来统一因果关系的优点并很好地应对强化学习的挑战。因此，整理这些因果强化学习（CRL）工作，回顾 CRL 方法，并研究因果关系对 RL 的潜在功能，具有非常必要性和意义。特别是，我们根据是否提前给出基于因果关系的信息，将现有的 CRL 方法分为两类。我们根据不同模型的形式化进一步分析每个类别，包括马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）、部分观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）、多臂老虎机（MAB）和动态治疗方案（DTR）。此外，我们总结了评估矩阵和开源，同时讨论了新兴应用，以及 CRL 未来发展的光明前景。

AI.tldr: 综述因果强化学习方法，分类讨论其模型形式化，并探讨应用与未来方向
AI.motivation: 解决RL的数据效率及可解释性问题，整合因果性优势以促进CRL发展
AI.method: 按因果信息是否预给定分类，分析MDP、POMDP等模型形式化，并总结评估指标与开源资源
AI.result: 总结评估指标与开源资源，讨论新兴应用，并指出未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: CRL结合因果性可提升RL性能，未来需更多研究推动其应用与发展

search_text: A Survey on Causal Reinforcement Learning 因果强化学习调查 While Reinforcement Learning (RL) achieves tremendous success in sequential decision-making problems of many domains, it still faces key challenges of data inefficiency and the lack of interpretability. Interestingly, many researchers have leveraged insights from the causality literature recently, bringing forth flourishing works to unify the merits of causality and address well the challenges from RL. As such, it is of great necessity and significance to collate these Causal Reinforcement Learning (CRL) works, offer a review of CRL methods, and investigate the potential functionality from causality toward RL. In particular, we divide existing CRL approaches into two categories according to whether their causality-based information is given in advance or not. We further analyze each category in terms of the formalization of different models, ranging from the Markov Decision Process (MDP), Partially Observed Markov Decision Process (POMDP), Multi-Arm Bandits (MAB), and Dynamic Treatment Regime (DTR). Moreover, we summarize the evaluation matrices and open sources while we discuss emerging applications, along with promising prospects for the future development of CRL. 尽管强化学习（RL）在许多领域的顺序决策问题上取得了巨大成功，但它仍然面临着数据效率低下和缺乏可解释性的关键挑战。有趣的是，许多研究人员最近利用因果关系文献中的见解，提出了大量的著作来统一因果关系的优点并很好地应对强化学习的挑战。因此，整理这些因果强化学习（CRL）工作，回顾 CRL 方法，并研究因果关系对 RL 的潜在功能，具有非常必要性和意义。特别是，我们根据是否提前给出基于因果关系的信息，将现有的 CRL 方法分为两类。我们根据不同模型的形式化进一步分析每个类别，包括马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）、部分观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）、多臂老虎机（MAB）和动态治疗方案（DTR）。此外，我们总结了评估矩阵和开源，同时讨论了新兴应用，以及 CRL 未来发展的光明前景。 综述因果强化学习方法，分类讨论其模型形式化，并探讨应用与未来方向 Yan Zeng,Ruichu Cai,Fuchun Sun,Libo Huang,Zhifeng Hao cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tianjun Zhang,Fangchen Liu,Justin Wong,Pieter Abbeel,Joseph E. Gonzalez
title: The Wisdom of Hindsight Makes Language Models Better Instruction Followers
title_zh: 事后诸葛亮让语言模型成为更好的指令追随者
abstract: Reinforcement learning has seen wide success in finetuning large language models to better align with instructions via human feedback. The so-called algorithm, Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) demonstrates impressive performance on the GPT series models. However, the underlying Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm is complex and requires an additional training pipeline for reward and value networks. In this paper, we consider an alternative approach: converting feedback to instruction by relabeling the original one and training the model for better alignment in a supervised manner. Such an algorithm doesn't require any additional parameters except for the original language model and maximally reuses the pretraining pipeline. To achieve this, we formulate instruction alignment problem for language models as a goal-reaching problem in decision making. We propose Hindsight Instruction Relabeling (HIR), a novel algorithm for aligning language models with instructions. The resulting two-stage algorithm shed light to a family of reward-free approaches that utilize the hindsightly relabeled instructions based on feedback. We evaluate the performance of HIR extensively on 12 challenging BigBench reasoning tasks and show that HIR outperforms the baseline algorithms and is comparable to or even surpasses supervised finetuning.
summary: Reinforcement learning has seen wide success in finetuning large language models to better align with instructions via human feedback. The so-called algorithm, Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF) demonstrates impressive performance on the GPT series models. However, the underlying Reinforcement Learning (RL) algorithm is complex and requires an additional training pipeline for reward and value networks. In this paper, we consider an alternative approach: converting feedback to instruction by relabeling the original one and training the model for better alignment in a supervised manner. Such an algorithm doesn't require any additional parameters except for the original language model and maximally reuses the pretraining pipeline. To achieve this, we formulate instruction alignment problem for language models as a goal-reaching problem in decision making. We propose Hindsight Instruction Relabeling (HIR), a novel algorithm for aligning language models with instructions. The resulting two-stage algorithm shed light to a family of reward-free approaches that utilize the hindsightly relabeled instructions based on feedback. We evaluate the performance of HIR extensively on 12 challenging BigBench reasoning tasks and show that HIR outperforms the baseline algorithms and is comparable to or even surpasses supervised finetuning.
abstract_zh: 强化学习在微调大型语言模型以更好地与人类反馈的指令保持一致方面取得了广泛的成功。所谓的算法，带有人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）在 GPT 系列模型上展示了令人印象深刻的性能。然而，底层的强化学习 (RL) 算法很复杂，需要额外的奖励和价值网络训练管道。在本文中，我们考虑了一种替代方法：通过重新标记原始反馈并将反馈转换为指令，并训练模型以便以监督方式更好地对齐。这样的算法除了原始语言模型之外不需要任何额外的参数，并且最大限度地重用了预训练管道。为了实现这一目标，我们将语言模型的指令对齐问题制定为决策中的目标达成问题。我们提出了事后指令重新标记（HIR），这是一种将语言模型与指令对齐的新颖算法。由此产生的两阶段算法揭示了一系列无奖励方法，这些方法利用基于反馈的事后重新标记指令。我们在 12 个具有挑战性的 BigBench 推理任务上广泛评估了 HIR 的性能，结果表明 HIR 优于基线算法，可与监督微调相媲美甚至超越。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需额外参数的语言模型指令对齐方法，通过将反馈转化为重新标记的指令进行监督训练，替代传统的强化学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统基于强化学习的指令微调方法（RLHF）需要额外训练奖励网络和价值网络，流程复杂且依赖参数。本文旨在探索更简洁的监督学习方法，最大化复用预训练流程。
AI.method: 提出Hindsight Instruction Relabeling（HIR）算法，将指令对齐问题转化为决策目标达成问题，通过监督学习直接利用反馈数据重新标记指令进行训练。
AI.result: 在12个BigBench推理任务中，HIR性能优于基线方法，且在部分任务上超越监督微调效果。
AI.conclusion: HIR验证了奖励无关的 hindsight 指令重标记方法在语言模型对齐任务中的有效性，为后续研究提供了新思路。

title: PointWavelet: Learning in Spectral Domain for 3D Point Cloud Analysis
title_zh: PointWavelet：3D 点云分析的谱域学习
abstract: With recent success of deep learning in 2D visual recognition, deep learning-based 3D point cloud analysis has received increasing attention from the community, especially due to the rapid development of autonomous driving technologies. However, most existing methods directly learn point features in the spatial domain, leaving the local structures in the spectral domain poorly investigated. In this paper, we introduce a new method, PointWavelet, to explore local graphs in the spectral domain via a learnable graph wavelet transform. Specifically, we first introduce the graph wavelet transform to form multi-scale spectral graph convolution to learn effective local structural representations. To avoid the time-consuming spectral decomposition, we then devise a learnable graph wavelet transform, which significantly accelerates the overall training process. Extensive experiments on four popular point cloud datasets, ModelNet40, ScanObjectNN, ShapeNet-Part, and S3DIS, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on point cloud classification and segmentation.
summary: With recent success of deep learning in 2D visual recognition, deep learning-based 3D point cloud analysis has received increasing attention from the community, especially due to the rapid development of autonomous driving technologies. However, most existing methods directly learn point features in the spatial domain, leaving the local structures in the spectral domain poorly investigated. In this paper, we introduce a new method, PointWavelet, to explore local graphs in the spectral domain via a learnable graph wavelet transform. Specifically, we first introduce the graph wavelet transform to form multi-scale spectral graph convolution to learn effective local structural representations. To avoid the time-consuming spectral decomposition, we then devise a learnable graph wavelet transform, which significantly accelerates the overall training process. Extensive experiments on four popular point cloud datasets, ModelNet40, ScanObjectNN, ShapeNet-Part, and S3DIS, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on point cloud classification and segmentation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着深度学习在2D视觉识别领域的成功，基于深度学习的3D点云分析越来越受到社会的关注，特别是由于自动驾驶技术的快速发展。然而，大多数现有方法直接学习空间域中的点特征，而对谱域中的局部结构的研究却很少。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新方法 PointWavelet，通过可学习的图小波变换来探索谱域中的局部图。具体来说，我们首先引入图小波变换来形成多尺度谱图卷积，以学习有效的局部结构表示。为了避免耗时的谱分解，我们设计了一种可学习的图小波变换，这显着加速了整个训练过程。在四种流行的点云数据集 ModelNet40、ScanObjectNN、ShapeNet-Part 和 S3DIS 上进行的大量实验证明了所提出的方法在点云分类和分割方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PointWavelet方法，在频谱域中通过可学习的图小波变换进行3D点云分析，提升分类和分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云分析方法主要在空间域学习特征，而频谱域的局部结构研究不足，导致效率与效果受限。
AI.method: 引入图小波变换构建多尺度频谱图卷积，并设计可学习的图小波变换以加速训练过程。
AI.result: 在ModelNet40、ScanObjectNN等四个数据集上验证，证明方法在点云分类和分割任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PointWavelet通过频谱域学习有效捕捉局部结构，为3D点云分析提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。

Specifically, we first introduce the graph wavelet transform to form multi-scale spectral graph convolution to learn effective local structural representations. To avoid the time-consuming spectral decomposition, we then devise a learnable graph wavelet transform, which significantly accelerates the overall training process. Extensive experiments on four popular point cloud datasets, ModelNet40, ScanObjectNN, ShapeNet-Part, and S3DIS, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method on point cloud classification and segmentation. 近年来，随着深度学习在2D视觉识别领域的成功，基于深度学习的3D点云分析越来越受到社会的关注，特别是由于自动驾驶技术的快速发展。然而，大多数现有方法直接学习空间域中的点特征，而对谱域中的局部结构的研究却很少。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新方法 PointWavelet，通过可学习的图小波变换来探索谱域中的局部图。具体来说，我们首先引入图小波变换来形成多尺度谱图卷积，以学习有效的局部结构表示。为了避免耗时的谱分解，我们设计了一种可学习的图小波变换，这显着加速了整个训练过程。在四种流行的点云数据集 ModelNet40、ScanObjectNN、ShapeNet-Part 和 S3DIS 上进行的大量实验证明了所提出的方法在点云分类和分割方面的有效性。 本文提出PointWavelet方法，在频谱域中通过可学习的图小波变换进行3D点云分析，提升分类和分割性能。 Cheng Wen,Jianzhi Long,Baosheng Yu,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

title: End-to-end Semantic Object Detection with Cross-Modal Alignment
title_zh: 具有跨模态对齐的端到端语义对象检测
abstract: Traditional semantic image search methods aim to retrieve images that match the meaning of the text query. However, these methods typically search for objects on the whole image, without considering the localization of objects within the image. This paper presents an extension of existing object detection models for semantic image search that considers the semantic alignment between object proposals and text queries, with a focus on searching for objects within images. The proposed model uses a single feature extractor, a pre-trained Convolutional Neural Network, and a transformer encoder to encode the text query. Proposal-text alignment is performed using contrastive learning, producing a score for each proposal that reflects its semantic alignment with the text query. The Region Proposal Network (RPN) is used to generate object proposals, and the end-to-end training process allows for an efficient and effective solution for semantic image search. The proposed model was trained end-to-end, providing a promising solution for semantic image search that retrieves images that match the meaning of the text query and generates semantically relevant object proposals.
summary: Traditional semantic image search methods aim to retrieve images that match the meaning of the text query. However, these methods typically search for objects on the whole image, without considering the localization of objects within the image. This paper presents an extension of existing object detection models for semantic image search that considers the semantic alignment between object proposals and text queries, with a focus on searching for objects within images. The proposed model uses a single feature extractor, a pre-trained Convolutional Neural Network, and a transformer encoder to encode the text query. Proposal-text alignment is performed using contrastive learning, producing a score for each proposal that reflects its semantic alignment with the text query. The Region Proposal Network (RPN) is used to generate object proposals, and the end-to-end training process allows for an efficient and effective solution for semantic image search. The proposed model was trained end-to-end, providing a promising solution for semantic image search that retrieves images that match the meaning of the text query and generates semantically relevant object proposals.
abstract_zh: 传统的语义图像搜索方法旨在检索与文本查询的含义相匹配的图像。然而，这些方法通常在整个图像上搜索对象，而不考虑图像内对象的定位。本文提出了用于语义图像搜索的现有对象检测模型的扩展，该模型考虑了对象提议和文本查询之间的语义对齐，重点是搜索图像内的对象。所提出的模型使用单个特征提取器、预训练的卷积神经网络和变压器编码器来对文本查询进行编码。提案-文本对齐是使用对比学习来执行的，为每个提案生成一个分数，反映其与文本查询的语义对齐。区域提议网络（RPN）用于生成对象提议，端到端的训练过程为语义图像搜索提供了高效且有效的解决方案。所提出的模型经过端到端训练，为语义图像搜索提供了一种有前景的解决方案，可以检索与文本查询含义相匹配的图像并生成语义相关的对象建议。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的语义目标检测方法，通过跨模态对齐实现更精确的语义图像搜索。
AI.motivation: 传统语义图像搜索方法未考虑图像中目标的定位信息，导致检索结果不够精准。本文旨在通过语义对齐提升目标定位与文本查询的匹配度。
AI.method: 采用预训练CNN和Transformer编码器处理文本，结合对比学习实现候选框与文本的语义对齐，并通过RPN生成目标候选框，最终端到端训练模型。
AI.result: 模型能够有效检索与文本查询语义匹配的图像，并生成语义相关的目标候选框，验证了端到端训练的高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过跨模态对齐机制，为语义图像搜索提供了更精准的目标定位解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Thomas Stegmüller,Christian Abbet,Behzad Bozorgtabar,Holly Clarke,Patrick Petignat,Pierre Vassilakos,Jean-Philippe Thiran
title: Self-supervised learning-based cervical cytology for the triage of HPV-positive women in resource-limited settings and low-data regime
title_zh: 基于自我监督学习的宫颈细胞学检查，用于在资源有限的环境和低数据制度下对 HPV 阳性女性进行分类
abstract: Screening Papanicolaou test samples has proven to be highly effective in reducing cervical cancer-related mortality. However, the lack of trained cytopathologists hinders its widespread implementation in low-resource settings. Deep learning-based telecytology diagnosis emerges as an appealing alternative, but it requires the collection of large annotated training datasets, which is costly and time-consuming. In this paper, we demonstrate that the abundance of unlabeled images that can be extracted from Pap smear test whole slide images presents a fertile ground for self-supervised learning methods, yielding performance improvements relative to readily available pre-trained models for various downstream tasks. In particular, we propose \textbf{C}ervical \textbf{C}ell \textbf{C}opy-\textbf{P}asting ($\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$) as an effective augmentation method, which enables knowledge transfer from open-source and labeled single-cell datasets to unlabeled tiles. Not only does $\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$ outperforms naive transfer from single-cell images, but we also demonstrate its advantageous integration into multiple instance learning methods. Importantly, all our experiments are conducted on our introduced \textit{in-house} dataset comprising liquid-based cytology Pap smear images obtained using low-cost technologies. This aligns with our objective of leveraging deep learning-based telecytology for diagnosis in low-resource settings.
summary: Screening Papanicolaou test samples has proven to be highly effective in reducing cervical cancer-related mortality. However, the lack of trained cytopathologists hinders its widespread implementation in low-resource settings. Deep learning-based telecytology diagnosis emerges as an appealing alternative, but it requires the collection of large annotated training datasets, which is costly and time-consuming. In this paper, we demonstrate that the abundance of unlabeled images that can be extracted from Pap smear test whole slide images presents a fertile ground for self-supervised learning methods, yielding performance improvements relative to readily available pre-trained models for various downstream tasks. In particular, we propose \textbf{C}ervical \textbf{C}ell \textbf{C}opy-\textbf{P}asting ($\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$) as an effective augmentation method, which enables knowledge transfer from open-source and labeled single-cell datasets to unlabeled tiles. Not only does $\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$ outperforms naive transfer from single-cell images, but we also demonstrate its advantageous integration into multiple instance learning methods. Importantly, all our experiments are conducted on our introduced \textit{in-house} dataset comprising liquid-based cytology Pap smear images obtained using low-cost technologies. This aligns with our objective of leveraging deep learning-based telecytology for diagnosis in low-resource settings.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，筛查巴氏测试样本对于降低宫颈癌相关死亡率非常有效。然而，缺乏训练有素的细胞病理学家阻碍了其在资源匮乏地区的广泛实施。基于深度学习的远程细胞学诊断成为一种有吸引力的替代方案，但它需要收集大量带注释的训练数据集，这是昂贵且耗时的。在本文中，我们证明了可以从巴氏涂片测试整个幻灯片图像中提取的大量未标记图像为自监督学习方法提供了肥沃的土壤，相对于各种下游任务的现成预训练模型而言，可以提高性能。特别是，我们提出 \textbf{C}ervical \textbf{C}ell \textbf{C}opy-\textbf{P}asting ($\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$) 作为一种有效的增强方法，它使得知识从开源和标记的单细胞数据集转移到未标记的图块。 $\texttt{C}^{3}\texttt{P}$ 不仅优于单细胞图像的朴素迁移，而且我们还证明了其与多个实例学习方法的有利集成。重要的是，我们所有的实验都是在我们引入的 \textit{in-house} 数据集上进行的，该数据集包含使用低成本技术获得的基于液体的细胞学巴氏涂片图像。这符合我们利用基于深度学习的远程细胞学在资源匮乏的环境中进行诊断的目标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自监督学习的宫颈细胞学诊断方法，用于资源有限地区HPV阳性女性的分流，解决数据不足和标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 低资源地区缺乏训练有素的细胞病理学家且标注数据成本高，传统深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据难以应用。
AI.method: 提出C³P方法，通过复制粘贴开源单细胞图像到未标注切片实现数据增强，并结合多实例学习框架，在低技术成本数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: C³P方法在下游任务中优于传统迁移学习，且在低数据量场景下保持良好性能，证明其在资源受限环境的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低资源地区提供了一种无需大量标注数据的宫颈癌筛查方案，推动基于深度学习的远程诊断应用。

title: Virtually increasing the measurement frequency of LIDAR sensor utilizing a single RGB camera
title_zh: 利用单个 RGB 摄像头实际上提高了 LIDAR 传感器的测量频率
abstract: The frame rates of most 3D LIDAR sensors used in intelligent vehicles are substantially lower than current cameras installed in the same vehicle. This research suggests using a mono camera to virtually enhance the frame rate of LIDARs, allowing the more frequent monitoring of dynamic objects in the surroundings that move quickly. As a first step, dynamic object candidates are identified and tracked in the camera frames. Following that, the LIDAR measurement points of these items are found by clustering in the frustums of 2D bounding boxes. Projecting these to the camera and tracking them to the next camera frame can be used to create 3D-2D correspondences between different timesteps. These correspondences between the last LIDAR frame and the actual camera frame are used to solve the PnP (Perspective-n-Point) problem. Finally, the estimated transformations are applied to the previously measured points to generate virtual measurements. With the proposed estimation, if the ego movement is known, not just static object position can be determined at timesteps where camera measurement is available, but positions of dynamic objects as well. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on large public datasets in terms of accuracy and similarity to real measurements.
summary: The frame rates of most 3D LIDAR sensors used in intelligent vehicles are substantially lower than current cameras installed in the same vehicle. This research suggests using a mono camera to virtually enhance the frame rate of LIDARs, allowing the more frequent monitoring of dynamic objects in the surroundings that move quickly. As a first step, dynamic object candidates are identified and tracked in the camera frames. Following that, the LIDAR measurement points of these items are found by clustering in the frustums of 2D bounding boxes. Projecting these to the camera and tracking them to the next camera frame can be used to create 3D-2D correspondences between different timesteps. These correspondences between the last LIDAR frame and the actual camera frame are used to solve the PnP (Perspective-n-Point) problem. Finally, the estimated transformations are applied to the previously measured points to generate virtual measurements. With the proposed estimation, if the ego movement is known, not just static object position can be determined at timesteps where camera measurement is available, but positions of dynamic objects as well. We achieve state-of-the-art performance on large public datasets in terms of accuracy and similarity to real measurements.
abstract_zh: 智能车辆中使用的大多数 3D LIDAR 传感器的帧速率大大低于同一车辆中当前安装的摄像头。这项研究建议使用单摄像头实际上提高激光雷达的帧速率，从而可以更频繁地监控周围快速移动的动态物体。第一步，在相机帧中识别和跟踪动态候选对象。接下来，通过在 2D 边界框的平截头体中聚类来找到这些项目的 LIDAR 测量点。将它们投影到相机并将它们跟踪到下一个相机帧可用于创建不同时间步长之间的 3D-2D 对应关系。最后一个激光雷达帧和实际相机帧之间的这些对应关系用于解决 PnP（Perspective-n-Point）问题。最后，将估计的变换应用于先前测量的点以生成虚拟测量。通过所提出的估计，如果自我运动已知，则不仅可以在相机测量可用的时间步确定静态物体位置，还可以确定动态物体的位置。我们在大型公共数据集上在准确性和与实际测量的相似性方面实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用单目RGB相机提升LIDAR传感器的测量频率，以更频繁地监控快速移动的动态物体。
AI.motivation: 智能车辆中LIDAR传感器的帧率远低于相机，需通过相机数据增强LIDAR对动态物体的监测能力。
AI.method: 通过相机识别跟踪动态物体，聚类LIDAR点云生成3D-2D对应关系，求解PnP问题并应用变换生成虚拟测量点。
AI.result: 在大型公开数据集上达到最先进的精度和真实测量相似度。
AI.conclusion: 结合相机数据与已知的自身运动信息，可同时确定静态和动态物体的位置，提升LIDAR时空分辨率。

authors_text: Andrea Bernardini,Andrea Brunello,Gian Luigi Gigli,Angelo Montanari,Nicola Saccomanno
title: AIOSA: An approach to the automatic identification of obstructive sleep apnea events based on deep learning
title_zh: AIOSA：一种基于深度学习的阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停事件自动识别方法
comment: Final article published on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine Journal
comments: Final article published on Artificial Intelligence in Medicine Journal
abstract: Obstructive Sleep Apnea Syndrome (OSAS) is the most common sleep-related breathing disorder. It is caused by an increased upper airway resistance during sleep, which determines episodes of partial or complete interruption of airflow. The detection and treatment of OSAS is particularly important in stroke patients, because the presence of severe OSAS is associated with higher mortality, worse neurological deficits, worse functional outcome after rehabilitation, and a higher likelihood of uncontrolled hypertension. The gold standard test for diagnosing OSAS is polysomnography (PSG). Unfortunately, performing a PSG in an electrically hostile environment, like a stroke unit, on neurologically impaired patients is a difficult task; also, the number of strokes per day outnumbers the availability of polysomnographs and dedicated healthcare professionals. Thus, a simple and automated recognition system to identify OSAS among acute stroke patients, relying on routinely recorded vital signs, is desirable. The majority of the work done so far focuses on data recorded in ideal conditions and highly selected patients, and thus it is hardly exploitable in real-life settings, where it would be of actual use. In this paper, we propose a convolutional deep learning architecture able to reduce the temporal resolution of raw waveform data, like physiological signals, extracting key features that can be used for further processing. We exploit models based on such an architecture to detect OSAS events in stroke unit recordings obtained from the monitoring of unselected patients. Unlike existing approaches, annotations are performed at one-second granularity, allowing physicians to better interpret the model outcome. Results are considered to be satisfactory by the domain experts. Moreover, based on a widely-used benchmark, we show that the proposed approach outperforms current state-of-the-art solutions.

It is caused by an increased upper airway resistance during sleep, which determines episodes of partial or complete interruption of airflow. Unfortunately, performing a PSG in an electrically hostile environment, like a stroke unit, on neurologically impaired patients is a difficult task; also, the number of strokes per day outnumbers the availability of polysomnographs and dedicated healthcare professionals. Thus, a simple and automated recognition system to identify OSAS among acute stroke patients, relying on routinely recorded vital signs, is desirable. The majority of the work done so far focuses on data recorded in ideal conditions and highly selected patients, and thus it is hardly exploitable in real-life settings, where it would be of actual use. In this paper, we propose a convolutional deep learning architecture able to reduce the temporal resolution of raw waveform data, like physiological signals, extracting key features that can be used for further processing. We exploit models based on such an architecture to detect OSAS events in stroke unit recordings obtained from the monitoring of unselected patients. abstract_zh: 阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停综合征 (OSAS) 是最常见的与睡眠相关的呼吸障碍。它是由睡眠期间上呼吸道阻力增加引起的，这决定了气流部分或完全中断的情况。 OSAS 的检测和治疗对于中风患者尤为重要，因为严重 OSAS 的存在与较高的死亡率、更严重的神经功能缺损、康复后更差的功能结果以及不受控制的高血压的可能性更高有关。诊断 OSAS 的金标准测试是多导睡眠图 (PSG)。不幸的是，在中风病房等电环境恶劣的环境中，对神经受损的患者进行 PSG 是一项艰巨的任务。此外，每天的中风次数超过了多导睡眠监测仪和专业医疗保健专业人员的数量。因此，需要一种简单的自动识别系统来根据常规记录的生命体征来识别急性中风患者中的 OSAS。迄今为止所做的大部分工作都集中在理想条件和精心挑选的患者中记录的数据，因此很难在现实生活中实际使用。在本文中，我们提出了一种卷积深度学习架构，能够降低原始波形数据（如生理信号）的时间分辨率，提取可用于进一步处理的关键特征。我们利用基于这种架构的模型来检测通过监测未选择的患者获得的卒中单元记录中的 OSAS 事件。与现有方法不同，注释以一秒的粒度执行，使医生能够更好地解释模型结果。领域专家认为结果是令人满意的。此外，基于广泛使用的基准，我们表明所提出的方法优于当前最先进的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动识别阻塞性睡眠呼吸暂停事件的方法AIOSA，利用常规记录的生命体征数据检测卒中患者的OSAS事件。
AI.motivation: 卒中患者常伴发严重OSAS，但多导睡眠图（PSG）在卒中病房难以实施，且现有方法多基于理想条件下的数据，无法满足真实场景需求。
AI.method: 设计卷积深度学习架构降低生理信号时间分辨率，提取关键特征，并采用1秒粒度标注提升模型可解释性。
AI.result: 领域专家认为结果满意，且在基准测试中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为卒中病房提供了基于常规监测数据的OSAS自动识别方案，有效解决了真实场景下的检测难题。
