title: Social Virtual Reality Avatar Biosignal Animations as Availability Status Indicators
title_zh: 社交虚拟现实头像生物信号动画作为可用性状态指示器
comment: Position paper for CHI '22 Workshop on "Social Presence in Virtual Event Spaces"
comments: Position paper for CHI '22 Workshop on "Social Presence in Virtual Event Spaces"
abstract: In this position paper, we outline our research challenges in Affective Interactive Systems, and present recent work on visualizing avatar biosignals for social VR entertainment. We highlight considerations for how biosignals animations in social VR spaces can (falsely) indicate users' availability status.
summary: In this position paper, we outline our research challenges in Affective Interactive Systems, and present recent work on visualizing avatar biosignals for social VR entertainment. We highlight considerations for how biosignals animations in social VR spaces can (falsely) indicate users' availability status.
abstract_zh: 在这篇立场文件中，我们概述了情感交互系统方面的研究挑战，并介绍了社交 VR 娱乐中虚拟化身生物信号可视化的最新工作。我们重点考虑社交 VR 空间中的生物信号动画如何（错误地）指示用户的可用性状态。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在社交虚拟现实环境中，通过化身生物信号动画作为用户可用性状态指示器的研究挑战与可视化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有社交VR系统缺乏有效传达用户实时状态的机制，生物信号动画可能提供更直观的可用性状态指示，但存在误判风险。
AI.method: 通过分析情感交互系统的研究挑战，结合社交VR中生物信号可视化案例，提出设计考量框架并验证其可行性。
AI.result: 发现生物信号动画可能因信号解读偏差或用户隐私问题导致可用性状态误判，需优化可视化设计与交互逻辑。
AI.conclusion: 需建立更精准的生物信号映射规则与用户反馈机制，以提升社交VR中状态指示的准确性与可信度。

search_text: Social Virtual Reality Avatar Biosignal Animations as Availability Status Indicators 社交虚拟现实头像生物信号动画作为可用性状态指示器 In this position paper, we outline our research challenges in Affective Interactive Systems, and present recent work on visualizing avatar biosignals for social VR entertainment. We highlight considerations for how biosignals animations in social VR spaces can (falsely) indicate users' availability status. 在这篇立场文件中，我们概述了情感交互系统方面的研究挑战，并介绍了社交 VR 娱乐中虚拟化身生物信号可视化的最新工作。我们重点考虑社交 VR 空间中的生物信号动画如何（错误地）指示用户的可用性状态。 本文探讨了在社交虚拟现实环境中，通过化身生物信号动画作为用户可用性状态指示器的研究挑战与可视化方法。 Abdallah El Ali,Sueyoon Lee,Pablo Cesar cs.HC

title: Dual Memory Units with Uncertainty Regulation for Weakly Supervised Video Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于弱监督视频异常检测的具有不确定性调节的双存储单元
abstract: Learning discriminative features for effectively separating abnormal events from normality is crucial for weakly supervised video anomaly detection (WS-VAD) tasks. Existing approaches, both video and segment-level label oriented, mainly focus on extracting representations for anomaly data while neglecting the implication of normal data. We observe that such a scheme is sub-optimal, i.e., for better distinguishing anomaly one needs to understand what is a normal state, and may yield a higher false alarm rate. To address this issue, we propose an Uncertainty Regulated Dual Memory Units (UR-DMU) model to learn both the representations of normal data and discriminative features of abnormal data. To be specific, inspired by the traditional global and local structure on graph convolutional networks, we introduce a Global and Local Multi-Head Self Attention (GL-MHSA) module for the Transformer network to obtain more expressive embeddings for capturing associations in videos. Then, we use two memory banks, one additional abnormal memory for tackling hard samples, to store and separate abnormal and normal prototypes and maximize the margins between the two representations. Finally, we propose an uncertainty learning scheme to learn the normal data latent space, that is robust to noise from camera switching, object changing, scene transforming, etc. Extensive experiments on XD-Violence and UCF-Crime datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a sizable margin.
summary: Learning discriminative features for effectively separating abnormal events from normality is crucial for weakly supervised video anomaly detection (WS-VAD) tasks. Existing approaches, both video and segment-level label oriented, mainly focus on extracting representations for anomaly data while neglecting the implication of normal data. We observe that such a scheme is sub-optimal, i.e., for better distinguishing anomaly one needs to understand what is a normal state, and may yield a higher false alarm rate. To address this issue, we propose an Uncertainty Regulated Dual Memory Units (UR-DMU) model to learn both the representations of normal data and discriminative features of abnormal data. To be specific, inspired by the traditional global and local structure on graph convolutional networks, we introduce a Global and Local Multi-Head Self Attention (GL-MHSA) module for the Transformer network to obtain more expressive embeddings for capturing associations in videos. Then, we use two memory banks, one additional abnormal memory for tackling hard samples, to store and separate abnormal and normal prototypes and maximize the margins between the two representations. Finally, we propose an uncertainty learning scheme to learn the normal data latent space, that is robust to noise from camera switching, object changing, scene transforming, etc. Extensive experiments on XD-Violence and UCF-Crime datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by a sizable margin.
abstract_zh: 学习区分特征以有效区分异常事件和正常事件对于弱监督视频异常检测（WS-VAD）任务至关重要。现有的方法，无论是面向视频还是面向片段级标签，主要侧重于提取异常数据的表示，而忽略了正常数据的含义。我们观察到这种方案是次优的，即为了更好地区分异常，需要了解什么是正常状态，并且可能会产生更高的误报率。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种不确定性调节双存储单元（UR-DMU）模型来学习正常数据的表示和异常数据的判别特征。具体来说，受到图卷积网络传统全局和局部结构的启发，我们为 Transformer 网络引入了全局和局部多头自注意力（GL-MHSA）模块，以获得更具表现力的嵌入来捕获视频中的关联。然后，我们使用两个内存库（一个额外的异常内存来处理硬样本）来存储和分离异常原型和正常原型，并最大化两种表示之间的裕度。最后，我们提出了一种不确定性学习方案来学习正常数据潜在空间，该方案对摄像机切换、对象变化、场景转换等产生的噪声具有鲁棒性。在 XD-Violence 和 UCF-Crime 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法在相当大的程度上优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双重记忆单元与不确定性调节的弱监督视频异常检测方法，旨在通过同时学习正常与异常数据的表示来提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注异常数据的特征提取，忽视了正常数据的隐含信息，导致难以准确区分正常与异常状态，从而产生较高的误报率。
AI.method: 设计了不确定性调节的双重记忆单元（UR-DMU），结合全局与局部多头自注意力模块（GL-MHSA）增强视频表征，并通过两个记忆库分离正常与异常原型，同时引入不确定性学习方案以增强对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在XD-Violence和UCF-Crime数据集上，该方法显著优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过同时建模正常与异常数据并引入不确定性调节，本文方法有效提升了弱监督视频异常检测的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: TTN: A Domain-Shift Aware Batch Normalization in Test-Time Adaptation
title_zh: TTN：测试时适应中的域转移感知批量归一化
abstract: This paper proposes a novel batch normalization strategy for test-time adaptation. Recent test-time adaptation methods heavily rely on the modified batch normalization, i.e., transductive batch normalization (TBN), which calculates the mean and the variance from the current test batch rather than using the running mean and variance obtained from the source data, i.e., conventional batch normalization (CBN). Adopting TBN that employs test batch statistics mitigates the performance degradation caused by the domain shift. However, re-estimating normalization statistics using test data depends on impractical assumptions that a test batch should be large enough and be drawn from i.i.d. stream, and we observed that the previous methods with TBN show critical performance drop without the assumptions. In this paper, we identify that CBN and TBN are in a trade-off relationship and present a new test-time normalization (TTN) method that interpolates the statistics by adjusting the importance between CBN and TBN according to the domain-shift sensitivity of each BN layer. Our proposed TTN improves model robustness to shifted domains across a wide range of batch sizes and in various realistic evaluation scenarios. TTN is widely applicable to other test-time adaptation methods that rely on updating model parameters via backpropagation. We demonstrate that adopting TTN further improves their performance and achieves state-of-the-art performance in various standard benchmarks.
summary: This paper proposes a novel batch normalization strategy for test-time adaptation. Recent test-time adaptation methods heavily rely on the modified batch normalization, i.e., transductive batch normalization (TBN), which calculates the mean and the variance from the current test batch rather than using the running mean and variance obtained from the source data, i.e., conventional batch normalization (CBN). Adopting TBN that employs test batch statistics mitigates the performance degradation caused by the domain shift. However, re-estimating normalization statistics using test data depends on impractical assumptions that a test batch should be large enough and be drawn from i.i.d. stream, and we observed that the previous methods with TBN show critical performance drop without the assumptions. In this paper, we identify that CBN and TBN are in a trade-off relationship and present a new test-time normalization (TTN) method that interpolates the statistics by adjusting the importance between CBN and TBN according to the domain-shift sensitivity of each BN layer. Our proposed TTN improves model robustness to shifted domains across a wide range of batch sizes and in various realistic evaluation scenarios. TTN is widely applicable to other test-time adaptation methods that rely on updating model parameters via backpropagation. We demonstrate that adopting TTN further improves their performance and achieves state-of-the-art performance in various standard benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于测试时间适应的新型批量归一化策略。最近的测试时间适应方法严重依赖于修改后的批量归一化，即转导批量归一化（TBN），它计算当前测试批次的均值和方差，而不是使用从源数据获得的运行均值和方差，即传统批量归一化（CBN）。采用采用测试批次统计数据的 TBN 可以减轻域转移导致的性能下降。然而，使用测试数据重新估计归一化统计量取决于不切实际的假设，即测试批次应足够大并从独立同分布中提取。流，我们观察到之前的 TBN 方法在没有假设的情况下表现出严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们确定了 CBN 和 TBN 处于权衡关系，并提出了一种新的测试时间归一化（TTN）方法，该方法根据每个 BN 层的域移位敏感性调整 CBN 和 TBN 之间的重要性来插值统计数据。我们提出的 TTN 提高了模型在各种批量大小和各种实际评估场景中对转移域的鲁棒性。 TTN 广泛适用于其他依赖于通过反向传播更新模型参数的测试时间自适应方法。我们证明，采用 TTN 进一步提高了它们的性能，并在各种标准基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在测试时自适应的领域偏移感知批量归一化方法TTN，以改进测试阶段模型的域适应能力。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法依赖的TBN存在对测试批次大小和独立同分布假设的强依赖，导致实际场景下性能显著下降。
AI.method: 设计TTN方法通过动态调整CBN与TBN的统计权重，根据每个批量归一化层的域偏移敏感性进行自适应插值计算。
AI.result: TTN在多种真实评估场景和不同批次规模下均提升模型鲁棒性，并在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: TTN通过平衡传统与测试时统计量的有效性，为测试时自适应方法提供了更通用且高效的归一化解决方案。

Our proposed TTN improves model robustness to shifted domains across a wide range of batch sizes and in various realistic evaluation scenarios. TTN is widely applicable to other test-time adaptation methods that rely on updating model parameters via backpropagation. We demonstrate that adopting TTN further improves their performance and achieves state-of-the-art performance in various standard benchmarks. 本文提出了一种用于测试时间适应的新型批量归一化策略。最近的测试时间适应方法严重依赖于修改后的批量归一化，即转导批量归一化（TBN），它计算当前测试批次的均值和方差，而不是使用从源数据获得的运行均值和方差，即传统批量归一化（CBN）。采用采用测试批次统计数据的 TBN 可以减轻域转移导致的性能下降。然而，使用测试数据重新估计归一化统计量取决于不切实际的假设，即测试批次应足够大并从独立同分布中提取。流，我们观察到之前的 TBN 方法在没有假设的情况下表现出严重的性能下降。在本文中，我们确定了 CBN 和 TBN 处于权衡关系，并提出了一种新的测试时间归一化（TTN）方法，该方法根据每个 BN 层的域移位敏感性调整 CBN 和 TBN 之间的重要性来插值统计数据。我们提出的 TTN 提高了模型在各种批量大小和各种实际评估场景中对转移域的鲁棒性。 TTN 广泛适用于其他依赖于通过反向传播更新模型参数的测试时间自适应方法。我们证明，采用 TTN 进一步提高了它们的性能，并在各种标准基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种在测试时自适应的领域偏移感知批量归一化方法TTN，以改进测试阶段模型的域适应能力。 Hyesu Lim,Byeonggeun Kim,Jaegul Choo,Sungha Choi cs.CV

authors_text: Arnaud Bougaham,Valentin Delchevalerie,Mohammed El Adoui,Benoît Frénay
title: Industrial and Medical Anomaly Detection Through Cycle-Consistent Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 通过周期一致的对抗网络进行工业和医疗异常检测
abstract: In this study, a new Anomaly Detection (AD) approach for industrial and medical images is proposed. This method leverages the theoretical strengths of unsupervised learning and the data availability of both normal and abnormal classes. Indeed, the AD is often formulated as an unsupervised task, implying only normal images during training. These normal images are devoted to be reconstructed, through an autoencoder architecture for instance. However, the information contained in abnormal data, when available, is also valuable for this reconstruction. The model would be able to identify its weaknesses by better learning how to transform an abnormal (respectively normal) image into a normal (respectively abnormal) one, helping the entire model to learn better than a single normal to normal reconstruction. To address this challenge, the proposed method uses Cycle-Generative Adversarial Networks (Cycle-GAN) for (ab)normal-to-normal translation. After an input image has been reconstructed by the normal generator, an anomaly score quantifies the differences between the input and its reconstruction. Based on a threshold set to satisfy a business quality constraint, the input image is then flagged as normal or not. The proposed method is evaluated on industrial and medical datasets. The results demonstrate accurate performance with a zero false negative constraint compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/ValDelch/CycleGANS-AnomalyDetection.
summary: In this study, a new Anomaly Detection (AD) approach for industrial and medical images is proposed. This method leverages the theoretical strengths of unsupervised learning and the data availability of both normal and abnormal classes. Indeed, the AD is often formulated as an unsupervised task, implying only normal images during training. These normal images are devoted to be reconstructed, through an autoencoder architecture for instance. However, the information contained in abnormal data, when available, is also valuable for this reconstruction. The model would be able to identify its weaknesses by better learning how to transform an abnormal (respectively normal) image into a normal (respectively abnormal) one, helping the entire model to learn better than a single normal to normal reconstruction. To address this challenge, the proposed method uses Cycle-Generative Adversarial Networks (Cycle-GAN) for (ab)normal-to-normal translation. After an input image has been reconstructed by the normal generator, an anomaly score quantifies the differences between the input and its reconstruction. Based on a threshold set to satisfy a business quality constraint, the input image is then flagged as normal or not. The proposed method is evaluated on industrial and medical datasets. The results demonstrate accurate performance with a zero false negative constraint compared to state-of-the-art methods. The code is available at https://github.com/ValDelch/CycleGANS-AnomalyDetection.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，提出了一种新的工业和医学图像异常检测（AD）方法。该方法利用了无监督学习的理论优势以及正常类和异常类的数据可用性。事实上，AD 通常被表述为无监督任务，这意味着训练期间仅使用正常图像。这些正常图像专门用于通过自动编码器架构等进行重建。然而，异常数据中包含的信息（如果可用）对于这种重建也很有价值。该模型将能够通过更好地学习如何将异常（分别为正常）图像转换为正常（分别为异常）图像来识别其弱点，从而帮助整个模型比单个正常到正常重建更好地学习。为了应对这一挑战，所提出的方法使用循环生成对抗网络（Cycle-GAN）进行（ab）正常到正常的转换。在正常生成器重建输入图像后，异常分数量化输入与其重建之间的差异。然后，根据为满足业务质量约束而设置的阈值，将输入图像标记为正常或不正常。所提出的方法在工业和医学数据集上进行了评估。与最先进的方法相比，结果证明了具有零假阴性约束的准确性能。代码可在 https://github.com/ValDelch/CycleGANS-AnomalyDetection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于循环一致对抗网络（Cycle-GAN）的工业与医疗图像异常检测方法，通过正常与异常图像的双向翻译及重构差异计算异常分数。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督异常检测仅利用正常图像进行训练，但异常数据中包含的有用信息未被充分利用。本文旨在通过结合正常与异常数据提升模型对异常的识别能力，同时满足业务质量约束。
AI.method: 采用Cycle-GAN实现正常与异常图像的双向翻译，利用生成器重构输入图像并计算输入与重构图像的差异作为异常分数，结合阈值判定正常或异常。
AI.result: 在工业与医疗数据集上验证，方法在零漏检约束下表现优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合正常与异常数据及Cycle-GAN的双向翻译机制，有效提升了异常检测性能，尤其在关键业务场景中具有实用价值。

title: Online Planning of Uncertain MDPs under Temporal Tasks and Safe-Return Constraints
title_zh: 临时任务和安全返回约束下不确定 MDP 的在线规划
abstract: This paper addresses the online motion planning problem of mobile robots under complex high-level tasks. The robot motion is modeled as an uncertain Markov Decision Process (MDP) due to limited initial knowledge, while the task is specified as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas. The proposed framework enables the robot to explore and update the system model in a Bayesian way, while simultaneously optimizing the asymptotic costs of satisfying the complex temporal task. Theoretical guarantees are provided for the synthesized outgoing policy and safety policy. More importantly, instead of greedy exploration under the classic ergodicity assumption, a safe-return requirement is enforced such that the robot can always return to home states with a high probability. The overall methods are validated by numerical simulations.
summary: This paper addresses the online motion planning problem of mobile robots under complex high-level tasks. The robot motion is modeled as an uncertain Markov Decision Process (MDP) due to limited initial knowledge, while the task is specified as Linear Temporal Logic (LTL) formulas. The proposed framework enables the robot to explore and update the system model in a Bayesian way, while simultaneously optimizing the asymptotic costs of satisfying the complex temporal task. Theoretical guarantees are provided for the synthesized outgoing policy and safety policy. More importantly, instead of greedy exploration under the classic ergodicity assumption, a safe-return requirement is enforced such that the robot can always return to home states with a high probability. The overall methods are validated by numerical simulations.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了复杂高级任务下移动机器人的在线运动规划问题。由于初始知识有限，机器人运动被建模为不确定的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），而任务被指定为线性时序逻辑（LTL）公式。所提出的框架使机器人能够以贝叶斯方式探索和更新系统模型，同时优化满足复杂时间任务的渐近成本。为综合的外出政策和安全政策提供了理论保证。更重要的是，不是经典遍历性假设下的贪婪探索，而是强制执行安全返回要求，使得机器人始终能够以高概率返回家乡状态。整体方法通过数值模拟进行了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不确定马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）下，结合时态任务和安全返回约束的机器人在线运动规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在探索时可能忽略安全返回需求，导致任务失败风险。本文旨在解决复杂任务下机器人探索与安全返回的平衡问题。
AI.method: 提出基于贝叶斯更新的模型探索框架，结合时态任务优化成本函数，并强制安全返回约束以保证高概率返回家园状态。
AI.result: 通过数值模拟验证了方法的有效性，理论证明了策略的收敛性与安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在满足复杂时态任务的同时确保安全返回，为机器人在线规划提供了新思路。

authors_text: Skylar E. Stolte,Kyle Volle,Aprinda Indahlastari,Alejandro Albizu,Adam J. Woods,Kevin Brink,Matthew Hale,Ruogu Fang
title: DOMINO: Domain-aware Loss for Deep Learning Calibration
title_zh: DOMINO：深度学习校准的领域感知损失
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, accepted by the Software Impacts journal
comments: 7 pages, 1 figure, 1 table, accepted by the Software Impacts journal
abstract: Deep learning has achieved the state-of-the-art performance across medical imaging tasks; however, model calibration is often not considered. Uncalibrated models are potentially dangerous in high-risk applications since the user does not know when they will fail. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel domain-aware loss function to calibrate deep learning models. The proposed loss function applies a class-wise penalty based on the similarity between classes within a given target domain. Thus, the approach improves the calibration while also ensuring that the model makes less risky errors even when incorrect. The code for this software is available at https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO.
summary: Deep learning has achieved the state-of-the-art performance across medical imaging tasks; however, model calibration is often not considered. Uncalibrated models are potentially dangerous in high-risk applications since the user does not know when they will fail. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel domain-aware loss function to calibrate deep learning models. The proposed loss function applies a class-wise penalty based on the similarity between classes within a given target domain. Thus, the approach improves the calibration while also ensuring that the model makes less risky errors even when incorrect. The code for this software is available at https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在医学成像任务中取得了最先进的性能；然而，模型校准通常不被考虑。未校准的模型在高风险应用中具有潜在危险，因为用户不知道它们何时会失败。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的领域感知损失函数来校准深度学习模型。所提出的损失函数根据给定目标域内类之间的相似性应用类惩罚。因此，该方法改进了校准，同时还确保模型即使在不正确​​的情况下也能减少风险错误。该软件的代码可在 https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种领域感知的损失函数DOMINO，用于提升深度学习模型在医学影像任务中的校准能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在高风险应用中存在校准不足的问题，导致用户无法预知模型失效风险，需改进模型可靠性。
AI.method: 设计基于目标领域类别相似性的类惩罚机制，通过调整损失函数优化模型输出分布与真实分布的一致性。
AI.result: 实验表明DOMINO能有效提升模型校准性能，降低错误预测的风险性，代码已开源验证。
AI.conclusion: 领域感知损失函数可显著增强深度学习模型在关键领域的可靠性，为安全应用提供理论支持。

search_text: DOMINO: Domain-aware Loss for Deep Learning Calibration DOMINO：深度学习校准的领域感知损失 Deep learning has achieved the state-of-the-art performance across medical imaging tasks; however, model calibration is often not considered. Uncalibrated models are potentially dangerous in high-risk applications since the user does not know when they will fail. Therefore, this paper proposes a novel domain-aware loss function to calibrate deep learning models. The proposed loss function applies a class-wise penalty based on the similarity between classes within a given target domain. Thus, the approach improves the calibration while also ensuring that the model makes less risky errors even when incorrect. The code for this software is available at https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO. 深度学习在医学成像任务中取得了最先进的性能；然而，模型校准通常不被考虑。未校准的模型在高风险应用中具有潜在危险，因为用户不知道它们何时会失败。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的领域感知损失函数来校准深度学习模型。所提出的损失函数根据给定目标域内类之间的相似性应用类惩罚。因此，该方法改进了校准，同时还确保模型即使在不正确​​的情况下也能减少风险错误。该软件的代码可在 https://github.com/lab-smile/DOMINO 获取。 本文提出一种领域感知的损失函数DOMINO，用于提升深度学习模型在医学影像任务中的校准能力。 Skylar E. Stolte,Kyle Volle,Aprinda Indahlastari,Alejandro Albizu,Adam J. Woods,Kevin Brink,Matthew Hale,Ruogu Fang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Soyeong Jeong,Jinheon Baek,Sung Ju Hwang,Jong C. Park
title: Realistic Conversational Question Answering with Answer Selection based on Calibrated Confidence and Uncertainty Measurement
title_zh: 基于校准置信度和不确定性测量的现实对话式问答和答案选择
abstract: Conversational Question Answering (ConvQA) models aim at answering a question with its relevant paragraph and previous question-answer pairs that occurred during conversation multiple times. To apply such models to a real-world scenario, some existing work uses predicted answers, instead of unavailable ground-truth answers, as the conversation history for inference. However, since these models usually predict wrong answers, using all the predictions without filtering significantly hampers the model performance. To address this problem, we propose to filter out inaccurate answers in the conversation history based on their estimated confidences and uncertainties from the ConvQA model, without making any architectural changes. Moreover, to make the confidence and uncertainty values more reliable, we propose to further calibrate them, thereby smoothing the model predictions. We validate our models, Answer Selection-based realistic Conversation Question Answering, on two standard ConvQA datasets, and the results show that our models significantly outperform relevant baselines. Code is available at: https://github.com/starsuzi/AS-ConvQA.
summary: Conversational Question Answering (ConvQA) models aim at answering a question with its relevant paragraph and previous question-answer pairs that occurred during conversation multiple times. To apply such models to a real-world scenario, some existing work uses predicted answers, instead of unavailable ground-truth answers, as the conversation history for inference. However, since these models usually predict wrong answers, using all the predictions without filtering significantly hampers the model performance. To address this problem, we propose to filter out inaccurate answers in the conversation history based on their estimated confidences and uncertainties from the ConvQA model, without making any architectural changes. Moreover, to make the confidence and uncertainty values more reliable, we propose to further calibrate them, thereby smoothing the model predictions. We validate our models, Answer Selection-based realistic Conversation Question Answering, on two standard ConvQA datasets, and the results show that our models significantly outperform relevant baselines. Code is available at: https://github.com/starsuzi/AS-ConvQA.
abstract_zh: 会话问答（ConvQA）模型旨在通过相关段落和对话过程中多次出现的先前问答对来回答问题。为了将此类模型应用于现实场景，一些现有的工作使用预测答案，而不是不可用的真实答案，作为推理的对话历史记录。然而，由于这些模型通常预测错误的答案，因此在不进行过滤的情况下使用所有预测会显着影响模型的性能。为了解决这个问题，我们建议根据 ConvQA 模型中估计的置信度和不确定性过滤掉对话历史记录中不准确的答案，而不进行任何架构更改。此外，为了使置信度和不确定性值更加可靠，我们建议进一步校准它们，从而平滑模型预测。我们在两个标准 ConvQA 数据集上验证了我们的模型，即基于答案选择的现实对话问答，结果表明我们的模型显着优于相关基线。代码位于：https://github.com/starsuzi/AS-ConvQA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于校准置信度和不确定性度量的对话问答方法，通过过滤不准确的历史预测答案提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对话问答模型在推理时使用预测答案作为历史信息，但错误预测会显著降低模型表现，需有效过滤不准确答案。
AI.method: 通过估计模型预测答案的置信度和不确定性进行过滤，并校准这些指标以提升可靠性，无需改变模型架构。
AI.result: 在两个标准ConvQA数据集上，该方法显著优于相关基线模型，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 校准置信度与不确定性度量的过滤机制有效提升了对话问答系统的准确性与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Mingjie Wang,Yande Li,Jun Zhou,Graham W. Taylor,Minglun Gong
title: GCNet: Probing Self-Similarity Learning for Generalized Counting Network
title_zh: GCNet：探索广义计数网络的自相似性学习
abstract: The class-agnostic counting (CAC) problem has caught increasing attention recently due to its wide societal applications and arduous challenges. To count objects of different categories, existing approaches rely on user-provided exemplars, which is hard-to-obtain and limits their generality. In this paper, we aim to empower the framework to recognize adaptive exemplars within the whole images. A zero-shot Generalized Counting Network (GCNet) is developed, which uses a pseudo-Siamese structure to automatically and effectively learn pseudo exemplar clues from inherent repetition patterns. In addition, a weakly-supervised scheme is presented to reduce the burden of laborious density maps required by all contemporary CAC models, allowing GCNet to be trained using count-level supervisory signals in an end-to-end manner. Without providing any spatial location hints, GCNet is capable of adaptively capturing them through a carefully-designed self-similarity learning strategy. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the prevailing benchmark FSC147 for zero-shot CAC demonstrate the superiority of our GCNet. It performs on par with existing exemplar-dependent methods and shows stunning cross-dataset generality on crowd-specific datasets, e.g., ShanghaiTech Part A, Part B and UCF_QNRF.
summary: The class-agnostic counting (CAC) problem has caught increasing attention recently due to its wide societal applications and arduous challenges. To count objects of different categories, existing approaches rely on user-provided exemplars, which is hard-to-obtain and limits their generality. In this paper, we aim to empower the framework to recognize adaptive exemplars within the whole images. A zero-shot Generalized Counting Network (GCNet) is developed, which uses a pseudo-Siamese structure to automatically and effectively learn pseudo exemplar clues from inherent repetition patterns. In addition, a weakly-supervised scheme is presented to reduce the burden of laborious density maps required by all contemporary CAC models, allowing GCNet to be trained using count-level supervisory signals in an end-to-end manner. Without providing any spatial location hints, GCNet is capable of adaptively capturing them through a carefully-designed self-similarity learning strategy. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the prevailing benchmark FSC147 for zero-shot CAC demonstrate the superiority of our GCNet. It performs on par with existing exemplar-dependent methods and shows stunning cross-dataset generality on crowd-specific datasets, e.g., ShanghaiTech Part A, Part B and UCF_QNRF.
abstract_zh: 由于其广泛的社会应用和艰巨的挑战，类不可知计数（CAC）问题最近引起了越来越多的关注。为了对不同类别的对象进行计数，现有的方法依赖于用户提供的示例，这很难获得并限制了它们的通用性。在本文中，我们的目标是使框架能够识别整个图像中的自适应样本。开发了零样本广义计数网络（GCNet），它使用伪孪生结构从固有的重复模式中自动有效地学习伪样本线索。此外，提出了一种弱监督方案，以减轻所有当代 CAC 模型所需的费力密度图的负担，从而允许 GCNet 以端到端的方式使用计数级监督信号进行训练。在不提供任何空间位置提示的情况下，GCNet 能够通过精心设计的自相似性学习策略自适应地捕获它们。对零样本 CAC 的流行基准 FSC147 进行的广泛实验和消融研究证明了我们的 GCNet 的优越性。它的性能与现有的依赖于样本的方法相当，并在特定人群的数据集（例如上海科技大学 A 部分、B 部分和 UCF_QNRF）上显示出令人惊叹的跨数据集通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工示例的零样本广义计数网络GCNet，通过自相似性学习实现跨类别物体计数。
AI.motivation: 现有类不可知计数方法依赖人工标注的示例，获取困难且限制模型通用性，需开发自动学习伪示例的自适应框架。
AI.method: 采用伪Siamese结构自动提取重复模式中的伪示例线索，结合弱监督方案以计数级信号训练，通过自相似性学习策略捕捉空间位置信息。
AI.result: 在FSC147数据集上达到与示例依赖方法相当的性能，在ShanghaiTech、UCF_QNRF等跨数据集测试中展现优异泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: GCNet通过自相似性学习有效解决零样本计数问题，验证了自动伪示例学习与弱监督训练的可行性，为通用计数模型发展提供新方向。

Without providing any spatial location hints, GCNet is capable of adaptively capturing them through a carefully-designed self-similarity learning strategy. Extensive experiments and ablation studies on the prevailing benchmark FSC147 for zero-shot CAC demonstrate the superiority of our GCNet. It performs on par with existing exemplar-dependent methods and shows stunning cross-dataset generality on crowd-specific datasets, e.g., ShanghaiTech Part A, Part B and UCF_QNRF. 由于其广泛的社会应用和艰巨的挑战，类不可知计数（CAC）问题最近引起了越来越多的关注。为了对不同类别的对象进行计数，现有的方法依赖于用户提供的示例，这很难获得并限制了它们的通用性。在本文中，我们的目标是使框架能够识别整个图像中的自适应样本。开发了零样本广义计数网络（GCNet），它使用伪孪生结构从固有的重复模式中自动有效地学习伪样本线索。此外，提出了一种弱监督方案，以减轻所有当代 CAC 模型所需的费力密度图的负担，从而允许 GCNet 以端到端的方式使用计数级监督信号进行训练。在不提供任何空间位置提示的情况下，GCNet 能够通过精心设计的自相似性学习策略自适应地捕获它们。对零样本 CAC 的流行基准 FSC147 进行的广泛实验和消融研究证明了我们的 GCNet 的优越性。它的性能与现有的依赖于样本的方法相当，并在特定人群的数据集（例如上海科技大学 A 部分、B 部分和 UCF_QNRF）上显示出令人惊叹的跨数据集通用性。 本文提出一种无需人工示例的零样本广义计数网络GCNet，通过自相似性学习实现跨类别物体计数。 Mingjie Wang,Yande Li,Jun Zhou,Graham W. Taylor,Minglun Gong cs.CV

authors_text: Yaqi Xie,Chen Yu,Tongyao Zhu,Jinbin Bai,Ze Gong,Harold Soh
title: Translating Natural Language to Planning Goals with Large-Language Models
title_zh: 使用大语言模型将自然语言转化为规划目标
abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on a variety of natural language processing (NLP) tasks, leading to intense excitement about their applicability across various domains. Unfortunately, recent work has also shown that LLMs are unable to perform accurate reasoning nor solve planning problems, which may limit their usefulness for robotics-related tasks. In this work, our central question is whether LLMs are able to translate goals specified in natural language to a structured planning language. If so, LLM can act as a natural interface between the planner and human users; the translated goal can be handed to domain-independent AI planners that are very effective at planning. Our empirical results on GPT 3.5 variants show that LLMs are much better suited towards translation rather than planning. We find that LLMs are able to leverage commonsense knowledge and reasoning to furnish missing details from under-specified goals (as is often the case in natural language). However, our experiments also reveal that LLMs can fail to generate goals in tasks that involve numerical or physical (e.g., spatial) reasoning, and that LLMs are sensitive to the prompts used. As such, these models are promising for translation to structured planning languages, but care should be taken in their use.
summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on a variety of natural language processing (NLP) tasks, leading to intense excitement about their applicability across various domains. Unfortunately, recent work has also shown that LLMs are unable to perform accurate reasoning nor solve planning problems, which may limit their usefulness for robotics-related tasks. In this work, our central question is whether LLMs are able to translate goals specified in natural language to a structured planning language. If so, LLM can act as a natural interface between the planner and human users; the translated goal can be handed to domain-independent AI planners that are very effective at planning. Our empirical results on GPT 3.5 variants show that LLMs are much better suited towards translation rather than planning. We find that LLMs are able to leverage commonsense knowledge and reasoning to furnish missing details from under-specified goals (as is often the case in natural language). However, our experiments also reveal that LLMs can fail to generate goals in tasks that involve numerical or physical (e.g., spatial) reasoning, and that LLMs are sensitive to the prompts used. As such, these models are promising for translation to structured planning languages, but care should be taken in their use.
abstract_zh: 最近的大型语言模型（LLM）在各种自然语言处理（NLP）任务上表现出了卓越的性能，导致人们对其在各个领域的适用性感到非常兴奋。不幸的是，最近的研究还表明，法学硕士无法执行准确的推理，也无法解决规划问题，这可能会限制它们在机器人相关任务中的有用性。在这项工作中，我们的核心问题是法学硕士是否能够将以自然语言指定的目标翻译为结构化规划语言。如果是这样，LLM 可以充当规划者和人类用户之间的自然界面；翻译后的目标可以交给独立于领域的人工智能规划者，他们在规划方面非常有效。我们对 GPT 3.5 变体的实证结果表明，法学硕士更适合翻译而不是规划。我们发现法学硕士能够利用常识知识和推理来提供未明确目标中缺失的细节（自然语言中经常出现这种情况）。然而，我们的实验还表明，法学硕士可能无法在涉及数字或物理（例如空间）推理的任务中生成目标，并且法学硕士对所使用的提示很敏感。因此，这些模型有望转化为结构化规划语言，但在使用时应小心。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大语言模型（LLMs）是否能将自然语言目标转化为结构化规划语言，以用于机器人等领域的任务规划。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在自然语言处理任务中表现优异，但其在推理和规划能力上的不足可能限制其在机器人等需要精确规划的领域的应用，因此需探索其在目标翻译方面的潜力。
AI.method: 通过实验测试GPT 3.5变体模型在自然语言到规划目标翻译任务中的表现，分析其在常识推理、缺失细节补充及对提示词敏感度等方面的能力。
AI.result: LLMs在翻译任务中表现良好，能利用常识补充模糊目标，但在涉及数值或物理（如空间）推理的任务中表现不足，且结果对提示词高度敏感。
AI.conclusion: LLMs适合用于自然语言到结构化规划语言的翻译，但需谨慎处理涉及复杂推理的任务，并优化提示设计以提升效果。

title: Fast Learnings of Coupled Nonnegative Tensor Decomposition Using Optimal Gradient and Low-rank Approximation
title_zh: 使用最优梯度和低秩逼近的耦合非负张量分解的快速学习
abstract: Tensor decomposition is a fundamental technique widely applied in signal processing, machine learning, and various other fields. However, traditional tensor decomposition methods encounter limitations when jointly analyzing multi-block tensors, as they often struggle to effectively explore shared information among tensors. In this study, we first introduce a novel coupled nonnegative CANDECOMP/PARAFAC decomposition algorithm optimized by the alternating proximal gradient method (CoNCPD-APG). This algorithm is specially designed to address the challenges of jointly decomposing different tensors that are partially or fully linked, while simultaneously extracting common components, individual components and, core tensors. Recognizing the computational challenges inherent in optimizing nonnegative constraints over high-dimensional tensor data, we further propose the lraCoNCPD-APG algorithm. By integrating low-rank approximation with the proposed CoNCPD-APG method, the proposed algorithm can significantly decrease the computational burden without compromising decomposition quality, particularly for multi-block large-scale tensors. Simulation experiments conducted on synthetic data, real-world face image data, and two kinds of electroencephalography (EEG) data demonstrate the practicality and superiority of the proposed algorithms for coupled nonnegative tensor decomposition problems. Our results underscore the efficacy of our methods in uncovering meaningful patterns and structures from complex multi-block tensor data, thereby offering valuable insights for future applications.
summary: Tensor decomposition is a fundamental technique widely applied in signal processing, machine learning, and various other fields. However, traditional tensor decomposition methods encounter limitations when jointly analyzing multi-block tensors, as they often struggle to effectively explore shared information among tensors. In this study, we first introduce a novel coupled nonnegative CANDECOMP/PARAFAC decomposition algorithm optimized by the alternating proximal gradient method (CoNCPD-APG). This algorithm is specially designed to address the challenges of jointly decomposing different tensors that are partially or fully linked, while simultaneously extracting common components, individual components and, core tensors. Recognizing the computational challenges inherent in optimizing nonnegative constraints over high-dimensional tensor data, we further propose the lraCoNCPD-APG algorithm. By integrating low-rank approximation with the proposed CoNCPD-APG method, the proposed algorithm can significantly decrease the computational burden without compromising decomposition quality, particularly for multi-block large-scale tensors. Simulation experiments conducted on synthetic data, real-world face image data, and two kinds of electroencephalography (EEG) data demonstrate the practicality and superiority of the proposed algorithms for coupled nonnegative tensor decomposition problems. Our results underscore the efficacy of our methods in uncovering meaningful patterns and structures from complex multi-block tensor data, thereby offering valuable insights for future applications.
abstract_zh: 张量分解是广泛应用于信号处理、机器学习和其他领域的基本技术。然而，传统的张量分解方法在联合分析多块张量时遇到局限性，因为它们常常难以有效地探索张量之间的共享信息。在本研究中，我们首先介绍了一种通过交替近端梯度法（CoNCPD-APG）优化的新型耦合非负 CANDECOMP/PARAFAC 分解算法。该算法专门设计用于解决联合分解部分或完全链接的不同张量的挑战，同时提取公共分量、单独分量和核心张量。认识到优化高维张量数据的非负约束所固有的计算挑战，我们进一步提出了 lraCoNCPD-APG 算法。通过将低秩近似与所提出的 CoNCPD-APG 方法相结合，所提出的算法可以在不影响分解质量的情况下显着减少计算负担，特别是对于多块大规模张量。对合成数据、真实世界人脸图像数据和两种脑电图（EEG）数据进行的仿真实验证明了所提出的算法在耦合非负张量分解问题上的实用性和优越性。我们的结果强调了我们的方法在从复杂的多块张量数据中揭示有意义的模式和结构方面的有效性，从而为未来的应用提供有价值的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合最优梯度和低秩近似的耦合非负张量分解算法，用于高效处理多块张量数据。
AI.motivation: 传统张量分解方法在联合分析多块张量时难以有效挖掘共享信息，且高维数据优化计算复杂度高。
AI.method: 提出CoNCPD-APG算法（基于交替近端梯度法）及改进版lraCoNCPD-APG（集成低秩近似），实现多块张量的共同成分、个体成分和核心张量联合分解。
AI.result: 在合成数据、人脸图像及EEG数据上的实验验证了算法在计算效率和分解质量上的优越性，能有效提取多块张量中的潜在结构。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为复杂多块张量数据分析提供了高效解决方案，有助于推动相关领域的应用研究。

title: Beyond In-Domain Scenarios: Robust Density-Aware Calibration
title_zh: 超越域内场景：强大的密度感知校准
comment: In Proceedings of the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2023. Code available at https://github.com/futakw/DensityAwareCalibration
comments: In Proceedings of the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML), 2023. Code available at https://github.com/futakw/DensityAwareCalibration
abstract: Calibrating deep learning models to yield uncertainty-aware predictions is crucial as deep neural networks get increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications. While existing post-hoc calibration methods achieve impressive results on in-domain test datasets, they are limited by their inability to yield reliable uncertainty estimates in domain-shift and out-of-domain (OOD) scenarios. We aim to bridge this gap by proposing DAC, an accuracy-preserving as well as Density-Aware Calibration method based on k-nearest-neighbors (KNN). In contrast to existing post-hoc methods, we utilize hidden layers of classifiers as a source for uncertainty-related information and study their importance. We show that DAC is a generic method that can readily be combined with state-of-the-art post-hoc methods. DAC boosts the robustness of calibration performance in domain-shift and OOD, while maintaining excellent in-domain predictive uncertainty estimates. We demonstrate that DAC leads to consistently better calibration across a large number of model architectures, datasets, and metrics. Additionally, we show that DAC improves calibration substantially on recent large-scale neural networks pre-trained on vast amounts of data.
summary: Calibrating deep learning models to yield uncertainty-aware predictions is crucial as deep neural networks get increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications. While existing post-hoc calibration methods achieve impressive results on in-domain test datasets, they are limited by their inability to yield reliable uncertainty estimates in domain-shift and out-of-domain (OOD) scenarios. We aim to bridge this gap by proposing DAC, an accuracy-preserving as well as Density-Aware Calibration method based on k-nearest-neighbors (KNN). In contrast to existing post-hoc methods, we utilize hidden layers of classifiers as a source for uncertainty-related information and study their importance. We show that DAC is a generic method that can readily be combined with state-of-the-art post-hoc methods. DAC boosts the robustness of calibration performance in domain-shift and OOD, while maintaining excellent in-domain predictive uncertainty estimates. We demonstrate that DAC leads to consistently better calibration across a large number of model architectures, datasets, and metrics. Additionally, we show that DAC improves calibration substantially on recent large-scale neural networks pre-trained on vast amounts of data.
abstract_zh: 随着深度神经网络越来越多地部署在安全关键型应用中，校准深度学习模型以产生不确定性感知预测至关重要。虽然现有的事后校准方法在域内测试数据集上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们由于无法在域转移和域外（OOD）场景中产生可靠的不确定性估计而受到限制。我们的目标是通过提出 DAC 来弥补这一差距，DAC 是一种基于 k 最近邻 (KNN) 的精度保持和密度感知校准方法。与现有的事后方法相比，我们利用分类器的隐藏层作为不确定性相关信息的来源并研究它们的重要性。我们证明 DAC 是一种通用方法，可以很容易地与最先进的事后方法相结合。 DAC 提高了域移位和 OOD 中校准性能的稳健性，同时保持出色的域内预测不确定性估计。我们证明 DAC 可以在大量模型架构、数据集和指标中实现持续更好的校准。此外，我们还表明 DAC 极大地改进了最近基于大量数据进行预训练的大规模神经网络的校准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DAC的密度感知校准方法，旨在提升深度学习模型在领域偏移和分布外（OOD）场景下的鲁棒性，同时保持在域内预测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有校准方法在域内数据表现良好，但无法可靠估计领域偏移和分布外场景下的不确定性，限制了其在安全关键应用中的部署。
AI.method: 基于K近邻（KNN）的DAC方法，利用分类器隐藏层提取不确定性相关的信息，并与最先进的后校准方法结合，实现密度感知的校准。
AI.result: DAC在多种模型架构、数据集和指标上均表现出更优的校准效果，并显著提升了大规模预训练神经网络的校准性能。
AI.conclusion: DAC是一种通用且有效的校准方法，能够在保持域内预测准确性的同时，增强模型在领域偏移和分布外场景下的鲁棒性。

search_text: Beyond In-Domain Scenarios: Robust Density-Aware Calibration 超越域内场景：强大的密度感知校准 Calibrating deep learning models to yield uncertainty-aware predictions is crucial as deep neural networks get increasingly deployed in safety-critical applications. While existing post-hoc calibration methods achieve impressive results on in-domain test datasets, they are limited by their inability to yield reliable uncertainty estimates in domain-shift and out-of-domain (OOD) scenarios. We aim to bridge this gap by proposing DAC, an accuracy-preserving as well as Density-Aware Calibration method based on k-nearest-neighbors (KNN). In contrast to existing post-hoc methods, we utilize hidden layers of classifiers as a source for uncertainty-related information and study their importance. We show that DAC is a generic method that can readily be combined with state-of-the-art post-hoc methods. DAC boosts the robustness of calibration performance in domain-shift and OOD, while maintaining excellent in-domain predictive uncertainty estimates. We demonstrate that DAC leads to consistently better calibration across a large number of model architectures, datasets, and metrics. Additionally, we show that DAC improves calibration substantially on recent large-scale neural networks pre-trained on vast amounts of data. 随着深度神经网络越来越多地部署在安全关键型应用中，校准深度学习模型以产生不确定性感知预测至关重要。虽然现有的事后校准方法在域内测试数据集上取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们由于无法在域转移和域外（OOD）场景中产生可靠的不确定性估计而受到限制。我们的目标是通过提出 DAC 来弥补这一差距，DAC 是一种基于 k 最近邻 (KNN) 的精度保持和密度感知校准方法。与现有的事后方法相比，我们利用分类器的隐藏层作为不确定性相关信息的来源并研究它们的重要性。我们证明 DAC 是一种通用方法，可以很容易地与最先进的事后方法相结合。 DAC 提高了域移位和 OOD 中校准性能的稳健性，同时保持出色的域内预测不确定性估计。我们证明 DAC 可以在大量模型架构、数据集和指标中实现持续更好的校准。此外，我们还表明 DAC 极大地改进了最近基于大量数据进行预训练的大规模神经网络的校准。 本文提出了一种名为DAC的密度感知校准方法，旨在提升深度学习模型在领域偏移和分布外（OOD）场景下的鲁棒性，同时保持在域内预测的准确性。 Christian Tomani,Futa Waseda,Yuesong Shen,Daniel Cremers cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Antifragile Control Systems: The case of mobile robot trajectory tracking in the presence of uncertainty
title_zh: 反脆弱控制系统：存在不确定性时移动机器人轨迹跟踪的情况
abstract: Mobile robots are ubiquitous. Such vehicles benefit from well-designed and calibrated control algorithms ensuring their task execution under precise uncertainty bounds. Yet, in tasks involving humans in the loop, such as elderly or mobility impaired, the problem takes a new dimension. In such cases, the system needs not only to compensate for uncertainty and volatility in its operation but at the same time to anticipate and offer responses that go beyond robust. Such robots operate in cluttered, complex environments, akin to human residences, and need to face during their operation sensor and, even, actuator faults, and still operate. This is where our thesis comes into the foreground. We propose a new control design framework based on the principles of antifragility. Such a design is meant to offer a high uncertainty anticipation given previous exposure to failures and faults, and exploit this anticipation capacity to provide performance beyond robust. In the current instantiation of antifragile control applied to mobile robot trajectory tracking, we provide controller design steps, the analysis of performance under parametrizable uncertainty and faults, as well as an extended comparative evaluation against state-of-the-art controllers. We believe in the potential antifragile control has in achieving closed-loop performance in the face of uncertainty and volatility by using its exposures to uncertainty to increase its capacity to anticipate and compensate for such events.
summary: Mobile robots are ubiquitous. Such vehicles benefit from well-designed and calibrated control algorithms ensuring their task execution under precise uncertainty bounds. Yet, in tasks involving humans in the loop, such as elderly or mobility impaired, the problem takes a new dimension. In such cases, the system needs not only to compensate for uncertainty and volatility in its operation but at the same time to anticipate and offer responses that go beyond robust. Such robots operate in cluttered, complex environments, akin to human residences, and need to face during their operation sensor and, even, actuator faults, and still operate. This is where our thesis comes into the foreground. We propose a new control design framework based on the principles of antifragility. Such a design is meant to offer a high uncertainty anticipation given previous exposure to failures and faults, and exploit this anticipation capacity to provide performance beyond robust. In the current instantiation of antifragile control applied to mobile robot trajectory tracking, we provide controller design steps, the analysis of performance under parametrizable uncertainty and faults, as well as an extended comparative evaluation against state-of-the-art controllers. We believe in the potential antifragile control has in achieving closed-loop performance in the face of uncertainty and volatility by using its exposures to uncertainty to increase its capacity to anticipate and compensate for such events.
abstract_zh: 移动机器人无处不在。此类车辆受益于精心设计和校准的控制算法，确保其任务在精确的不确定性范围内执行。然而，在涉及人类参与的任务中，例如老年人或行动不便的人，问题就出现了一个新的层面。在这种情况下，系统不仅需要补偿其运行中的不确定性和波动性，同时还需要预测并提供稳健的响应。此类机器人在类似于人类住宅的杂乱、复杂的环境中运行，并且在运行过程中需要面对传感器甚至执行器故障，并且仍然运行。这就是我们的论文脱颖而出的地方。我们提出了一种基于反脆弱性原理的新控制设计框架。这种设计的目的是在考虑到之前遇到的故障和故障的情况下提供高度不确定的预期，并利用这种预期能力来提供超越鲁棒性的性能。在当前应用于移动机器人轨迹跟踪的反脆弱控制实例中，我们提供了控制器设计步骤、参数化不确定性和故障下的性能分析，以及与最先进控制器的扩展比较评估。我们相信，潜在的反脆弱控制可以通过利用不确定性风险来提高预测和补偿此类事件的能力，从而在面对不确定性和波动性时实现闭环绩效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于抗脆弱性原理的控制框架，用于移动机器人轨迹跟踪，以应对复杂环境中的不确定性与故障。
AI.motivation: 传统控制算法在存在人类交互的复杂环境中（如老年人护理场景）难以有效处理传感器/执行器故障及不确定性，需设计超越鲁棒性的控制策略。
AI.method: 构建抗脆弱控制框架，包含控制器设计步骤、参数化不确定性分析方法，并通过对比实验验证其性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在应对可参数化不确定性和故障时，相比现有控制器展现出更优的轨迹跟踪性能与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 抗脆弱控制通过利用历史不确定性经验提升预测能力，可有效增强移动机器人在复杂动态环境中的闭环控制表现。

authors_text: Bastien Doignies,Nicolas Bonneel,David Coeurjolly,Julie Digne,Loïs Paulin,Jean-Claude Iehl,Victor Ostromoukhov
title: Example-Based Sampling with Diffusion Models
title_zh: 使用扩散模型进行基于示例的采样
abstract: Much effort has been put into developing samplers with specific properties, such as producing blue noise, low-discrepancy, lattice or Poisson disk samples. These samplers can be slow if they rely on optimization processes, may rely on a wide range of numerical methods, are not always differentiable. The success of recent diffusion models for image generation suggests that these models could be appropriate for learning how to generate point sets from examples. However, their convolutional nature makes these methods impractical for dealing with scattered data such as point sets. We propose a generic way to produce 2-d point sets imitating existing samplers from observed point sets using a diffusion model. We address the problem of convolutional layers by leveraging neighborhood information from an optimal transport matching to a uniform grid, that allows us to benefit from fast convolutions on grids, and to support the example-based learning of non-uniform sampling patterns. We demonstrate how the differentiability of our approach can be used to optimize point sets to enforce properties.
summary: Much effort has been put into developing samplers with specific properties, such as producing blue noise, low-discrepancy, lattice or Poisson disk samples. These samplers can be slow if they rely on optimization processes, may rely on a wide range of numerical methods, are not always differentiable. The success of recent diffusion models for image generation suggests that these models could be appropriate for learning how to generate point sets from examples. However, their convolutional nature makes these methods impractical for dealing with scattered data such as point sets. We propose a generic way to produce 2-d point sets imitating existing samplers from observed point sets using a diffusion model. We address the problem of convolutional layers by leveraging neighborhood information from an optimal transport matching to a uniform grid, that allows us to benefit from fast convolutions on grids, and to support the example-based learning of non-uniform sampling patterns. We demonstrate how the differentiability of our approach can be used to optimize point sets to enforce properties.
abstract_zh: 人们投入了大量精力来开发具有特定属性的采样器，例如产生蓝噪声、低差异、格子或泊松盘样本。如果这些采样器依赖于优化过程，则可能会很慢，可能依赖于各种数值方法，并且并不总是可微的。最近用于图像生成的扩散模型的成功表明，这些模型可能适合学习如何从示例生成点集。然而，它们的卷积性质使得这些方法对于处理点集等分散数据来说不切实际。我们提出了一种通用方法来使用扩散模型从观察到的点集模仿现有采样器来生成二维点集。我们通过利用从最佳传输匹配到均匀网格的邻域信息来解决卷积层的问题，这使我们能够从网格上的快速卷积中受益，并支持非均匀采样模式的基于示例的学习。我们演示了如何使用我们方法的可微性来优化点集以强制执行属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的方法，通过观察点集生成模仿现有采样器特性的2D点集。
AI.motivation: 传统采样器存在速度慢、依赖复杂数值方法或不可微的问题，而扩散模型虽在图像生成中表现优异，但其卷积结构难以处理散点数据。
AI.method: 利用最优传输匹配将散点数据映射到均匀网格，通过网格卷积提取邻域信息，结合扩散模型实现非均匀采样模式的例学习，并利用可微性优化点集属性。
AI.result: 方法成功生成高质量点集，保持了蓝噪声等采样特性，实验表明优于传统方法且支持属性优化。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为基于示例的采样提供了通用解决方案，结合扩散模型与最优传输优势，未来可扩展至其他数据类型和应用领域。

search_text: Example-Based Sampling with Diffusion Models 使用扩散模型进行基于示例的采样 Much effort has been put into developing samplers with specific properties, such as producing blue noise, low-discrepancy, lattice or Poisson disk samples. These samplers can be slow if they rely on optimization processes, may rely on a wide range of numerical methods, are not always differentiable. The success of recent diffusion models for image generation suggests that these models could be appropriate for learning how to generate point sets from examples. However, their convolutional nature makes these methods impractical for dealing with scattered data such as point sets. We propose a generic way to produce 2-d point sets imitating existing samplers from observed point sets using a diffusion model. We address the problem of convolutional layers by leveraging neighborhood information from an optimal transport matching to a uniform grid, that allows us to benefit from fast convolutions on grids, and to support the example-based learning of non-uniform sampling patterns. We demonstrate how the differentiability of our approach can be used to optimize point sets to enforce properties. 人们投入了大量精力来开发具有特定属性的采样器，例如产生蓝噪声、低差异、格子或泊松盘样本。如果这些采样器依赖于优化过程，则可能会很慢，可能依赖于各种数值方法，并且并不总是可微的。最近用于图像生成的扩散模型的成功表明，这些模型可能适合学习如何从示例生成点集。然而，它们的卷积性质使得这些方法对于处理点集等分散数据来说不切实际。我们提出了一种通用方法来使用扩散模型从观察到的点集模仿现有采样器来生成二维点集。我们通过利用从最佳传输匹配到均匀网格的邻域信息来解决卷积层的问题，这使我们能够从网格上的快速卷积中受益，并支持非均匀采样模式的基于示例的学习。我们演示了如何使用我们方法的可微性来优化点集以强制执行属性。 本文提出一种基于扩散模型的方法，通过观察点集生成模仿现有采样器特性的2D点集。 Bastien Doignies,Nicolas Bonneel,David Coeurjolly,Julie Digne,Loïs Paulin,Jean-Claude Iehl,Victor Ostromoukhov cs.GR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mengmeng Wang,Zhiqiang Han,Peizhen Yang,Bai Zhu,Ming Hao,Jianwei Fan,Yuanxin Ye
title: Exploiting Neighborhood Structural Features for Change Detection
title_zh: 利用邻域结构特征进行变化检测
abstract: In this letter, a novel method for change detection is proposed using neighborhood structure correlation. Because structure features are insensitive to the intensity differences between bi-temporal images, we perform the correlation analysis on structure features rather than intensity information. First, we extract the structure feature maps by using multi-orientated gradient information. Then, the structure feature maps are used to obtain the Neighborhood Structural Correlation Image (NSCI), which can represent the context structure information. In addition, we introduce a measure named matching error which can be used to improve neighborhood information. Subsequently, a change detection model based on the random forest is constructed. The NSCI feature and matching error are used as the model inputs for training and prediction. Finally, the decision tree voting is used to produce the change detection result. To evaluate the performance of the proposed method, it was compared with three state-of-the-art change detection methods. The experimental results on two datasets demonstrated the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method.
summary: In this letter, a novel method for change detection is proposed using neighborhood structure correlation. Because structure features are insensitive to the intensity differences between bi-temporal images, we perform the correlation analysis on structure features rather than intensity information. First, we extract the structure feature maps by using multi-orientated gradient information. Then, the structure feature maps are used to obtain the Neighborhood Structural Correlation Image (NSCI), which can represent the context structure information. In addition, we introduce a measure named matching error which can be used to improve neighborhood information. Subsequently, a change detection model based on the random forest is constructed. The NSCI feature and matching error are used as the model inputs for training and prediction. Finally, the decision tree voting is used to produce the change detection result. To evaluate the performance of the proposed method, it was compared with three state-of-the-art change detection methods. The experimental results on two datasets demonstrated the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在这封信中，提出了一种使用邻域结构相关性进行变化检测的新方法。由于结构特征对双时相图像之间的强度差异不敏感，因此我们对结构特征而不是强度信息进行相关性分析。首先，我们利用多方向梯度信息提取结构特征图。然后，使用结构特征图获得邻域结构相关图像（NSCI），它可以表示上下文结构信息。此外，我们引入了一种称为匹配误差的度量，可用于改善邻域信息。随后，构建了基于随机森林的变化检测模型。 NSCI特征和匹配误差用作训练和预测的模型输入。最后，使用决策树投票来产生变化检测结果。为了评估所提出方法的性能，将其与三种最先进的变化检测方法进行了比较。两个数据集上的实验结果证明了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于邻域结构特征的变化检测方法，通过分析结构特征而非强度信息提高检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统变化检测方法依赖强度信息易受光照变化影响，而结构特征对强度差异不敏感，能更稳定地反映地物变化。
AI.method: 提取多方向梯度结构特征生成NSCI图像，结合匹配误差构建随机森林模型，通过决策树投票生成最终检测结果。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上实验表明，该方法优于三种先进算法，具有更高的检测准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 利用结构特征和匹配误差能有效提升变化检测性能，为复杂场景下的变化分析提供新思路。

title: Cross-Corpora Spoken Language Identification with Domain Diversification and Generalization
title_zh: 具有领域多样化和泛化的跨语料库口语识别
comment: Accepted for publication in Elsevier Computer Speech & Language
comments: Accepted for publication in Elsevier Computer Speech & Language
abstract: This work addresses the cross-corpora generalization issue for the low-resourced spoken language identification (LID) problem. We have conducted the experiments in the context of Indian LID and identified strikingly poor cross-corpora generalization due to corpora-dependent non-lingual biases. Our contribution to this work is twofold. First, we propose domain diversification, which diversifies the limited training data using different audio data augmentation methods. We then propose the concept of maximally diversity-aware cascaded augmentations and optimize the augmentation fold-factor for effective diversification of the training data. Second, we introduce the idea of domain generalization considering the augmentation methods as pseudo-domains. Towards this, we investigate both domain-invariant and domain-aware approaches. Our LID system is based on the state-of-the-art emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation based time delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) architecture. We have conducted extensive experiments with three widely used corpora for Indian LID research. In addition, we conduct a final blind evaluation of our proposed methods on the Indian subset of VoxLingua107 corpus collected in the wild. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed domain diversification is more promising over commonly used simple augmentation methods. The study also reveals that domain generalization is a more effective solution than domain diversification. We also notice that domain-aware learning performs better for same-corpora LID, whereas domain-invariant learning is more suitable for cross-corpora generalization. Compared to basic ECAPA-TDNN, its proposed domain-invariant extensions improve the cross-corpora EER up to 5.23%. In contrast, the proposed domain-aware extensions also improve performance for same-corpora test scenarios.
summary: This work addresses the cross-corpora generalization issue for the low-resourced spoken language identification (LID) problem. We have conducted the experiments in the context of Indian LID and identified strikingly poor cross-corpora generalization due to corpora-dependent non-lingual biases. Our contribution to this work is twofold. First, we propose domain diversification, which diversifies the limited training data using different audio data augmentation methods. We then propose the concept of maximally diversity-aware cascaded augmentations and optimize the augmentation fold-factor for effective diversification of the training data. Second, we introduce the idea of domain generalization considering the augmentation methods as pseudo-domains. Towards this, we investigate both domain-invariant and domain-aware approaches. Our LID system is based on the state-of-the-art emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation based time delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) architecture. We have conducted extensive experiments with three widely used corpora for Indian LID research. In addition, we conduct a final blind evaluation of our proposed methods on the Indian subset of VoxLingua107 corpus collected in the wild. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed domain diversification is more promising over commonly used simple augmentation methods. The study also reveals that domain generalization is a more effective solution than domain diversification. We also notice that domain-aware learning performs better for same-corpora LID, whereas domain-invariant learning is more suitable for cross-corpora generalization. Compared to basic ECAPA-TDNN, its proposed domain-invariant extensions improve the cross-corpora EER up to 5.23%. In contrast, the proposed domain-aware extensions also improve performance for same-corpora test scenarios.
abstract_zh: 这项工作解决了资源匮乏的口语识别（LID）问题的跨语料库泛化问题。我们在印度 LID 的背景下进行了实验，发现由于依赖于语料库的非语言偏差，跨语料库泛化效果非常差。我们对这项工作的贡献是双重的。首先，我们提出领域多样化，即​​使用不同的音频数据增强方法使有限的训练数据多样化。然后，我们提出了最大多样性感知级联增强的概念，并优化增强倍数以实现训练数据的有效多样化。其次，我们引入域泛化的思想，将增强方法视为伪域。为此，我们研究了域不变和域感知方法。我们的 LID 系统基于最先进的强调通道注意力、传播和聚合的时延神经网络 (ECAPA-TDNN) 架构。我们对印度 LID 研究中广泛使用的三个语料库进行了广泛的实验。此外，我们对野外收集的 VoxLingua107 语料库的印度子集对我们提出的方法进行了最终的盲评估。我们的实验表明，所提出的领域多样化比常用的简单增强方法更有前景。该研究还表明，领域泛化是比领域多样化更有效的解决方案。我们还注意到，领域感知学习对于相同语料库 LID 表现更好，而领域不变学习更适合跨语料库泛化。与基本的 ECAPA-TDNN 相比，其提出的域不变扩展将跨语料库 EER 提高了 5.23%。相比之下，所提出的领域感知扩展还提高了相同语料库测试场景的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文针对低资源环境下跨语料库语音语言识别（LID）的泛化问题，提出领域多样化和泛化方法以提升印度语料库的LID性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LID模型在跨语料库场景下表现较差，主要受语料库依赖的非语言偏差影响，需通过数据增强和领域适应策略改善泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出领域多样化方法（包括级联增强和折叠因子优化）及领域泛化框架（将增强方法视为伪领域，结合领域不变与领域感知学习），基于ECAPA-TDNN架构实现。
AI.result: 领域泛化方法使跨语料库EER提升5.23%，领域感知学习在同语料库测试中表现更优，验证了方法在VoxLingua107数据集上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 领域泛化优于领域多样化，领域不变学习适合跨语料库任务，而领域感知学习适合同语料库任务，为低资源LID提供新思路。

search_text: Cross-Corpora Spoken Language Identification with Domain Diversification and Generalization 具有领域多样化和泛化的跨语料库口语识别 This work addresses the cross-corpora generalization issue for the low-resourced spoken language identification (LID) problem. We have conducted the experiments in the context of Indian LID and identified strikingly poor cross-corpora generalization due to corpora-dependent non-lingual biases. Our contribution to this work is twofold. First, we propose domain diversification, which diversifies the limited training data using different audio data augmentation methods. We then propose the concept of maximally diversity-aware cascaded augmentations and optimize the augmentation fold-factor for effective diversification of the training data. Second, we introduce the idea of domain generalization considering the augmentation methods as pseudo-domains. Towards this, we investigate both domain-invariant and domain-aware approaches. Our LID system is based on the state-of-the-art emphasized channel attention, propagation, and aggregation based time delay neural network (ECAPA-TDNN) architecture. We have conducted extensive experiments with three widely used corpora for Indian LID research. In addition, we conduct a final blind evaluation of our proposed methods on the Indian subset of VoxLingua107 corpus collected in the wild. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed domain diversification is more promising over commonly used simple augmentation methods. The study also reveals that domain generalization is a more effective solution than domain diversification. We also notice that domain-aware learning performs better for same-corpora LID, whereas domain-invariant learning is more suitable for cross-corpora generalization. Compared to basic ECAPA-TDNN, its proposed domain-invariant extensions improve the cross-corpora EER up to 5.23%. In contrast, the proposed domain-aware extensions also improve performance for same-corpora test scenarios. 这项工作解决了资源匮乏的口语识别（LID）问题的跨语料库泛化问题。我们在印度 LID 的背景下进行了实验，发现由于依赖于语料库的非语言偏差，跨语料库泛化效果非常差。我们对这项工作的贡献是双重的。首先，我们提出领域多样化，即​​使用不同的音频数据增强方法使有限的训练数据多样化。然后，我们提出了最大多样性感知级联增强的概念，并优化增强倍数以实现训练数据的有效多样化。其次，我们引入域泛化的思想，将增强方法视为伪域。为此，我们研究了域不变和域感知方法。我们的 LID 系统基于最先进的强调通道注意力、传播和聚合的时延神经网络 (ECAPA-TDNN) 架构。我们对印度 LID 研究中广泛使用的三个语料库进行了广泛的实验。此外，我们对野外收集的 VoxLingua107 语料库的印度子集对我们提出的方法进行了最终的盲评估。我们的实验表明，所提出的领域多样化比常用的简单增强方法更有前景。该研究还表明，领域泛化是比领域多样化更有效的解决方案。我们还注意到，领域感知学习对于相同语料库 LID 表现更好，而领域不变学习更适合跨语料库泛化。与基本的 ECAPA-TDNN 相比，其提出的域不变扩展将跨语料库 EER 提高了 5.23%。相比之下，所提出的领域感知扩展还提高了相同语料库测试场景的性能。 本文针对低资源环境下跨语料库语音语言识别（LID）的泛化问题，提出领域多样化和泛化方法以提升印度语料库的LID性能。 Spandan Dey,Md Sahidullah,Goutam Saha eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Yuanxin Ye,Mengmeng Wang,Liang Zhou,Guangyang Lei,Jianwei Fan,Yao Qin
title: Adjacent-Level Feature Cross-Fusion With 3-D CNN for Remote Sensing Image Change Detection
title_zh: 相邻级特征与 3-D CNN 交叉融合，用于遥感图像变化检测
abstract: Deep learning-based change detection (CD) using remote sensing images has received increasing attention in recent years. However, how to effectively extract and fuse the deep features of bi-temporal images for improving the accuracy of CD is still a challenge. To address that, a novel adjacent-level feature fusion network with 3D convolution (named AFCF3D-Net) is proposed in this article. First, through the inner fusion property of 3D convolution, we design a new feature fusion way that can simultaneously extract and fuse the feature information from bi-temporal images. Then, to alleviate the semantic gap between low-level features and high-level features, we propose an adjacent-level feature cross-fusion (AFCF) module to aggregate complementary feature information between the adjacent levels. Furthermore, the full-scale skip connection strategy is introduced to improve the capability of pixel-wise prediction and the compactness of changed objects in the results. Finally, the proposed AFCF3D-Net has been validated on the three challenging remote sensing CD datasets: the Wuhan building dataset (WHU-CD), the LEVIR building dataset (LEVIR-CD), and the Sun Yat-Sen University dataset (SYSU-CD). The results of quantitative analysis and qualitative comparison demonstrate that the proposed AFCF3D-Net achieves better performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/wm-Githuber/AFCF3D-Net.
summary: Deep learning-based change detection (CD) using remote sensing images has received increasing attention in recent years. However, how to effectively extract and fuse the deep features of bi-temporal images for improving the accuracy of CD is still a challenge. To address that, a novel adjacent-level feature fusion network with 3D convolution (named AFCF3D-Net) is proposed in this article. First, through the inner fusion property of 3D convolution, we design a new feature fusion way that can simultaneously extract and fuse the feature information from bi-temporal images. Then, to alleviate the semantic gap between low-level features and high-level features, we propose an adjacent-level feature cross-fusion (AFCF) module to aggregate complementary feature information between the adjacent levels. Furthermore, the full-scale skip connection strategy is introduced to improve the capability of pixel-wise prediction and the compactness of changed objects in the results. Finally, the proposed AFCF3D-Net has been validated on the three challenging remote sensing CD datasets: the Wuhan building dataset (WHU-CD), the LEVIR building dataset (LEVIR-CD), and the Sun Yat-Sen University dataset (SYSU-CD). The results of quantitative analysis and qualitative comparison demonstrate that the proposed AFCF3D-Net achieves better performance compared to other state-of-the-art methods. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/wm-Githuber/AFCF3D-Net.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于深度学习的遥感图像变化检测（CD）受到越来越多的关注。然而，如何有效地提取和融合双时态图像的深层特征以提高CD的准确性仍然是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种具有 3D 卷积的新型相邻级特征融合网络（称为 AFCF3D-Net）。首先，通过3D卷积的内部融合特性，我们设计了一种新的特征融合方式，可以同时从双时态图像中提取和融合特征信息。然后，为了缓解低层特征和高层特征之间的语义差距，我们提出了一种相邻层特征交叉融合（AFCF）模块来聚合相邻层之间的互补特征信息。此外，引入了全尺寸跳跃连接策略，以提高逐像素预测的能力和结果中变化对象的紧凑性。最后，所提出的 AFCF3D-Net 已在三个具有挑战性的遥感 CD 数据集上得到验证：武汉建筑数据集（WHU-CD）、LEVIR 建筑数据集（LEVIR-CD）和中山大学数据集（SYSU-CD）。定量分析和定性比较的结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的 AFCF3D-Net 取得了更好的性能。这项工作的代码可在 https://github.com/wm-Githuber/AFCF3D-Net 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D卷积的相邻层特征交叉融合网络（AFCF3D-Net），用于提高遥感图像变化检测的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在双时相遥感图像特征提取与融合中存在语义鸿沟问题，导致变化检测精度不足。
AI.method: 设计3D卷积实现双时相特征同步提取与融合，引入相邻层特征交叉融合模块（AFCF）缓解语义差距，并采用全尺度跳跃连接提升像素级预测能力。
AI.result: 在WHU-CD、LEVIR-CD和SYSU-CD三个数据集上，AFCF3D-Net的定量分析和定性比较均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: AFCF3D-Net通过创新的特征融合机制有效提升了遥感图像变化检测性能，代码已开源。

title: Text recognition on images using pre-trained CNN
title_zh: 使用预训练的 CNN 对图像进行文本识别
abstract: A text on an image often stores important information and directly carries high level semantics, makes it as important source of information and become a very active research topic. Many studies have shown that the use of CNN-based neural networks is quite effective and accurate for image classification which is the basis of text recognition. It can also be more enhanced by using transfer learning from pre-trained model trained on ImageNet dataset as an initial weight. In this research, the recognition is trained by using Chars74K dataset and the best model results then tested on some samples of IIIT-5K-Dataset. The research results showed that the best accuracy is the model that trained using VGG-16 architecture applied with image transformation of rotation 15°, image scale of 0.9, and the application of gaussian blur effect. The research model has an accuracy of 97.94% for validation data, 98.16% for test data, and 95.62% for the test data from IIIT-5K-Dataset. Based on these results, it can be concluded that pre-trained CNN can produce good accuracy for text recognition, and the model architecture that used in this study can be used as reference material in the development of text detection systems in the future
summary: A text on an image often stores important information and directly carries high level semantics, makes it as important source of information and become a very active research topic. Many studies have shown that the use of CNN-based neural networks is quite effective and accurate for image classification which is the basis of text recognition. It can also be more enhanced by using transfer learning from pre-trained model trained on ImageNet dataset as an initial weight. In this research, the recognition is trained by using Chars74K dataset and the best model results then tested on some samples of IIIT-5K-Dataset. The research results showed that the best accuracy is the model that trained using VGG-16 architecture applied with image transformation of rotation 15°, image scale of 0.9, and the application of gaussian blur effect. The research model has an accuracy of 97.94% for validation data, 98.16% for test data, and 95.62% for the test data from IIIT-5K-Dataset. Based on these results, it can be concluded that pre-trained CNN can produce good accuracy for text recognition, and the model architecture that used in this study can be used as reference material in the development of text detection systems in the future
abstract_zh: 图像上的文本往往存储着重要的信息并直接承载高级语义，使其成为重要的信息来源并成为非常活跃的研究课题。许多研究表明，使用基于 CNN 的神经网络对于作为文本识别基础的图像分类非常有效且准确。还可以通过使用在 ImageNet 数据集上训练的预训练模型的迁移学习作为初始权重来进一步增强它。在本研究中，使用 Chars74K 数据集训练识别，然后在 IIIT-5K 数据集的一些样本上测试最佳模型结果。研究结果表明，使用VGG-16架构训练的模型，应用旋转15°的图像变换，图像比例0.9，并应用高斯模糊效果，精度最好。该研究模型的验证数据准确率为 97.94%，测试数据准确率为 98.16%，IIIT-5K-Dataset 测试数据准确率为 95.62%。基于这些结果，可以得出结论，预训练的 CNN 可以为文本识别提供良好的准确性，并且本研究中使用的模型架构可以作为未来文本检测系统开发的参考资料

AI.tldr: 本论文研究使用预训练卷积神经网络（CNN）进行图像文本识别，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 图像中的文本包含重要信息且具有高层语义，但文本识别仍是活跃研究领域。CNN在图像分类中表现优异，结合迁移学习可进一步提升效果。
AI.method: 采用VGG-16架构，使用Chars74K数据集训练，应用旋转15°、缩放0.9、高斯模糊等图像变换，并在IIIT-5K数据集上测试模型性能。
AI.result: 验证集准确率97.94%，测试集98.16%，IIIT-5K测试集达95.62%。
AI.conclusion: 预训练CNN可有效提升文本识别准确率，本研究的模型架构可为未来文本检测系统开发提供参考。

tldr: 本论文研究使用预训练卷积神经网络（CNN）进行图像文本识别，并通过实验验证其有效性。
motivation: 图像中的文本包含重要信息且具有高层语义，但文本识别仍是活跃研究领域。CNN在图像分类中表现优异，结合迁移学习可进一步提升效果。
method: 采用VGG-16架构，使用Chars74K数据集训练，应用旋转15°、缩放0.9、高斯模糊等图像变换，并在IIIT-5K数据集上测试模型性能。
result: 验证集准确率97.94%，测试集98.16%，IIIT-5K测试集达95.62%。
conclusion: 预训练CNN可有效提升文本识别准确率，本研究的模型架构可为未来文本检测系统开发提供参考。
search_text: Text recognition on images using pre-trained CNN 使用预训练的 CNN 对图像进行文本识别 A text on an image often stores important information and directly carries high level semantics, makes it as important source of information and become a very active research topic. Many studies have shown that the use of CNN-based neural networks is quite effective and accurate for image classification which is the basis of text recognition. It can also be more enhanced by using transfer learning from pre-trained model trained on ImageNet dataset as an initial weight. In this research, the recognition is trained by using Chars74K dataset and the best model results then tested on some samples of IIIT-5K-Dataset. The research results showed that the best accuracy is the model that trained using VGG-16 architecture applied with image transformation of rotation 15°, image scale of 0.9, and the application of gaussian blur effect. The research model has an accuracy of 97.94% for validation data, 98.16% for test data, and 95.62% for the test data from IIIT-5K-Dataset. Based on these results, it can be concluded that pre-trained CNN can produce good accuracy for text recognition, and the model architecture that used in this study can be used as reference material in the development of text detection systems in the future 图像上的文本往往存储着重要的信息并直接承载高级语义，使其成为重要的信息来源并成为非常活跃的研究课题。许多研究表明，使用基于 CNN 的神经网络对于作为文本识别基础的图像分类非常有效且准确。还可以通过使用在 ImageNet 数据集上训练的预训练模型的迁移学习作为初始权重来进一步增强它。在本研究中，使用 Chars74K 数据集训练识别，然后在 IIIT-5K 数据集的一些样本上测试最佳模型结果。研究结果表明，使用VGG-16架构训练的模型，应用旋转15°的图像变换，图像比例0.9，并应用高斯模糊效果，精度最好。该研究模型的验证数据准确率为 97.94%，测试数据准确率为 98.16%，IIIT-5K-Dataset 测试数据准确率为 95.62%。基于这些结果，可以得出结论，预训练的 CNN 可以为文本识别提供良好的准确性，并且本研究中使用的模型架构可以作为未来文本检测系统开发的参考资料 本论文研究使用预训练卷积神经网络（CNN）进行图像文本识别，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Afgani Fajar Rizky,Novanto Yudistira,Edy Santoso cs.CV

title: Controllability-Aware Unsupervised Skill Discovery
title_zh: 可控性感知无监督技能发现
abstract: One of the key capabilities of intelligent agents is the ability to discover useful skills without external supervision. However, the current unsupervised skill discovery methods are often limited to acquiring simple, easy-to-learn skills due to the lack of incentives to discover more complex, challenging behaviors. We introduce a novel unsupervised skill discovery method, Controllability-aware Skill Discovery (CSD), which actively seeks complex, hard-to-control skills without supervision. The key component of CSD is a controllability-aware distance function, which assigns larger values to state transitions that are harder to achieve with the current skills. Combined with distance-maximizing skill discovery, CSD progressively learns more challenging skills over the course of training as our jointly trained distance function reduces rewards for easy-to-achieve skills. Our experimental results in six robotic manipulation and locomotion environments demonstrate that CSD can discover diverse complex skills including object manipulation and locomotion skills with no supervision, significantly outperforming prior unsupervised skill discovery methods. Videos and code are available at https://seohong.me/projects/csd/
summary: One of the key capabilities of intelligent agents is the ability to discover useful skills without external supervision. However, the current unsupervised skill discovery methods are often limited to acquiring simple, easy-to-learn skills due to the lack of incentives to discover more complex, challenging behaviors. We introduce a novel unsupervised skill discovery method, Controllability-aware Skill Discovery (CSD), which actively seeks complex, hard-to-control skills without supervision. The key component of CSD is a controllability-aware distance function, which assigns larger values to state transitions that are harder to achieve with the current skills. Combined with distance-maximizing skill discovery, CSD progressively learns more challenging skills over the course of training as our jointly trained distance function reduces rewards for easy-to-achieve skills. Our experimental results in six robotic manipulation and locomotion environments demonstrate that CSD can discover diverse complex skills including object manipulation and locomotion skills with no supervision, significantly outperforming prior unsupervised skill discovery methods. Videos and code are available at https://seohong.me/projects/csd/
abstract_zh: 智能代理的关键能力之一是能够在没有外部监督的情况下发现有用的技能。然而，由于缺乏发现更复杂、更具挑​​战性的行为的动力，当前的无监督技能发现方法通常仅限于获取简单、易于学习的技能。我们引入了一种新颖的无监督技能发现方法，即可控性感知技能发现（CSD），它在没有监督的情况下主动寻找复杂、难以控制的技能。 CSD 的关键组成部分是可控性感知距离函数，它为当前技能难以实现的状态转换分配更大的值。与距离最大化技能发现相结合，CSD 在训练过程中逐步学习更具挑战性的技能，因为我们联合训练的距离函数减少了易于实现技能的奖励。我们在六个机器人操纵和运动环境中的实验结果表明，CSD 可以在没有监督的情况下发现各种复杂的技能，包括对象操纵和运动技能，显着优于先前的无监督技能发现方法。视频和代码可在 https://seohong.me/projects/csd/ 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需监督的复杂技能发现方法CSD，通过可控性感知的距离函数激励智能体学习难以控制的复杂技能。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督技能发现方法因缺乏对复杂技能的激励机制，难以获取具有挑战性的行为模式。
AI.method: 设计可控性感知距离函数，对当前技能难以实现的状态转移赋予更高价值，并结合距离最大化策略逐步学习更复杂技能。
AI.result: 在六个机器人操作与运动环境中显著优于现有方法，成功发现物体操作和运动等多样化复杂技能。
AI.conclusion: CSD通过动态调整奖励机制，有效解决了无监督环境下复杂技能发现的难题。

title: Confidence-based Reliable Learning under Dual Noises
title_zh: 双噪声下基于置信度的可靠学习
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in a variety of computer vision tasks, where massive labeled images are routinely required for model optimization. Yet, the data collected from the open world are unavoidably polluted by noise, which may significantly undermine the efficacy of the learned models. Various attempts have been made to reliably train DNNs under data noise, but they separately account for either the noise existing in the labels or that existing in the images. A naive combination of the two lines of works would suffer from the limitations in both sides, and miss the opportunities to handle the two kinds of noise in parallel. This work provides a first, unified framework for reliable learning under the joint (image, label)-noise. Technically, we develop a confidence-based sample filter to progressively filter out noisy data without the need of pre-specifying noise ratio. Then, we penalize the model uncertainty of the detected noisy data instead of letting the model continue over-fitting the misleading information in them. Experimental results on various challenging synthetic and real-world noisy datasets verify that the proposed method can outperform competing baselines in the aspect of classification performance.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in a variety of computer vision tasks, where massive labeled images are routinely required for model optimization. Yet, the data collected from the open world are unavoidably polluted by noise, which may significantly undermine the efficacy of the learned models. Various attempts have been made to reliably train DNNs under data noise, but they separately account for either the noise existing in the labels or that existing in the images. A naive combination of the two lines of works would suffer from the limitations in both sides, and miss the opportunities to handle the two kinds of noise in parallel. This work provides a first, unified framework for reliable learning under the joint (image, label)-noise. Technically, we develop a confidence-based sample filter to progressively filter out noisy data without the need of pre-specifying noise ratio. Then, we penalize the model uncertainty of the detected noisy data instead of letting the model continue over-fitting the misleading information in them. Experimental results on various challenging synthetic and real-world noisy datasets verify that the proposed method can outperform competing baselines in the aspect of classification performance.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各种计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的成功，其中模型优化通常需要大量标记图像。然而，从开放世界收集的数据不可避免地受到噪音污染，这可能会严重损害学习模型的有效性。人们已经做出了各种尝试来在数据噪声下可靠地训练 DNN，但它们分别考虑了标签中存在的噪声或图像中存在的噪声。两种工作的天真结合会受到双方的限制，并错过并行处理两种噪音的机会。这项工作为联合（图像、标签）噪声下的可靠学习提供了第一个统一的框架。从技术上讲，我们开发了一种基于置信度的样本过滤器，可以逐步滤除噪声数据，而无需预先指定噪声比。然后，我们对检测到的噪声数据的模型不确定性进行惩罚，而不是让模型继续过度拟合其中的误导性信息。在各种具有挑战性的合成和现实世界噪声数据集上的实验结果验证了所提出的方法在分类性能方面可以优于竞争基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一框架，在图像和标签噪声共存的情况下提升深度神经网络的可靠学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别处理图像噪声或标签噪声，简单结合会存在局限性，无法同时有效应对两种噪声。
AI.method: 开发基于置信度的样本过滤器逐步剔除噪声数据，并通过惩罚模型不确定性避免噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实噪声数据集上验证，分类性能优于现有基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了双噪声环境下的可靠学习问题，为噪声鲁棒模型训练提供了新思路。
