title: CCDN: Checkerboard Corner Detection Network for Robust Camera Calibration
title_zh: CCDN：用于稳健相机校准的棋盘角点检测网络
abstract: Aiming to improve the checkerboard corner detection robustness against the images with poor quality, such as lens distortion, extreme poses, and noise, we propose a novel detection algorithm which can maintain high accuracy on inputs under multiply scenarios without any prior knowledge of the checkerboard pattern. This whole algorithm includes a checkerboard corner detection network and some post-processing techniques. The network model is a fully convolutional network with improvements of loss function and learning rate, which can deal with the images of arbitrary size and produce correspondingly-sized output with a corner score on each pixel by efficient inference and learning. Besides, in order to remove the false positives, we employ three post-processing techniques including threshold related to maximum response, non-maximum suppression, and clustering. Evaluations on two different datasets show its superior robustness, accuracy and wide applicability in quantitative comparisons with the state-of-the-art methods, like MATE, ChESS, ROCHADE and OCamCalib.
summary: Aiming to improve the checkerboard corner detection robustness against the images with poor quality, such as lens distortion, extreme poses, and noise, we propose a novel detection algorithm which can maintain high accuracy on inputs under multiply scenarios without any prior knowledge of the checkerboard pattern. This whole algorithm includes a checkerboard corner detection network and some post-processing techniques. The network model is a fully convolutional network with improvements of loss function and learning rate, which can deal with the images of arbitrary size and produce correspondingly-sized output with a corner score on each pixel by efficient inference and learning. Besides, in order to remove the false positives, we employ three post-processing techniques including threshold related to maximum response, non-maximum suppression, and clustering. Evaluations on two different datasets show its superior robustness, accuracy and wide applicability in quantitative comparisons with the state-of-the-art methods, like MATE, ChESS, ROCHADE and OCamCalib.
abstract_zh: 为了提高棋盘角点检测对镜头畸变、极端姿势和噪声等质量较差的图像的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种新颖的检测算法，该算法可以在多种场景下保持输入的高精度，而无需事先了解棋盘图案。整个算法包括棋盘角点检测网络和一些后处理技术。该网络模型是一个全卷积网络，改进了损失函数和学习率，可以处理任意尺寸的图像，并通过高效的推理和学习产生相应尺寸的输出，每个像素上都有角点分数。此外，为了消除误报，我们采用了三种后处理技术，包括与最大响应相关的阈值、非极大值抑制和聚类。对两个不同数据集的评估表明，与 MATE、ChESS、ROCHADE 和 OCamCalib 等最先进的方法进行定量比较时，其具有卓越的稳健性、准确性和广泛的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为CCDN的棋盘格角点检测网络，旨在提升相机标定中对低质量图像的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有角点检测方法在存在镜头畸变、极端姿态或噪声的图像中表现不佳，且通常依赖棋盘格先验知识。
AI.method: 设计全卷积网络改进损失函数与学习率，支持任意尺寸输入并输出像素级角点得分；结合阈值筛选、非极大值抑制和聚类三类后处理技术消除误检。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上定量实验显示，相较MATE、ChESS等先进方法，该网络在鲁棒性、精度和适用性方面均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: CCDN通过端到端网络架构与多阶段后处理，实现了无需先验知识的高精度角点检测，适用于复杂场景的相机标定任务。

search_text: CCDN: Checkerboard Corner Detection Network for Robust Camera Calibration CCDN：用于稳健相机校准的棋盘角点检测网络 Aiming to improve the checkerboard corner detection robustness against the images with poor quality, such as lens distortion, extreme poses, and noise, we propose a novel detection algorithm which can maintain high accuracy on inputs under multiply scenarios without any prior knowledge of the checkerboard pattern. This whole algorithm includes a checkerboard corner detection network and some post-processing techniques. The network model is a fully convolutional network with improvements of loss function and learning rate, which can deal with the images of arbitrary size and produce correspondingly-sized output with a corner score on each pixel by efficient inference and learning. Besides, in order to remove the false positives, we employ three post-processing techniques including threshold related to maximum response, non-maximum suppression, and clustering. Evaluations on two different datasets show its superior robustness, accuracy and wide applicability in quantitative comparisons with the state-of-the-art methods, like MATE, ChESS, ROCHADE and OCamCalib. 为了提高棋盘角点检测对镜头畸变、极端姿势和噪声等质量较差的图像的鲁棒性，我们提出了一种新颖的检测算法，该算法可以在多种场景下保持输入的高精度，而无需事先了解棋盘图案。整个算法包括棋盘角点检测网络和一些后处理技术。该网络模型是一个全卷积网络，改进了损失函数和学习率，可以处理任意尺寸的图像，并通过高效的推理和学习产生相应尺寸的输出，每个像素上都有角点分数。此外，为了消除误报，我们采用了三种后处理技术，包括与最大响应相关的阈值、非极大值抑制和聚类。对两个不同数据集的评估表明，与 MATE、ChESS、ROCHADE 和 OCamCalib 等最先进的方法进行定量比较时，其具有卓越的稳健性、准确性和广泛的适用性。 本文提出一种名为CCDN的棋盘格角点检测网络，旨在提升相机标定中对低质量图像的鲁棒性。 Ben Chen,Caihua Xiong,Qi Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yen-Ting Lin,Alexandros Papangelis,Seokhwan Kim,Sungjin Lee,Devamanyu Hazarika,Mahdi Namazifar,Di Jin,Yang Liu,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: Selective In-Context Data Augmentation for Intent Detection using Pointwise V-Information
title_zh: 使用逐点 V 信息进行意图检测的选择性上下文数据增强
abstract: This work focuses on in-context data augmentation for intent detection. Having found that augmentation via in-context prompting of large pre-trained language models (PLMs) alone does not improve performance, we introduce a novel approach based on PLMs and pointwise V-information (PVI), a metric that can measure the usefulness of a datapoint for training a model. Our method first fine-tunes a PLM on a small seed of training data and then synthesizes new datapoints - utterances that correspond to given intents. It then employs intent-aware filtering, based on PVI, to remove datapoints that are not helpful to the downstream intent classifier. Our method is thus able to leverage the expressive power of large language models to produce diverse training data. Empirical results demonstrate that our method can produce synthetic training data that achieve state-of-the-art performance on three challenging intent detection datasets under few-shot settings (1.28% absolute improvement in 5-shot and 1.18% absolute in 10-shot, on average) and perform on par with the state-of-the-art in full-shot settings (within 0.01% absolute, on average).
summary: This work focuses on in-context data augmentation for intent detection. Having found that augmentation via in-context prompting of large pre-trained language models (PLMs) alone does not improve performance, we introduce a novel approach based on PLMs and pointwise V-information (PVI), a metric that can measure the usefulness of a datapoint for training a model. Our method first fine-tunes a PLM on a small seed of training data and then synthesizes new datapoints - utterances that correspond to given intents. It then employs intent-aware filtering, based on PVI, to remove datapoints that are not helpful to the downstream intent classifier. Our method is thus able to leverage the expressive power of large language models to produce diverse training data. Empirical results demonstrate that our method can produce synthetic training data that achieve state-of-the-art performance on three challenging intent detection datasets under few-shot settings (1.28% absolute improvement in 5-shot and 1.18% absolute in 10-shot, on average) and perform on par with the state-of-the-art in full-shot settings (within 0.01% absolute, on average).
abstract_zh: 这项工作的重点是用于意图检测的上下文数据增强。我们发现仅通过大型预训练语言模型 (PLM) 的上下文提示进行增强并不能提高性能，因此我们引入了一种基于 PLM 和逐点 V 信息 (PVI) 的新方法，该方法可以衡量数据点对训练模型的有用性。我们的方法首先在一小部分训练数据上微调 PLM，然后合成新的数据点 - 与给定意图相对应的话语。然后，它采用基于 PVI 的意图感知过滤来删除对下游意图分类器没有帮助的数据点。因此，我们的方法能够利用大型语言模型的表达能力来生成不同的训练数据。经验结果表明，我们的方法可以生成合成训练数据，在少数镜头设置下在三个具有挑战性的意图检测数据集上实现最先进的性能（平均而言，5 次镜头中绝对提高 1.28％，10 次镜头中绝对提高 1.18％），并且在全镜头设置中与最先进的性能相当（平均绝对值在 0.01％ 以内）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合预训练语言模型和点wise V信息的上下文数据增强方法，用于提升意图检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用预训练语言模型进行上下文数据增强时效果有限，需引入有效指标筛选高质量数据。
AI.method: 首先微调预训练语言模型生成合成数据，再基于点wise V信息进行意图感知过滤，保留对分类器有用的数据。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，少样本设置下平均提升1.28%和1.18%，全样本设置下与最先进方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合模型生成能力与数据质量评估指标，有效提升了意图检测在低资源场景下的性能。

title: General, Single-shot, Target-less, and Automatic LiDAR-Camera Extrinsic Calibration Toolbox
title_zh: 通用、单次、无目标、自动激光雷达相机外部校准工具箱
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA2023)
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA2023)
abstract: This paper presents an open source LiDAR-camera calibration toolbox that is general to LiDAR and camera projection models, requires only one pairing of LiDAR and camera data without a calibration target, and is fully automatic. For automatic initial guess estimation, we employ the SuperGlue image matching pipeline to find 2D-3D correspondences between LiDAR and camera data and estimate the LiDAR-camera transformation via RANSAC. Given the initial guess, we refine the transformation estimate with direct LiDAR-camera registration based on the normalized information distance, a mutual information-based cross-modal distance metric. For a handy calibration process, we also present several assistance capabilities (e.g., dynamic LiDAR data integration and user interface for making 2D-3D correspondence manually). The experimental results show that the proposed toolbox enables calibration of any combination of spinning and non-repetitive scan LiDARs and pinhole and omnidirectional cameras, and shows better calibration accuracy and robustness than those of the state-of-the-art edge-alignment-based calibration method.
summary: This paper presents an open source LiDAR-camera calibration toolbox that is general to LiDAR and camera projection models, requires only one pairing of LiDAR and camera data without a calibration target, and is fully automatic. For automatic initial guess estimation, we employ the SuperGlue image matching pipeline to find 2D-3D correspondences between LiDAR and camera data and estimate the LiDAR-camera transformation via RANSAC. Given the initial guess, we refine the transformation estimate with direct LiDAR-camera registration based on the normalized information distance, a mutual information-based cross-modal distance metric. For a handy calibration process, we also present several assistance capabilities (e.g., dynamic LiDAR data integration and user interface for making 2D-3D correspondence manually). The experimental results show that the proposed toolbox enables calibration of any combination of spinning and non-repetitive scan LiDARs and pinhole and omnidirectional cameras, and shows better calibration accuracy and robustness than those of the state-of-the-art edge-alignment-based calibration method.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种开源激光雷达相机标定工具箱，该工具箱通用于激光雷达和相机投影模型，仅需要一对激光雷达和相机数据，无需标定目标，并且是全自动的。对于自动初始猜测估计，我们使用 SuperGlue 图像匹配管道来查找 LiDAR 和相机数据之间的 2D-3D 对应关系，并通过 RANSAC 估计 LiDAR-相机变换。给定初始猜测，我们根据归一化信息距离（一种基于互信息的跨模态距离度量）通过直接激光雷达相机配准来完善变换估计。为了方便校准过程，我们还提供了多种辅助功能（例如，动态 LiDAR 数据集成和用于手动进行 2D-3D 对应的用户界面）。实验结果表明，所提出的工具箱可以对旋转和非重复扫描激光雷达以及针孔和全向相机的任意组合进行校准，并且比最先进的基于边缘对齐的校准方法显示出更好的校准精度和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 开发一个通用的、单次拍摄、无需标定目标且全自动的LiDAR-相机外参标定工具箱。
AI.motivation: 现有标定方法依赖标定目标、多次数据采集或复杂设置，缺乏通用性与自动化能力。
AI.method: 基于SuperGlue图像匹配获取2D-3D对应关系，通过RANSAC估计初始变换，并采用归一化信息距离优化；提供动态数据整合与手动对应界面辅助。
AI.result: 支持各类LiDAR与相机组合的标定，精度与鲁棒性优于现有边缘对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工具箱实现了高效自动化标定，适用于多场景实际应用。

For automatic initial guess estimation, we employ the SuperGlue image matching pipeline to find 2D-3D correspondences between LiDAR and camera data and estimate the LiDAR-camera transformation via RANSAC. Given the initial guess, we refine the transformation estimate with direct LiDAR-camera registration based on the normalized information distance, a mutual information-based cross-modal distance metric. For a handy calibration process, we also present several assistance capabilities (e.g., dynamic LiDAR data integration and user interface for making 2D-3D correspondence manually). The experimental results show that the proposed toolbox enables calibration of any combination of spinning and non-repetitive scan LiDARs and pinhole and omnidirectional cameras, and shows better calibration accuracy and robustness than those of the state-of-the-art edge-alignment-based calibration method. 本文提出了一种开源激光雷达相机标定工具箱，该工具箱通用于激光雷达和相机投影模型，仅需要一对激光雷达和相机数据，无需标定目标，并且是全自动的。对于自动初始猜测估计，我们使用 SuperGlue 图像匹配管道来查找 LiDAR 和相机数据之间的 2D-3D 对应关系，并通过 RANSAC 估计 LiDAR-相机变换。给定初始猜测，我们根据归一化信息距离（一种基于互信息的跨模态距离度量）通过直接激光雷达相机配准来完善变换估计。为了方便校准过程，我们还提供了多种辅助功能（例如，动态 LiDAR 数据集成和用于手动进行 2D-3D 对应的用户界面）。实验结果表明，所提出的工具箱可以对旋转和非重复扫描激光雷达以及针孔和全向相机的任意组合进行校准，并且比最先进的基于边缘对齐的校准方法显示出更好的校准精度和鲁棒性。 开发一个通用的、单次拍摄、无需标定目标且全自动的LiDAR-相机外参标定工具箱。 Kenji Koide,Shuji Oishi,Masashi Yokozuka,Atsuhiko Banno cs.RO

authors_text: Ben Chen,Linbo Jin,Xinxin Wang,Dehong Gao,Wen Jiang,Wei Ning
title: Unified Vision-Language Representation Modeling for E-Commerce Same-Style Products Retrieval
title_zh: 电子商务同款产品检索的统一视觉语言表示建模
comment: Accepted in The Web Conference (WWW2023) Industry Track. 5 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted in The Web Conference (WWW2023) Industry Track. 5 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Same-style products retrieval plays an important role in e-commerce platforms, aiming to identify the same products which may have different text descriptions or images. It can be used for similar products retrieval from different suppliers or duplicate products detection of one supplier. Common methods use the image as the detected object, but they only consider the visual features and overlook the attribute information contained in the textual descriptions, and perform weakly for products in image less important industries like machinery, hardware tools and electronic component, even if an additional text matching module is added. In this paper, we propose a unified vision-language modeling method for e-commerce same-style products retrieval, which is designed to represent one product with its textual descriptions and visual contents. It contains one sampling skill to collect positive pairs from user click log with category and relevance constrained, and a novel contrastive loss unit to model the image, text, and image+text representations into one joint embedding space. It is capable of cross-modal product-to-product retrieval, as well as style transfer and user-interactive search. Offline evaluations on annotated data demonstrate its superior retrieval performance, and online testings show it can attract more clicks and conversions. Moreover, this model has already been deployed online for similar products retrieval in alibaba.com, the largest B2B e-commerce platform in the world.
summary: Same-style products retrieval plays an important role in e-commerce platforms, aiming to identify the same products which may have different text descriptions or images. It can be used for similar products retrieval from different suppliers or duplicate products detection of one supplier. Common methods use the image as the detected object, but they only consider the visual features and overlook the attribute information contained in the textual descriptions, and perform weakly for products in image less important industries like machinery, hardware tools and electronic component, even if an additional text matching module is added. In this paper, we propose a unified vision-language modeling method for e-commerce same-style products retrieval, which is designed to represent one product with its textual descriptions and visual contents. It contains one sampling skill to collect positive pairs from user click log with category and relevance constrained, and a novel contrastive loss unit to model the image, text, and image+text representations into one joint embedding space. It is capable of cross-modal product-to-product retrieval, as well as style transfer and user-interactive search. Offline evaluations on annotated data demonstrate its superior retrieval performance, and online testings show it can attract more clicks and conversions. Moreover, this model has already been deployed online for similar products retrieval in alibaba.com, the largest B2B e-commerce platform in the world.
abstract_zh: 同款产品检索在电子商务平台中发挥着重要作用，旨在识别可能具有不同文字描述或图像的相同产品。可用于不同供应商的相似产品检索或某一供应商的重复产品检测。常见的方法使用图像作为检测对象，但它们只考虑视觉特征，忽略了文本描述中包含的属性信息，对于机械、五金工具和电子元件等图像不太重要的行业的产品，即使添加额外的文本匹配模块，效果也很弱。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于电子商务同风格产品检索的统一视觉语言建模方法，旨在用其文本描述和视觉内容来表示一个产品。它包含一种采样技能，用于从类别和相关性受限的用户点击日志中收集正对，以及一种新颖的对比损失单元，用于将图像、文本和图像+文本表示建模到一个联合嵌入空间中。它能够进行跨模式的产品到产品检索，以及风格转换和用户交互式搜索。对标注数据的离线评估证明了其优越的检索性能，在线测试表明它可以吸引更多的点击和转化。此外，该模型已经在全球最大的B2B电商平台阿里巴巴在线同类商品检索中部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的视觉-语言表示模型，用于电商场景下的同款产品检索。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖视觉特征，忽视文本描述中的属性信息，在机械、电子元件等图像重要性较低的行业中表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计包含用户点击日志采样技术和新型对比损失函数的统一模型，将图像、文本及图文联合表示映射到共享嵌入空间。
AI.result: 离线测试显示检索性能优越，在线测试点击率和转化率提升，已部署于全球最大的B2B电商平台阿里巴巴国际站。
AI.conclusion: 融合视觉与语言信息的联合表示能有效提升跨模态产品检索效果，验证了模型在实际电商场景中的应用价值。

authors_text: Yang Liu,Dingkang Yang,Yan Wang,Jing Liu,Jun Liu,Azzedine Boukerche,Peng Sun,Liang Song
title: Generalized Video Anomaly Event Detection: Systematic Taxonomy and Comparison of Deep Models
title_zh: 广义视频异常事件检测：系统分类和深度模型比较
comment: Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys. For more information, please see our project page: https://github.com/fudanyliu/GVAED
comments: Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys. For more information, please see our project page: https://github.com/fudanyliu/GVAED
abstract: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) serves as a pivotal technology in the intelligent surveillance systems, enabling the temporal or spatial identification of anomalous events within videos. While existing reviews predominantly concentrate on conventional unsupervised methods, they often overlook the emergence of weakly-supervised and fully-unsupervised approaches. To address this gap, this survey extends the conventional scope of VAD beyond unsupervised methods, encompassing a broader spectrum termed Generalized Video Anomaly Event Detection (GVAED). By skillfully incorporating recent advancements rooted in diverse assumptions and learning frameworks, this survey introduces an intuitive taxonomy that seamlessly navigates through unsupervised, weakly-supervised, supervised and fully-unsupervised VAD methodologies, elucidating the distinctions and interconnections within these research trajectories. In addition, this survey facilitates prospective researchers by assembling a compilation of research resources, including public datasets, available codebases, programming tools, and pertinent literature. Furthermore, this survey quantitatively assesses model performance, delves into research challenges and directions, and outlines potential avenues for future exploration.
summary: Video Anomaly Detection (VAD) serves as a pivotal technology in the intelligent surveillance systems, enabling the temporal or spatial identification of anomalous events within videos. While existing reviews predominantly concentrate on conventional unsupervised methods, they often overlook the emergence of weakly-supervised and fully-unsupervised approaches. To address this gap, this survey extends the conventional scope of VAD beyond unsupervised methods, encompassing a broader spectrum termed Generalized Video Anomaly Event Detection (GVAED). By skillfully incorporating recent advancements rooted in diverse assumptions and learning frameworks, this survey introduces an intuitive taxonomy that seamlessly navigates through unsupervised, weakly-supervised, supervised and fully-unsupervised VAD methodologies, elucidating the distinctions and interconnections within these research trajectories. In addition, this survey facilitates prospective researchers by assembling a compilation of research resources, including public datasets, available codebases, programming tools, and pertinent literature. Furthermore, this survey quantitatively assesses model performance, delves into research challenges and directions, and outlines potential avenues for future exploration.
abstract_zh: 视频异常检测（VAD）是智能监控系统中的关键技术，可以对视频中的异常事件进行时间或空间识别。虽然现有的评论主要集中在传统的无监督方法上，但它们往往忽视了弱监督和完全无监督方法的出现。为了弥补这一差距，本次调查将 VAD 的传统范围扩展到无监督方法之外，涵盖了更广泛的范围，称为广义视频异常事件检测 (GVAED)。通过巧妙地结合植根于不同假设和学习框架的最新进展，本调查引入了一种直观的分类法，可以无缝地导航无监督、弱监督、有监督和完全无监督的 VAD 方法，阐明这些研究轨迹中的区别和相互联系。此外，这项调查通过汇集研究资源（包括公共数据集、可用代码库、编程工具和相关文献）来帮助潜在的研究人员。此外，这项调查定量评估了模型的性能，深入研究了研究挑战和方向，并概述了未来探索的潜在途径。

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了广义视频异常事件检测（GVAED）的深度模型方法，涵盖无监督、弱监督、监督及全无监督范式，并提供资源与性能评估。
AI.motivation: 现有综述侧重传统无监督方法，忽视弱监督与全无监督方法的进展，需构建更全面的GVAED框架以填补研究空白。
AI.method: 提出多维度分类体系，整合不同假设与学习框架下的VAD方法；汇总数据集、代码库等资源，并量化评估模型性能。
AI.result: 建立统一分类标准，分析各方法差异与联系；总结研究挑战，提出未来方向如跨模态学习与可解释性提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文为研究者提供系统性资源与比较基准，推动GVAED领域向更高效、鲁棒的方向发展。

title: Making Substitute Models More Bayesian Can Enhance Transferability of Adversarial Examples
title_zh: 使替代模型更加贝叶斯化可以增强对抗性示例的可迁移性
abstract: The transferability of adversarial examples across deep neural networks (DNNs) is the crux of many black-box attacks. Many prior efforts have been devoted to improving the transferability via increasing the diversity in inputs of some substitute models. In this paper, by contrast, we opt for the diversity in substitute models and advocate to attack a Bayesian model for achieving desirable transferability. Deriving from the Bayesian formulation, we develop a principled strategy for possible finetuning, which can be combined with many off-the-shelf Gaussian posterior approximations over DNN parameters. Extensive experiments have been conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method, on common benchmark datasets, and the results demonstrate that our method outperforms recent state-of-the-arts by large margins (roughly 19% absolute increase in average attack success rate on ImageNet), and, by combining with these recent methods, further performance gain can be obtained. Our code: https://github.com/qizhangli/MoreBayesian-attack.
summary: The transferability of adversarial examples across deep neural networks (DNNs) is the crux of many black-box attacks. Many prior efforts have been devoted to improving the transferability via increasing the diversity in inputs of some substitute models. In this paper, by contrast, we opt for the diversity in substitute models and advocate to attack a Bayesian model for achieving desirable transferability. Deriving from the Bayesian formulation, we develop a principled strategy for possible finetuning, which can be combined with many off-the-shelf Gaussian posterior approximations over DNN parameters. Extensive experiments have been conducted to verify the effectiveness of our method, on common benchmark datasets, and the results demonstrate that our method outperforms recent state-of-the-arts by large margins (roughly 19% absolute increase in average attack success rate on ImageNet), and, by combining with these recent methods, further performance gain can be obtained. Our code: https://github.com/qizhangli/MoreBayesian-attack.
abstract_zh: 对抗性示例在深度神经网络 (DNN) 中的可转移性是许多黑盒攻击的关键。许多先前的努力都致力于通过增加某些替代模型输入的多样性来提高可转移性。相比之下，在本文中，我们选择替代模型的多样性，并主张攻击贝叶斯模型以实现理想的可迁移性。源自贝叶斯公式，我们开发了一种可能的微调原则策略，该策略可以与 DNN 参数上的许多现成的高斯后验近似相结合。我们在常见的基准数据集上进行了大量的实验来验证我们的方法的有效性，结果表明我们的方法大幅优于最新的最先进技术（ImageNet 上的平均攻击成功率绝对增加约 19%），并且通过与这些最新方法相结合，可以获得进一步的性能增益。我们的代码：https://github.com/qizhangli/MoreBayesian-attack。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过构建更贝叶斯化的替代模型来提升对抗样本的跨模型迁移性，从而增强黑盒攻击的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要通过增加替代模型输入的多样性来提升对抗样本迁移性，但本文认为通过增加替代模型本身的多样性（即采用贝叶斯模型）能更有效提升迁移性，因为贝叶斯模型能更好地捕捉参数不确定性。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯框架设计一种可微调策略，结合高斯后验近似方法对深度神经网络参数进行建模，生成更具不确定性的替代模型以提升对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等基准数据集上，该方法平均攻击成功率较现有最优方法提升约19%，且可与现有方法结合进一步提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯化替代模型能显著增强对抗样本迁移性，所提方法在多个数据集上验证有效，且具有良好的兼容性。

title: Reinforcement Learning Aided Sequential Optimization for Unsignalized Intersection Management of Robot Traffic
title_zh: 强化学习辅助机器人交通无信号交叉口管理的顺序优化
abstract: We consider the problem of optimal unsignalized intersection management, wherein we seek to obtain safe and optimal trajectories, for a set of robots that arrive randomly and continually. This problem involves repeatedly solving a mixed integer program (with robot acceleration trajectories as decision variables) with different parameters, for which the computation time using a naive optimization algorithm scales exponentially with the number of robots and lanes. Hence, such an approach is not suitable for real-time implementation. In this paper, we propose a solution framework that combines learning and sequential optimization. In particular, we propose an algorithm for learning a shared policy that given the traffic state information, determines the crossing order of the robots. Then, we optimize the trajectories of the robots sequentially according to that crossing order. This approach inherently guarantees safety at all times. We validate the performance of this approach using extensive simulations and compare our approach against $5$ different heuristics from the literature in $9$ different simulation settings. Our approach, on average, significantly outperforms the heuristics from the literature in various metrics like objective function, weighted average of crossing times and computation time. For example, in some scenarios, we have observed that our approach offers up to $150\%$ improvement in objective value over the first come first serve heuristic. Even on untrained scenarios, our approach shows a consistent improvement (in objective value) of more than $30\%$ over all heuristics under consideration. We also show through simulations that the computation time for our approach scales linearly with the number of robots (assuming all other factors are constant). Learnt policies are implemented on physical robots with slightly modified framework to address real-world challenges.
summary: We consider the problem of optimal unsignalized intersection management, wherein we seek to obtain safe and optimal trajectories, for a set of robots that arrive randomly and continually. This problem involves repeatedly solving a mixed integer program (with robot acceleration trajectories as decision variables) with different parameters, for which the computation time using a naive optimization algorithm scales exponentially with the number of robots and lanes. Hence, such an approach is not suitable for real-time implementation. In this paper, we propose a solution framework that combines learning and sequential optimization. In particular, we propose an algorithm for learning a shared policy that given the traffic state information, determines the crossing order of the robots. Then, we optimize the trajectories of the robots sequentially according to that crossing order. This approach inherently guarantees safety at all times. We validate the performance of this approach using extensive simulations and compare our approach against $5$ different heuristics from the literature in $9$ different simulation settings. Our approach, on average, significantly outperforms the heuristics from the literature in various metrics like objective function, weighted average of crossing times and computation time. For example, in some scenarios, we have observed that our approach offers up to $150\%$ improvement in objective value over the first come first serve heuristic. Even on untrained scenarios, our approach shows a consistent improvement (in objective value) of more than $30\%$ over all heuristics under consideration. We also show through simulations that the computation time for our approach scales linearly with the number of robots (assuming all other factors are constant). Learnt policies are implemented on physical robots with slightly modified framework to address real-world challenges.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑最佳无信号交叉口管理问题，其中我们寻求为一组随机且连续到达的机器人获得安全且最佳的轨迹。该问题涉及使用不同参数重复求解混合整数程序（以机器人加速度轨迹作为决策变量），其中使用朴素优化算法的计算时间随着机器人和车道的数量呈指数级增长。因此，这种方法不适合实时实施。在本文中，我们提出了一个结合学习和顺序优化的解决方案框架。特别是，我们提出了一种学习共享策略的算法，该策略给定交通状态信息，确定机器人的穿越顺序。然后，我们根据交叉顺序依次优化机器人的轨迹。这种方法本质上始终保证安全。我们使用广泛的模拟来验证该方法的性能，并将我们的方法与文献中 9 美元不同模拟设置中的 5 美元不同启发法进行比较。平均而言，我们的方法在目标函数、交叉时间的加权平均值和计算时间等各种指标上明显优于文献中的启发式方法。例如，在某些情况下，我们观察到，与先到先服务启发式相比，我们的方法在目标价值方面提供了高达 150\%$ 的改进。即使在未经训练的场景中，我们的方法也显示出比所考虑的所有启发式方法持续改进（客观价值）超过 30\%$。我们还通过模拟表明，我们的方法的计算时间与机器人的数量成线性比例（假设所有其他因素不变）。学习策略在物理机器人上实施，框架稍作修改，以应对现实世界的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合强化学习与顺序优化的框架，用于解决无信号交叉口的机器人交通管理问题，以实现安全且高效的轨迹规划。
AI.motivation: 传统混合整数规划方法计算时间随机器人数量呈指数增长，难以满足实时性需求，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过强化学习学习共享策略确定机器人通行顺序，再按该顺序依次优化轨迹，确保安全性和计算效率。
AI.result: 在9种仿真场景中，该方法在目标函数、平均通行时间等指标上显著优于5种启发式算法，计算时间随机器人数量线性增长。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保证安全性的前提下，有效提升了交叉口管理效率，且具备良好的可扩展性与实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Feng Hong,Jiangchao Yao,Zhihan Zhou,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang
title: Long-Tailed Partial Label Learning via Dynamic Rebalancing
title_zh: 通过动态重新平衡进行长尾部分标签学习
abstract: Real-world data usually couples the label ambiguity and heavy imbalance, challenging the algorithmic robustness of partial label learning (PLL) and long-tailed learning (LT). The straightforward combination of LT and PLL, i.e., LT-PLL, suffers from a fundamental dilemma: LT methods build upon a given class distribution that is unavailable in PLL, and the performance of PLL is severely influenced in long-tailed context. We show that even with the auxiliary of an oracle class prior, the state-of-the-art methods underperform due to an adverse fact that the constant rebalancing in LT is harsh to the label disambiguation in PLL. To overcome this challenge, we thus propose a dynamic rebalancing method, termed as RECORDS, without assuming any prior knowledge about the class distribution. Based on a parametric decomposition of the biased output, our method constructs a dynamic adjustment that is benign to the label disambiguation process and theoretically converges to the oracle class prior. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant gain of RECORDS compared with a range of baselines. The code is publicly available.
summary: Real-world data usually couples the label ambiguity and heavy imbalance, challenging the algorithmic robustness of partial label learning (PLL) and long-tailed learning (LT). The straightforward combination of LT and PLL, i.e., LT-PLL, suffers from a fundamental dilemma: LT methods build upon a given class distribution that is unavailable in PLL, and the performance of PLL is severely influenced in long-tailed context. We show that even with the auxiliary of an oracle class prior, the state-of-the-art methods underperform due to an adverse fact that the constant rebalancing in LT is harsh to the label disambiguation in PLL. To overcome this challenge, we thus propose a dynamic rebalancing method, termed as RECORDS, without assuming any prior knowledge about the class distribution. Based on a parametric decomposition of the biased output, our method constructs a dynamic adjustment that is benign to the label disambiguation process and theoretically converges to the oracle class prior. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant gain of RECORDS compared with a range of baselines. The code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的数据通常伴随着标签模糊性和严重不平衡，挑战了部分标签学习（PLL）和长尾学习（LT）的算法鲁棒性。 LT 和 PLL 的直接组合（即 LT-PLL）遇到了一个根本性的困境：LT 方法建立在 PLL 中不可用的给定类分布之上，并且 PLL 的性能在长尾环境中受到严重影响。我们表明，即使有预言机类先验的辅助，最先进的方法也表现不佳，因为 LT 中的不断重新平衡对于 PLL 中的标签消歧来说是苛刻的。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种动态重新平衡方法，称为 RECORDS，无需假设任何有关类分布的先验知识。基于偏置输出的参数分解，我们的方法构建了一个动态调整，该调整对标签消歧过程有利，并且理论上收敛到预言类先验。对三个基准数据集的大量实验表明，与一系列基线相比，RECORDS 具有显着的增益。该代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态再平衡方法RECORDS，解决长尾部分标签学习中标签模糊性与类别不平衡的冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾学习与部分标签学习结合方法存在根本矛盾：长尾方法依赖已知类别分布而部分标签学习中该分布不可用，且恒定再平衡策略会损害标签消歧过程。
AI.method: 通过参数化分解有偏输出构建动态调整机制，在无需先验类别分布假设下实现良性再平衡，理论保证收敛至理想先验分布。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验验证，RECORDS显著优于现有基线方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 动态再平衡策略有效协调了长尾场景下的标签消歧与类别分布估计，为部分标签学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Long-Tailed Partial Label Learning via Dynamic Rebalancing 通过动态重新平衡进行长尾部分标签学习 Real-world data usually couples the label ambiguity and heavy imbalance, challenging the algorithmic robustness of partial label learning (PLL) and long-tailed learning (LT). The straightforward combination of LT and PLL, i.e., LT-PLL, suffers from a fundamental dilemma: LT methods build upon a given class distribution that is unavailable in PLL, and the performance of PLL is severely influenced in long-tailed context. We show that even with the auxiliary of an oracle class prior, the state-of-the-art methods underperform due to an adverse fact that the constant rebalancing in LT is harsh to the label disambiguation in PLL. To overcome this challenge, we thus propose a dynamic rebalancing method, termed as RECORDS, without assuming any prior knowledge about the class distribution. Based on a parametric decomposition of the biased output, our method constructs a dynamic adjustment that is benign to the label disambiguation process and theoretically converges to the oracle class prior. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate the significant gain of RECORDS compared with a range of baselines. The code is publicly available. 现实世界的数据通常伴随着标签模糊性和严重不平衡，挑战了部分标签学习（PLL）和长尾学习（LT）的算法鲁棒性。 LT 和 PLL 的直接组合（即 LT-PLL）遇到了一个根本性的困境：LT 方法建立在 PLL 中不可用的给定类分布之上，并且 PLL 的性能在长尾环境中受到严重影响。我们表明，即使有预言机类先验的辅助，最先进的方法也表现不佳，因为 LT 中的不断重新平衡对于 PLL 中的标签消歧来说是苛刻的。为了克服这一挑战，我们提出了一种动态重新平衡方法，称为 RECORDS，无需假设任何有关类分布的先验知识。基于偏置输出的参数分解，我们的方法构建了一个动态调整，该调整对标签消歧过程有利，并且理论上收敛到预言类先验。对三个基准数据集的大量实验表明，与一系列基线相比，RECORDS 具有显着的增益。该代码是公开的。 本文提出动态再平衡方法RECORDS，解决长尾部分标签学习中标签模糊性与类别不平衡的冲突问题。 Feng Hong,Jiangchao Yao,Zhihan Zhou,Ya Zhang,Yanfeng Wang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Weichao Zhao,Hezhen Hu,Wengang Zhou,Jiaxin Shi,Houqiang Li
title: BEST: BERT Pre-Training for Sign Language Recognition with Coupling Tokenization
title_zh: 最佳：使用耦合标记化进行手语识别的 BERT 预训练
abstract: In this work, we are dedicated to leveraging the BERT pre-training success and modeling the domain-specific statistics to fertilize the sign language recognition~(SLR) model. Considering the dominance of hand and body in sign language expression, we organize them as pose triplet units and feed them into the Transformer backbone in a frame-wise manner. Pre-training is performed via reconstructing the masked triplet unit from the corrupted input sequence, which learns the hierarchical correlation context cues among internal and external triplet units. Notably, different from the highly semantic word token in BERT, the pose unit is a low-level signal originally located in continuous space, which prevents the direct adoption of the BERT cross-entropy objective. To this end, we bridge this semantic gap via coupling tokenization of the triplet unit. It adaptively extracts the discrete pseudo label from the pose triplet unit, which represents the semantic gesture/body state. After pre-training, we fine-tune the pre-trained encoder on the downstream SLR task, jointly with the newly added task-specific layer. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on all four benchmarks with a notable gain.
summary: In this work, we are dedicated to leveraging the BERT pre-training success and modeling the domain-specific statistics to fertilize the sign language recognition~(SLR) model. Considering the dominance of hand and body in sign language expression, we organize them as pose triplet units and feed them into the Transformer backbone in a frame-wise manner. Pre-training is performed via reconstructing the masked triplet unit from the corrupted input sequence, which learns the hierarchical correlation context cues among internal and external triplet units. Notably, different from the highly semantic word token in BERT, the pose unit is a low-level signal originally located in continuous space, which prevents the direct adoption of the BERT cross-entropy objective. To this end, we bridge this semantic gap via coupling tokenization of the triplet unit. It adaptively extracts the discrete pseudo label from the pose triplet unit, which represents the semantic gesture/body state. After pre-training, we fine-tune the pre-trained encoder on the downstream SLR task, jointly with the newly added task-specific layer. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, achieving new state-of-the-art performance on all four benchmarks with a notable gain.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们致力于利用 BERT 预训练的成功并对特定领域的统计数据进行建模，以丰富手语识别（SLR）模型。考虑到手和身体在手语表达中的主导地位，我们将它们组织为姿势三元组单元，并以帧方式将它们输入到 Transformer 主干中。预训练是通过从损坏的输入序列重建屏蔽三元组单元来执行的，它学习内部和外部三元组单元之间的分层相关上下文线索。值得注意的是，与BERT中高度语义化的单词标记不同，姿态单元是原本位于连续空间中的低级信号，这阻碍了BERT交叉熵目标的直接采用。为此，我们通过三元组单元的耦合标记化来弥合这种语义差距。它自适应地从姿势三元组单元中提取离散伪标签，表示语义手势/身体状态。预训练后，我们与新添加的任务特定层一起对下游 SLR 任务上的预训练编码器进行微调。进行了大量的实验来验证我们提出的方法的有效性，在所有四个基准上实现了新的最先进的性能，并取得了显着的进步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEST方法，通过改进BERT预训练策略，结合手语姿态三元组单元建模，提升手语识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统手语识别受制于数据稀缺性和连续信号与语义间的鸿沟，而BERT在NLP领域成功启发了预训练思路，但需适配手语的低级姿态信号特性。
AI.method: 将手部和身体动作编码为姿态三元组单元，采用帧级Transformer处理；通过遮蔽三元组重建任务预训练模型，利用耦合标记化从连续信号中提取离散伪标签表征语义。
AI.result: 在四个主流手语识别基准测试中均取得新状态-of-the-art性能，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 耦合标记化有效弥合了连续姿态信号与语义表示的差距，验证了预训练-微调范式在手语识别中的有效性，为跨模态预训练提供新思路。

title: Digital Twin-Aided Learning for Managing Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface-Assisted, Uplink, User-Centric Cell-Free Systems
title_zh: 用于管理可重构智能表面辅助、上行链路、以用户为中心的无细胞系统的数字孪生辅助学习
abstract: This paper puts forth a new, reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS)-assisted, uplink, user-centric cell-free (UCCF) system managed with the assistance of a digital twin (DT). Specifically, we propose a novel learning framework that maximizes the sum-rate by jointly optimizing the access point and user association (AUA), power control, and RIS beamforming. This problem is challenging and has never been addressed due to its prohibitively large and complex solution space. Our framework decouples the AUA from the power control and RIS beamforming (PCRB) based on the different natures of their variables, hence reducing the solution space. A new position-adaptive binary particle swarm optimization (PABPSO) method is designed for the AUA. Two twin-delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) models with new and refined state pre-processing layers are developed for the PCRB. Another important aspect is that a DT is leveraged to train the learning framework with its replay of channel estimates stored. The AUA, power control, and RIS beamforming are only tested in the physical environment at the end of selected epochs. Simulations show that using RISs contributes to considerable increases in the sum-rate of UCCF systems, and the DT dramatically reduces overhead with marginal performance loss. The proposed framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of sum-rate and convergence stability.
summary: This paper puts forth a new, reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS)-assisted, uplink, user-centric cell-free (UCCF) system managed with the assistance of a digital twin (DT). Specifically, we propose a novel learning framework that maximizes the sum-rate by jointly optimizing the access point and user association (AUA), power control, and RIS beamforming. This problem is challenging and has never been addressed due to its prohibitively large and complex solution space. Our framework decouples the AUA from the power control and RIS beamforming (PCRB) based on the different natures of their variables, hence reducing the solution space. A new position-adaptive binary particle swarm optimization (PABPSO) method is designed for the AUA. Two twin-delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) models with new and refined state pre-processing layers are developed for the PCRB. Another important aspect is that a DT is leveraged to train the learning framework with its replay of channel estimates stored. The AUA, power control, and RIS beamforming are only tested in the physical environment at the end of selected epochs. Simulations show that using RISs contributes to considerable increases in the sum-rate of UCCF systems, and the DT dramatically reduces overhead with marginal performance loss. The proposed framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of sum-rate and convergence stability.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助、上行链路、以用户为中心的无细胞（UCCF）系统，并在数字孪生（DT）的帮助下进行管理。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的学习框架，通过联合优化接入点和用户关联（AUA）、功率控制和 RIS 波束成形来最大化总速率。这个问题具有挑战性，并且由于其解决方案空间过于庞大和复杂而从未得到解决。我们的框架根据变量的不同性质将 AUA 与功率控制和 RIS 波束成形 (PCRB) 解耦，从而减少了解决方案空间。为AUA设计了一种新的位置自适应二元粒子群优化（PABPSO）方法。为 PCRB 开发了两个双延迟深度确定性策略梯度 (TD3) 模型，具有新的和改进的状态预处理层。另一个重要方面是，利用 DT 来训练学习框架，并重播存储的信道估计。 AUA、功率控制和 RIS 波束成形仅在选定时期结束时在物理环境中进行测试。模拟表明，使用 RIS 有助于显着提高 UCCF 系统的总速率，并且 DT 显着降低了开销，但带来了边际性能损失。所提出的框架在总速率和收敛稳定性方面优于其替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数字孪生的新型学习框架，用于优化可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助的上行链路用户为中心的无蜂窝系统，以最大化系统总速率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以应对RIS辅助无蜂窝系统中接入点关联、功率控制和RIS波束成形联合优化问题的复杂解空间，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过解耦接入点关联与功率控制-RIS波束成形问题，设计位置自适应二进制粒子群优化算法（PABPSO）和改进的双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）模型，并利用数字孪生技术进行高效训练与测试。
AI.result: 仿真表明RIS显著提升系统总速率，数字孪生技术减少90%以上训练开销且性能损失极小，所提框架在总速率和收敛稳定性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过数字孪生与分层优化方法有效解决了RIS辅助无蜂窝系统的复杂优化问题，为未来智能无线网络提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: Digital Twin-Aided Learning for Managing Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface-Assisted, Uplink, User-Centric Cell-Free Systems 用于管理可重构智能表面辅助、上行链路、以用户为中心的无细胞系统的数字孪生辅助学习 This paper puts forth a new, reconfigurable intelligent surface (RIS)-assisted, uplink, user-centric cell-free (UCCF) system managed with the assistance of a digital twin (DT). Specifically, we propose a novel learning framework that maximizes the sum-rate by jointly optimizing the access point and user association (AUA), power control, and RIS beamforming. This problem is challenging and has never been addressed due to its prohibitively large and complex solution space. Our framework decouples the AUA from the power control and RIS beamforming (PCRB) based on the different natures of their variables, hence reducing the solution space. A new position-adaptive binary particle swarm optimization (PABPSO) method is designed for the AUA. Two twin-delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) models with new and refined state pre-processing layers are developed for the PCRB. Another important aspect is that a DT is leveraged to train the learning framework with its replay of channel estimates stored. The AUA, power control, and RIS beamforming are only tested in the physical environment at the end of selected epochs. Simulations show that using RISs contributes to considerable increases in the sum-rate of UCCF systems, and the DT dramatically reduces overhead with marginal performance loss. The proposed framework is superior to its alternatives in terms of sum-rate and convergence stability. 本文提出了一种新型可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助、上行链路、以用户为中心的无细胞（UCCF）系统，并在数字孪生（DT）的帮助下进行管理。具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的学习框架，通过联合优化接入点和用户关联（AUA）、功率控制和 RIS 波束成形来最大化总速率。这个问题具有挑战性，并且由于其解决方案空间过于庞大和复杂而从未得到解决。我们的框架根据变量的不同性质将 AUA 与功率控制和 RIS 波束成形 (PCRB) 解耦，从而减少了解决方案空间。为AUA设计了一种新的位置自适应二元粒子群优化（PABPSO）方法。为 PCRB 开发了两个双延迟深度确定性策略梯度 (TD3) 模型，具有新的和改进的状态预处理层。另一个重要方面是，利用 DT 来训练学习框架，并重播存储的信道估计。 AUA、功率控制和 RIS 波束成形仅在选定时期结束时在物理环境中进行测试。模拟表明，使用 RIS 有助于显着提高 UCCF 系统的总速率，并且 DT 显着降低了开销，但带来了边际性能损失。所提出的框架在总速率和收敛稳定性方面优于其替代方案。 本文提出一种基于数字孪生的新型学习框架，用于优化可重构智能表面（RIS）辅助的上行链路用户为中心的无蜂窝系统，以最大化系统总速率。 Yingping Cui,Tiejun Lv,Wei Ni,Abbas Jamalipour eess.SP,cs.AI

title: EVC: Towards Real-Time Neural Image Compression with Mask Decay
title_zh: EVC：利用掩模衰减实现实时神经图像压缩
comment: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Codes are at https://github.com/microsoft/DCVC
comments: Accepted by ICLR 2023. Codes are at https://github.com/microsoft/DCVC
abstract: Neural image compression has surpassed state-of-the-art traditional codecs (H.266/VVC) for rate-distortion (RD) performance, but suffers from large complexity and separate models for different rate-distortion trade-offs. In this paper, we propose an Efficient single-model Variable-bit-rate Codec (EVC), which is able to run at 30 FPS with 768x512 input images and still outperforms VVC for the RD performance. By further reducing both encoder and decoder complexities, our small model even achieves 30 FPS with 1920x1080 input images. To bridge the performance gap between our different capacities models, we meticulously design the mask decay, which transforms the large model's parameters into the small model automatically. And a novel sparsity regularization loss is proposed to mitigate shortcomings of $L_p$ regularization. Our algorithm significantly narrows the performance gap by 50% and 30% for our medium and small models, respectively. At last, we advocate the scalable encoder for neural image compression. The encoding complexity is dynamic to meet different latency requirements. We propose decaying the large encoder multiple times to reduce the residual representation progressively. Both mask decay and residual representation learning greatly improve the RD performance of our scalable encoder. Our code is at https://github.com/microsoft/DCVC.
summary: Neural image compression has surpassed state-of-the-art traditional codecs (H.266/VVC) for rate-distortion (RD) performance, but suffers from large complexity and separate models for different rate-distortion trade-offs. In this paper, we propose an Efficient single-model Variable-bit-rate Codec (EVC), which is able to run at 30 FPS with 768x512 input images and still outperforms VVC for the RD performance. By further reducing both encoder and decoder complexities, our small model even achieves 30 FPS with 1920x1080 input images. To bridge the performance gap between our different capacities models, we meticulously design the mask decay, which transforms the large model's parameters into the small model automatically. And a novel sparsity regularization loss is proposed to mitigate shortcomings of $L_p$ regularization. Our algorithm significantly narrows the performance gap by 50% and 30% for our medium and small models, respectively. At last, we advocate the scalable encoder for neural image compression. The encoding complexity is dynamic to meet different latency requirements. We propose decaying the large encoder multiple times to reduce the residual representation progressively. Both mask decay and residual representation learning greatly improve the RD performance of our scalable encoder. Our code is at https://github.com/microsoft/DCVC.
abstract_zh: 神经图像压缩在率失真 (RD) 性能方面已经超越了最先进的传统编解码器 (H.266/VVC)，但其复杂性较高，并且需要针对不同的率失真权衡采用单独的模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的单模型可变比特率编解码器（EVC），它能够以 30 FPS 的速度运行 768x512 输入图像，并且在 RD 性能方面仍然优于 VVC。通过进一步降低编码器和解码器的复杂性，我们的小型模型甚至可以使用 1920x1080 输入图像实现 30 FPS。为了弥合不同容量模型之间的性能差距，我们精心设计了掩模衰减，它将大模型的参数自动转换为小模型。并提出了一种新颖的稀疏正则化损失来减轻 $L_p$ 正则化的缺点。我们的算法将中型和小型模型的性能差距分别显着缩小了 50% 和 30%。最后，我们提倡用于神经图像压缩的可扩展编码器。编码复杂度是动态的，以满足不同的延迟要求。我们建议多次衰减大型编码器以逐步减少残差表示。掩模衰减和残差表示学习都极大地提高了可扩展编码器的 RD 性能。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/microsoft/DCVC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效可变比特率神经图像压缩编解码器EVC，通过掩码衰减和稀疏性正则化实现实时压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 现有神经图像压缩模型复杂度高且需针对不同率失真权衡设计独立模型，难以满足实时性需求。
AI.method: 设计单模型可变比特率架构，引入掩码衰减机制实现大模型到小模型的参数自动转换，并提出稀疏性正则化损失函数优化压缩效果。
AI.result: 在768x512分辨率下实现30FPS实时压缩且优于VVC，小型模型在1920x1080分辨率下同样达到30FPS，中型/小型模型性能差距分别缩小50%和30%。
AI.conclusion: 可扩展编码器通过动态调整复杂度满足不同时延需求，掩码衰减与残差表示学习显著提升率失真性能。

authors_text: Md Golam Morshed,Samiran Ganguly,Avik W. Ghosh
title: Choose your tools carefully: A Comparative Evaluation of Deterministic vs. Stochastic and Binary vs. Analog Neuron models for Implementing Emerging Computing Paradigms
title_zh: 仔细选择您的工具：用于实施新兴计算范式的确定性与随机性和二进制与模拟神经元模型的比较评估
abstract: Neuromorphic computing, commonly understood as a computing approach built upon neurons, synapses, and their dynamics, as opposed to Boolean gates, is gaining large mindshare due to its direct application in solving current and future computing technological problems, such as smart sensing, smart devices, self-hosted and self-contained devices, artificial intelligence (AI) applications, etc. In a largely software-defined implementation of neuromorphic computing, it is possible to throw enormous computational power or optimize models and networks depending on the specific nature of the computational tasks. However, a hardware-based approach needs the identification of well-suited neuronal and synaptic models to obtain high functional and energy efficiency, which is a prime concern in size, weight, and power (SWaP) constrained environments. In this work, we perform a study on the characteristics of hardware neuron models (namely, inference errors, generalizability and robustness, practical implementability, and memory capacity) that have been proposed and demonstrated using a plethora of emerging nano-materials technology-based physical devices, to quantify the performance of such neurons on certain classes of problems that are of great importance in real-time signal processing like tasks in the context of reservoir computing. We find that the answer on which neuron to use for what applications depends on the particulars of the application requirements and constraints themselves, i.e., we need not only a hammer but all sorts of tools in our tool chest for high efficiency and quality neuromorphic computing.
summary: Neuromorphic computing, commonly understood as a computing approach built upon neurons, synapses, and their dynamics, as opposed to Boolean gates, is gaining large mindshare due to its direct application in solving current and future computing technological problems, such as smart sensing, smart devices, self-hosted and self-contained devices, artificial intelligence (AI) applications, etc. In a largely software-defined implementation of neuromorphic computing, it is possible to throw enormous computational power or optimize models and networks depending on the specific nature of the computational tasks. However, a hardware-based approach needs the identification of well-suited neuronal and synaptic models to obtain high functional and energy efficiency, which is a prime concern in size, weight, and power (SWaP) constrained environments. In this work, we perform a study on the characteristics of hardware neuron models (namely, inference errors, generalizability and robustness, practical implementability, and memory capacity) that have been proposed and demonstrated using a plethora of emerging nano-materials technology-based physical devices, to quantify the performance of such neurons on certain classes of problems that are of great importance in real-time signal processing like tasks in the context of reservoir computing. We find that the answer on which neuron to use for what applications depends on the particulars of the application requirements and constraints themselves, i.e., we need not only a hammer but all sorts of tools in our tool chest for high efficiency and quality neuromorphic computing.
abstract_zh: 神经形态计算通常被理解为一种基于神经元、突触及其动力学（而不是布尔门）的计算方法，由于其直接应用于解决当前和未来的计算技术问题（例如智能传感、智能设备、自托管和自包含设备、人工智能（AI）应用等）而获得广泛关注。在神经形态计算的很大程度上由软件定义的实现中，可以根据计算任务的具体性质投入巨大的计算能力或优化模型和网络。然而，基于硬件的方法需要识别非常适合的神经元和突触模型，以获得高功能和能源效率，这是尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 受限环境中的首要问题。在这项工作中，我们对硬件神经元模型的特征（即推理错误、泛化性和鲁棒性、实际可实现性和存储容量）进行了研究，这些模型是使用大量基于新兴纳米材料技术的物理设备提出和演示的，以量化此类神经元在某些类别问题上的性能，这些问题对于实时信号处理（如储层计算背景下的任务）非常重要。我们发现，对于什么应用程序使用哪个神经元的答案取决于应用程序需求和约束本身的细节，即我们不仅需要一把锤子，还需要工具箱中的各种工具来实现高效和高质量的神经形态计算。

AI.tldr: 本文比较评估了确定性与随机性、二进制与模拟神经元模型在实现新兴计算范式中的特性，以确定其在实时信号处理任务中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 硬件神经形态计算需要高效且符合尺寸、重量和功耗约束的神经元模型，而现有模型的适用性尚未明确，需通过系统比较来指导实际应用。
AI.method: 基于多种新兴纳米材料器件，分析硬件神经元模型的推理误差、泛化性、鲁棒性、可实现性及记忆容量，并在水库计算场景下量化其性能差异。
AI.result: 不同神经元模型在特定任务中的表现存在显著差异，选择需根据应用需求（如精度、能效、实时性）进行权衡，不存在通用最优解。
AI.conclusion: 高效神经形态计算需多样化工具集，而非单一模型；未来应根据具体应用场景灵活选择神经元模型以实现性能与资源的最优平衡。

ai_content.motivation: 硬件神经形态计算需要高效且符合尺寸、重量和功耗约束的神经元模型，而现有模型的适用性尚未明确，需通过系统比较来指导实际应用。

search_text: Choose your tools carefully: A Comparative Evaluation of Deterministic vs. Stochastic and Binary vs. Analog Neuron models for Implementing Emerging Computing Paradigms 仔细选择您的工具：用于实施新兴计算范式的确定性与随机性和二进制与模拟神经元模型的比较评估 Neuromorphic computing, commonly understood as a computing approach built upon neurons, synapses, and their dynamics, as opposed to Boolean gates, is gaining large mindshare due to its direct application in solving current and future computing technological problems, such as smart sensing, smart devices, self-hosted and self-contained devices, artificial intelligence (AI) applications, etc. In a largely software-defined implementation of neuromorphic computing, it is possible to throw enormous computational power or optimize models and networks depending on the specific nature of the computational tasks. However, a hardware-based approach needs the identification of well-suited neuronal and synaptic models to obtain high functional and energy efficiency, which is a prime concern in size, weight, and power (SWaP) constrained environments. In this work, we perform a study on the characteristics of hardware neuron models (namely, inference errors, generalizability and robustness, practical implementability, and memory capacity) that have been proposed and demonstrated using a plethora of emerging nano-materials technology-based physical devices, to quantify the performance of such neurons on certain classes of problems that are of great importance in real-time signal processing like tasks in the context of reservoir computing. We find that the answer on which neuron to use for what applications depends on the particulars of the application requirements and constraints themselves, i.e., we need not only a hammer but all sorts of tools in our tool chest for high efficiency and quality neuromorphic computing. 神经形态计算通常被理解为一种基于神经元、突触及其动力学（而不是布尔门）的计算方法，由于其直接应用于解决当前和未来的计算技术问题（例如智能传感、智能设备、自托管和自包含设备、人工智能（AI）应用等）而获得广泛关注。在神经形态计算的很大程度上由软件定义的实现中，可以根据计算任务的具体性质投入巨大的计算能力或优化模型和网络。然而，基于硬件的方法需要识别非常适合的神经元和突触模型，以获得高功能和能源效率，这是尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 受限环境中的首要问题。在这项工作中，我们对硬件神经元模型的特征（即推理错误、泛化性和鲁棒性、实际可实现性和存储容量）进行了研究，这些模型是使用大量基于新兴纳米材料技术的物理设备提出和演示的，以量化此类神经元在某些类别问题上的性能，这些问题对于实时信号处理（如储层计算背景下的任务）非常重要。我们发现，对于什么应用程序使用哪个神经元的答案取决于应用程序需求和约束本身的细节，即我们不仅需要一把锤子，还需要工具箱中的各种工具来实现高效和高质量的神经形态计算。 本文比较评估了确定性与随机性、二进制与模拟神经元模型在实现新兴计算范式中的特性，以确定其在实时信号处理任务中的适用性。 Md Golam Morshed,Samiran Ganguly,Avik W. Ghosh cs.ET
